                    <input type="number" value={customFontSize} onChange={(e) => setCustomFontSize(e.target.value)} placeholder="Custom" className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 font-mono" min="8" max="200" onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && addCustomFontSize()} />
                    <button onClick={addCustomFontSize} className="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium">Apply</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {/* COLOR PICKER */}
            <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRefs.color}>
              <button onClick={() => setActiveDropdown(activeDropdown === 'color' ? null : 'color')} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><Palette size={16} /></button>
              {activeDropdown === 'color' && (
                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border p-4 z-50 w-[320px]">
                  <div className="mb-2 text-xs font-semibold">Recent Colors</div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-1.5 mb-3">
                    {recentColors.map(color => <button key={color} onClick={() => setTextColor(color)} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg border hover:scale-110 transition" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />)}
                  </div>
                  <div className="mb-2 text-xs font-semibold">All Colors</div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-8 gap-1.5 mb-3">
                    {colors.map(color => <button key={color} onClick={() => setTextColor(color)} className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg border hover:scale-110 transition" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />)}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 mb-3">
                    <input type="color" onChange={(e) => setTextColor(e.target.value)} className="flex-1 h-9 rounded-lg cursor-pointer" />
                    <input type="text" value={customColor} onChange={(e) => setCustomColor(e.target.value)} placeholder="#HEX" className="flex-1 px-2 py-1.5 text-sm border rounded-lg" onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && applyCustomColor()} />
                    <button onClick={applyCustomColor} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg text-sm">Apply</button>
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={removeTextColor} className="w-full text-xs text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 text-center py-1.5">Remove color</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {/* HIGHLIGHTER */}
            <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRefs.highlight}>
              <button onClick={() => setActiveDropdown(activeDropdown === 'highlight' ? null : 'highlight')} className={`p-1.5 rounded-lg transition ${editorMode === 'classic' && editor?.isActive('highlight') ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-600' : 'hover:bg-gray-100'}`}><Highlighter size={16} /></button>
              {activeDropdown === 'highlight' && (
                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border p-3 z-50 w-[280px]">
                  <div className="mb-2 text-xs font-semibold">Recent</div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-2 mb-3">
                    {recentHighlights.map(color => <button key={color} onClick={() => setHighlight(color)} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg border hover:scale-110 transition" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />)}
                  </div>
                  <div className="mb-2 text-xs font-semibold">All Colors</div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-2 mb-3">
                    {highlightColors.map(color => <button key={color} onClick={() => setHighlight(color)} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg border hover:scale-110 transition" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />)}
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={removeHighlight} className="w-full mt-2 text-xs text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 text-center py-1.5">Remove highlight</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* ALIGNMENT */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-0.5">
              <button onClick={() => setAlignment('left')} className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-200"><AlignLeft size={16} /></button>
              <button onClick={() => setAlignment('center')} className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-200"><AlignCenter size={16} /></button>
              <button onClick={() => setAlignment('right')} className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-200"><AlignRight size={16} /></button>
              <button onClick={() => setAlignment('justify')} className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-200"><AlignJustify size={16} /></button>
            </div>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* LISTS */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-0.5">
              <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run()} className={`p-1.5 rounded-md transition ${editor?.isActive('bulletList') ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`} disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><List size={16} /></button>
              <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run()} className={`p-1.5 rounded-md transition ${editor?.isActive('orderedList') ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`} disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><ListOrdered size={16} /></button>
              <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().toggleTaskList().run()} className={`p-1.5 rounded-md transition ${editor?.isActive('taskList') ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`} disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><CheckSquare size={16} /></button>
            </div>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* BLOCKS - Quote, Paragraph, Horizontal Rule */}
            <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().toggleBlockquote().run()} className={`p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100 ${editor?.isActive('blockquote') ? 'bg-gray-200' : ''}`} disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><Quote size={16} /></button>
            <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().setParagraph().run()} className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100" disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><Pilcrow size={16} /></button>
            <button onClick={insertHorizontalRule} className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100"><Minus size={16} /></button>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* TABLE DROPDOWN */}
            <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRefs.table}>
              <button onClick={() => setActiveDropdown(activeDropdown === 'table' ? null : 'table')} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100" disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><TableIcon size={16} /></button>
              {activeDropdown === 'table' && (
                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border p-3 z-50 min-w-[240px]">
                  <div className="mb-3 pb-3 border-b">
                    <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-2">Insert Table</div>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-1 mb-2">
                      {Array.from({ length: 36 }, (_, i) => {
                        const row = Math.floor(i / 6) + 1, col = (i % 6) + 1
                        return <button key={i} onMouseEnter={() => { setPreviewRows(row); setPreviewCols(col) }} onClick={() => insertTableWithSize(row, col)} className={`aspect-square rounded transition ${row <= previewRows && col <= previewCols ? 'bg-purple-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
                      })}
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-center text-xs font-medium text-purple-600">{previewRows} x {previewCols}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    <button onClick={addRowBefore} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Add Row Above</button>
                    <button onClick={addRowAfter} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Add Row Below</button>
                    <button onClick={deleteRow} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg text-red-500">Delete Row</button>
                    <button onClick={addColumnBefore} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Add Column Left</button>
                    <button onClick={addColumnAfter} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Add Column Right</button>
                    <button onClick={deleteColumn} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg text-red-500">Delete Column</button>
                    <button onClick={toggleHeaderRow} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Toggle Header Row</button>
                    <button onClick={toggleHeaderColumn} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Toggle Header Column</button>
                    <button onClick={mergeCells} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Merge Cells</button>
                    <button onClick={splitCell} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">Split Cell</button>
                    <button onClick={deleteTable} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg text-red-500 font-semibold">Delete Table</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* LINKS */}
            <button onClick={setLink} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><LinkIcon size={16} /></button>
            <button onClick={unsetLink} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><Unlink size={16} /></button>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* MEDIA & SPECIAL CONTENT DROPDOWN */}
            <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRefs.more}>
              <button onClick={() => setActiveDropdown(activeDropdown === 'more' ? null : 'more')} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100">
                <Plus size={16} />
              </button>
              {activeDropdown === 'more' && (
                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border p-2 z-50 min-w-[200px] max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                  <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 px-3 pt-2 pb-1">Insert Content</div>
                  <button onClick={insertImage} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><Image size={14} /> Image</button>
                  <button onClick={insertVideo} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><Video size={14} /> Video</button>
                  <button onClick={insertAudio} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><Music size={14} /> Audio</button>
                  <button onClick={insertPDF} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><File size={14} /> PDF</button>
                  <button onClick={insertEmbed} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><Code size={14} /> Embed Code</button>
                  <button onClick={insertButton} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><MousePointer size={14} /> Button</button>
                  <button onClick={insertAffiliateProduct} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><ShoppingBag size={14} /> Affiliate Product</button>
                  <button onClick={insertPoll} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><BarChart3 size={14} /> Poll</button>
                  <div className="border-t my-1"></div>
                  <button onClick={handleExport} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><Download size={14} /> Export HTML</button>
                  <button onClick={handleExportMarkdown} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2"><Download size={14} /> Export Markdown</button>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {/* EMOJI */}
            <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRefs.emoji}>
              <button onClick={() => setShowEmojiPicker(!showEmojiPicker)} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><Smile size={16} /></button>
              {showEmojiPicker && <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1 z-[100]"><EmojiPicker onEmojiClick={onEmojiClick} /></div>}
            </div>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* EDITING TOOLS */}
            <button onClick={selectAll} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><Copy size={16} /></button>
            <button onClick={copyHtml} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><Code size={16} /></button>
            <button onClick={insertHardBreak} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><CornerDownLeft size={16} /></button>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* UNDO/REDO */}
            <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().undo().run()} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100" disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><Undo size={16} /></button>
            <button onClick={() => editor?.chain().focus().redo().run()} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100" disabled={editorMode !== 'classic'}><Redo size={16} /></button>
            
            <div className="w-px h-6 bg-gray-200 mx-1" />
            
            {/* VIEW OPTIONS */}
            <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRefs.view}>
              <button onClick={() => setActiveDropdown(activeDropdown === 'view' ? null : 'view')} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"><Eye size={16} /></button>
              {activeDropdown === 'view' && (
                <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border p-2 z-50 min-w-[200px]">
                  <button onClick={() => setShowLineNumbers(!showLineNumbers)} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2">{showLineNumbers ? <EyeOff size={14} /> : <Eye size={14} />} Line Numbers</button>
                  <button onClick={toggleFullscreen} className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2">{isFullscreen ? <Minimize2 size={14} /> : <Maximize2 size={14} />} Fullscreen</button>
                  <div className="border-t my-2"></div>
                  <div className="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                    {stats.map(stat => <div key={stat.label} className="flex justify-between gap-4"><span>{stat.label}:</span><span className="font-mono">{stat.value}</span></div>)}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {/* WORD COUNT BADGE */}
            <div className="ml-auto flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg text-xs text-gray-500">
              <Heart size={12} className="text-red-400" />
              <span className="font-mono">{wordCount} words</span>
              <span className="text-gray-300">|</span>
              <span className="font-mono">{characterCount} chars</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
        
        {isCollapsed && (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
            <button onClick={() => setIsCollapsed(false)} className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"><Maximize2 size={16} /></button>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono">{wordCount} words</div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      
      {/* CLASSIC EDITOR MODE */}
      {editorMode === 'classic' && (
        <EditorContent editor={editor} className="prose max-w-none p-6 min-h-[500px] focus:outline-none" />
      )}
      
      {/* BLOCK BUILDER MODE */}
      {editorMode === 'block' && (
        <div className="p-6">
          <button onClick={addBlock} className="w-full mb-6 py-4 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-gray-500 hover:border-purple-500 hover:text-purple-500 transition-all">
            <Plus size={20} /> Add New Block
          </button>
          
          {/* Block Type Selection Modal */}
          {showBlockTypeModal && (
            <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" onClick={() => setShowBlockTypeModal(false)}>
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b p-4 flex justify-between items-center">
                  <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold">Select Block Type</h3>
                  <button onClick={() => setShowBlockTypeModal(false)} className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg"><X size={20} /></button>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  {blockTypesList.map(block => (
                    <button key={block.type} onClick={() => createBlock(block.type)} className="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 border rounded-xl hover:border-purple-500 hover:shadow-md transition-all text-left group">
                      <div className={`w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br ${block.color} rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-white group-hover:scale-110 transition`}>{block.icon}</div>
                      <div><div className="font-medium">{block.name}</div><div className="text-sm text-gray-500">{block.description}</div></div>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Blocks Grid */}
          <DragDropContext onDragEnd={onDragEnd}>
            <Droppable droppableId="blocks">
              {(provided) => (
                <div {...provided.droppableProps} ref={provided.innerRef} className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
                  {blocks?.map((block, index) => (
                    <Draggable key={block.id} draggableId={block.id} index={index}>
                      {(provided, snapshot) => (
                        <div ref={provided.innerRef} {...provided.draggableProps} className={`${getWidthClass(block.layout.width)} transition-all ${snapshot.isDragging ? 'opacity-50' : ''}`} style={provided.draggableProps.style}>
                          <div className={`border rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-white ${selectedBlockId === block.id ? 'ring-2 ring-purple-500 shadow-lg' : 'border-gray-200'}`}>
                            <div className="bg-gray-50 px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between border-b">
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <div {...provided.dragHandleProps} className="cursor-grab p-1 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded"><GripVertical size={16} className="text-gray-400" /></div>
                                <span className="text-sm font-medium">Block #{index + 1} ({block.type || 'text'})</span>
                                <div className="flex ml-2 gap-0.5">
                                  <button onClick={() => updateBlockWidth(block.id, 'full')} className={`px-2 py-0.5 text-xs rounded-l border ${block.layout.width === 'full' ? 'bg-purple-500 text-white' : 'bg-white border-gray-300'}`}>Full</button>
                                  <button onClick={() => updateBlockWidth(block.id, 'half')} className={`px-2 py-0.5 text-xs border-t border-b ${block.layout.width === 'half' ? 'bg-purple-500 text-white' : 'bg-white border-gray-300'}`}>½</button>
                                  <button onClick={() => updateBlockWidth(block.id, 'third')} className={`px-2 py-0.5 text-xs rounded-r border ${block.layout.width === 'third' ? 'bg-purple-500 text-white' : 'bg-white border-gray-300'}`}>⅓</button>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <button onClick={() => setSelectedBlockId(selectedBlockId === block.id ? null : block.id)} className={`p-1 rounded transition ${selectedBlockId === block.id ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-600' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}><Palette size={14} /></button>
                                <button onClick={() => duplicateBlock(block)} className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded"><Copy size={14} /></button>
                                <button onClick={() => deleteBlock(block.id)} className="p-1 hover:bg-red-100 text-red-500 rounded"><Trash2 size={14} /></button>
                              </div>
                            </div>

                            <div className={`${getPaddingClass(block.design.padding)} ${getBorderRadiusClass(block.design.borderRadius)} ${block.design.alignment === 'center' ? 'text-center' : block.design.alignment === 'right' ? 'text-right' : 'text-left'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: block.design.backgroundColor }}>
                              {editingBlockId === block.id ? (
                                <div className="space-y-2">
                                  <div className="text-xs text-purple-600 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <Edit3 size={12} /> Editing mode active - Use toolbar above to format
                                  </div>
                                  <div
                                    contentEditable
                                    dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: block.content.html }}
                                    onBlur={(e) => updateBlockContent(block.id, e.currentTarget.innerHTML)}
                                    className="outline-none min-h-[150px] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 p-3 rounded bg-white prose max-w-none"
                                    suppressContentEditableWarning
                                  />
                                  <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-2">
                                    <button onClick={() => setEditingBlockId(null)} className="px-3 py-1 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-purple-700">Done Editing</button>
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              ) : (
                                <div onClick={() => setEditingBlockId(block.id)} className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded transition">
                                  <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: block.content.html }} className="prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none" />
                                  <div className="text-center text-gray-400 text-sm mt-2 opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition">Click to edit this block</div>
                                </div>
                              )}
                            </div>

                            {selectedBlockId === block.id && (
                              <div className="border-t bg-gray-50 p-4">
                                <h4 className="text-sm font-medium mb-3">Block Design</h4>
                                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                  <div><label className="text-xs block mb-1">Background</label><input type="color" value={block.design.backgroundColor} onChange={(e) => updateBlockDesign(block.id, { backgroundColor: e.target.value })} className="w-full h-8 rounded border cursor-pointer" /></div>
                                  <div><label className="text-xs block mb-1">Padding</label><select value={block.design.padding} onChange={(e) => updateBlockDesign(block.id, { padding: e.target.value })} className="w-full p-1.5 text-sm border rounded"><option value="small">Small</option><option value="medium">Medium</option><option value="large">Large</option></select></div>
                                  <div><label className="text-xs block mb-1">Border Radius</label><select value={block.design.borderRadius} onChange={(e) => updateBlockDesign(block.id, { borderRadius: e.target.value })} className="w-full p-1.5 text-sm border rounded"><option value="none">None</option><option value="small">Small</option><option value="medium">Medium</option><option value="large">Large</option></select></div>
                                  <div><label className="text-xs block mb-1">Alignment</label><select value={block.design.alignment} onChange={(e) => updateBlockDesign(block.id, { alignment: e.target.value })} className="w-full p-1.5 text-sm border rounded"><option value="left">Left</option><option value="center">Center</option><option value="right">Right</option></select></div>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </Draggable>
                  ))}
                  {provided.placeholder}
                </div>
              )}
            </Droppable>
          </DragDropContext>

          {(!blocks || blocks.length === 0) && (
            <div className="text-center py-12 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl">
              <Layout size={48} className="mx-auto text-gray-400 mb-4" />
              <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">No Blocks Yet</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-500 mb-4">Click "Add New Block" to start building</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
      
      {/* Media Modals */}
      {activeMediaModal === 'image' && <ImageModal isOpen={true} onClose={() => setActiveMediaModal(null)} onUpload={(url) => handleMediaUpload(url, 'image')} />}
      {activeMediaModal === 'video' && <VideoModal isOpen={true} onClose={() => setActiveMediaModal(null)} onUpload={(url) => handleMediaUpload(url, 'video')} />}
      {activeMediaModal === 'audio' && <AudioModal isOpen={true} onClose={() => setActiveMediaModal(null)} onUpload={(url) => handleMediaUpload(url, 'audio')} />}
      {activeMediaModal === 'pdf' && <PDFModal isOpen={true} onClose={() => setActiveMediaModal(null)} onUpload={(url) => handleMediaUpload(url, 'pdf')} />}
      {activeMediaModal === 'embed' && <EmbedModal isOpen={true} onClose={() => setActiveMediaModal(null)} onUpload={(url) => handleMediaUpload(url, 'embed')} />}
    </>
  )
}

const CornerDownLeft = (props) => (
  <svg {...props} viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
    <polyline points="9 10 4 15 9 20"></polyline>
    <path d="M20 4v7a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H4"></path>
  </svg>
)

const Clock = (props) => (
  <svg {...props} viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle>
    <polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"></polyline>
  </svg>
)

export default React.memo(Toolbar)

========== src\components\EmptyState.jsx ==========
export default function EmptyState({ icon, title, message, action }) {
  return (
    <div className="empty-state">
      <div className="empty-icon">{icon || '📭'}</div>
      <h3>{title || 'No data found'}</h3>
      <p>{message || 'Create your first item to get started'}</p>
      {action && (
        <button className="btn btn-primary" onClick={action.onClick}>
          {action.label}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

========== src\components\FilterBar.jsx ==========
import { useState } from 'react'

export default function FilterBar({ 
  onSearch, 
  onFilterChange, 
  filters = [],
  searchPlaceholder = 'Search...',
  showDateRange = false,
  onDateRangeChange
}) {
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('')
  const [activeFilters, setActiveFilters] = useState({})
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState({ start: '', end: '' })

  const handleSearch = (e) => {
    const value = e.target.value
    setSearchTerm(value)
    onSearch?.(value)
  }

  const handleFilterChange = (key, value) => {
    const newFilters = { ...activeFilters, [key]: value }
    if (!value) delete newFilters[key]
    setActiveFilters(newFilters)
    onFilterChange?.(newFilters)
  }

  const handleDateRangeChange = (field, value) => {
    const newRange = { ...dateRange, [field]: value }
    setDateRange(newRange)
    if (newRange.start && newRange.end) {
      onDateRangeChange?.(newRange)
    }
  }

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('')
    setActiveFilters({})
    setDateRange({ start: '', end: '' })
    onSearch?.('')
    onFilterChange?.({})
    onDateRangeChange?.({ start: '', end: '' })
  }

  const hasActiveFilters = searchTerm || Object.keys(activeFilters).length > 0 || dateRange.start || dateRange.end

  return (
    <div className="card" style={{ marginBottom: '20px' }}>
      <div className="filters-bar">
        <div className="search-wrapper">
          <span className="search-icon">🔍</span>
          <input
            type="text"
            className="search-input"
            placeholder={searchPlaceholder}
            value={searchTerm}
            onChange={handleSearch}
          />
        </div>

        {filters.map((filter) => (
          <select
            key={filter.key}
            className="form-select"
            style={{ width: 'auto', minWidth: '120px' }}
            value={activeFilters[filter.key] || ''}
            onChange={(e) => handleFilterChange(filter.key, e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="">All {filter.label}</option>
            {filter.options.map((opt) => (
              <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>
                {opt.label}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>
        ))}

        {showDateRange && (
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px' }}>
            <input
              type="date"
              className="form-input"
              style={{ width: 'auto' }}
              value={dateRange.start}
              onChange={(e) => handleDateRangeChange('start', e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Start date"
            />
            <span style={{ alignSelf: 'center' }}>to</span>
            <input
              type="date"
              className="form-input"
              style={{ width: 'auto' }}
              value={dateRange.end}
              onChange={(e) => handleDateRangeChange('end', e.target.value)}
              placeholder="End date"
            />
          </div>
        )}

        {hasActiveFilters && (
          <button className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={clearFilters}>
            Clear All
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

========== src\components\Footer.js ==========
// components/Footer.jsx
import Link from 'next/link'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'

export default function Footer() {
  const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear()
  const [showAdminModal, setShowAdminModal] = useState(false)
  const [adminPassword, setAdminPassword] = useState('')
  const [passwordError, setPasswordError] = useState('')
  const [passwordLoading, setPasswordLoading] = useState(false)
  const [isAdmin, setIsAdmin] = useState(false)

  // Check if already logged in
  useEffect(() => {
    const sessionToken = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_token')
    const sessionExpiry = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_expiry')
    
    if (sessionToken && sessionExpiry && Date.now() < parseInt(sessionExpiry)) {
      setIsAdmin(true)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAdminLogin = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    setPasswordLoading(true)
    setPasswordError('')

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/admin/verify', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ password: adminPassword })
      })

      const data = await res.json()

      if (data.success) {
        const expiry = Date.now() + (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
        localStorage.setItem('admin_session_token', 'logged_in')
        localStorage.setItem('admin_session_expiry', expiry.toString())
        setIsAdmin(true)
        setShowAdminModal(false)
        setAdminPassword('')
        window.location.href = '/admin'
      } else {
        setPasswordError('Invalid password')
      }
    } catch (error) {
      setPasswordError('Network error. Please try again.')
    } finally {
      setPasswordLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const legalLinks = [
    { name: 'Privacy Policy', href: '/privacy' },
    { name: 'Terms & Conditions', href: '/terms' },
    { name: 'About Us', href: '/about' },
    { name: 'Contact', href: '/contact' },
  ]

  const socialLinks = [
    { 
      name: 'X', 
      href: 'https://x.com/trendlinsocial', 
      brandClass: 'x',
      icon: (props) => (
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" {...props}>
          <path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-5.214-6.817L4.99 21.75H1.68l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.713 6.231zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/>
        </svg>
      )
    },
    { 
      name: 'Facebook', 
      href: 'https://www.facebook.com/trendlinsocial', 
      brandClass: 'facebook',
      icon: (props) => (
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" {...props}>
          <path d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"/>
        </svg>
      )
    },
    { 
      name: 'Instagram', 
      href: 'https://www.instagram.com/trendlinsocial/', 
      brandClass: 'instagram',
      icon: (props) => (
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" {...props}>
          <path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zM5.838 12a6.162 6.162 0 1112.324 0 6.162 6.162 0 01-12.324 0zM12 16a4 4 0 110-8 4 4 0 010 8zm4.965-10.405a1.44 1.44 0 112.881.001 1.44 1.44 0 01-2.881-.001z"/>
        </svg>
      )
    },
  ]

  return (
    <>
      <footer className="footer">
        <div className="footer-container">
          {/* Three Column Grid */}
          <div className="footer-grid">
            {/* Column 1: About */}
            <div className="footer-about">
              <Link href="/" className="footer-logo">
                <span className="logo-text">trendlin</span>
                <span className="logo-dot">.</span>
              </Link>
              <p className="about-text">
                Curating the latest trends and insights to help you stay ahead in a fast-changing world.
              </p>
            </div>

            {/* Column 2: Legal Links */}
            <div className="footer-legal">
              <h3>Legal</h3>
              <div className="footer-links">
                {legalLinks.map((link) => (
                  <Link key={link.name} href={link.href} className="footer-link">
                    {link.name}
                  </Link>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Column 3: Social Icons */}
            <div className="footer-social-col">
              <h3>Follow Us</h3>
              <div className="footer-social">
                {socialLinks.map((social) => {
                  const Icon = social.icon
                  return (
                    <a
                      key={social.name}
                      href={social.href}
                      target="_blank"
                      rel="noopener noreferrer"
                      className={`social-link ${social.brandClass}`}
                      aria-label={social.name}
                    >
                      <Icon />
                    </a>
                  )
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Copyright with Hidden Admin Icon */}
          <div className="footer-copyright">
            <p>© {currentYear} trendlin. All rights reserved.</p>
            {/* Hidden Admin Icon - Only visible on hover */}
            <div className="admin-icon-container">
              {!isAdmin ? (
                <button 
                  onClick={() => setShowAdminModal(true)}
                  className="admin-icon"
                  title="Admin Access"
                >
                  <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5">
                    <circle cx="12" cy="8" r="4" />
                    <path d="M5 20v-2a7 7 0 0 1 14 0v2" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              ) : (
                <Link href="/admin" className="admin-icon" title="Go to Admin">
                  <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5">
                    <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" />
                    <path d="M8 7h8M8 12h6M8 17h4" />
                  </svg>
                </Link>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>

      {/* Admin Password Modal */}
      {showAdminModal && (
        <div className="modal-overlay" onClick={() => setShowAdminModal(false)}>
          <div className="modal-content" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="modal-header">
              <span className="modal-icon">🔐</span>
              <h3>Admin Access</h3>
              <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setShowAdminModal(false)}>×</button>
            </div>
            <form onSubmit={handleAdminLogin}>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <input
                  type="password"
                  placeholder="Enter admin password"
                  value={adminPassword}
                  onChange={(e) => setAdminPassword(e.target.value)}
                  autoFocus
                  className="password-input"
                  disabled={passwordLoading}
                />
                {passwordError && <div className="error-message">{passwordError}</div>}
              </div>
              <div className="modal-footer">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowAdminModal(false)} className="cancel-btn">
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button type="submit" disabled={passwordLoading} className="submit-btn">
                  {passwordLoading ? 'Verifying...' : 'Access Admin'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

========== src\components\HorizontalScroll.js ==========
import { useRef } from 'react'
import PostCard from './PostCard'

export default function HorizontalScroll({ title, posts, showRank = false }) {
  const scrollRef = useRef(null)

  const scroll = (direction) => {
    if (scrollRef.current) {
      const scrollAmount = direction === 'left' ? -400 : 400
      scrollRef.current.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' })
    }
  }

  if (!posts || posts.length === 0) {
    return null
  }

  return (
    <div className="horizontal-section">
      <div className="section-header">
        <h2 className="section-title">{title}</h2>
        {posts.length > 3 && (
          <div className="scroll-buttons">
            <button onClick={() => scroll('left')} className="scroll-btn" aria-label="Scroll left">
              ←
            </button>
            <button onClick={() => scroll('right')} className="scroll-btn" aria-label="Scroll right">
              →
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="horizontal-scroll" ref={scrollRef}>
        {posts.map((post, index) => (
          <PostCard key={post.id} post={post} rank={showRank ? index + 1 : null} />
        ))}
      </div>

      <style jsx>{`
        .horizontal-section {
          margin: 2.5rem 0;
        }
        
        .section-header {
          display: flex;
          justify-content: space-between;
          align-items: center;
          margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
        }
        
        .section-title {
          font-size: 1.5rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          border-left: 4px solid #667eea;
          padding-left: 1rem;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .section-title {
          color: #f1f5f9;
        }
        
        .scroll-buttons {
          display: flex;
          gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        
        .scroll-btn {
          width: 36px;
          height: 36px;
          border-radius: 50%;
          background: white;
          border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
          cursor: pointer;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          transition: all 0.2s;
          font-size: 1rem;
        }
        
        .scroll-btn:hover {
          background: #667eea;
          border-color: #667eea;
          color: white;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .scroll-btn {
          background: #1e293b;
          border-color: #334155;
          color: white;
        }
        
        .horizontal-scroll {
          display: flex;
          overflow-x: auto;
          gap: 1.25rem;
          padding: 0.5rem 0.25rem;
          scroll-behavior: smooth;
          scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
        }
        
        .horizontal-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar {
          display: none;
        }
        
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .horizontal-section {
            margin: 1.5rem 0;
          }
          
          .section-title {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
          }
          
          .scroll-buttons {
            display: none;
          }
          
          .horizontal-scroll {
            gap: 1rem;
          }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

========== src\components\Layout.js ==========
// src/components/Layout.js
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'  // ← Add this import
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'

const Layout = ({ children }) => {
  const [isDarkMode, setIsDarkMode] = useState(false)
  const router = useRouter()
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme')
    const isDark = savedTheme === 'dark' || (!savedTheme && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches)
    setIsDarkMode(isDark)
    if (isDark) {
      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark')
    }
  }, [])
  
  const toggleDarkMode = () => {
    setIsDarkMode(!isDarkMode)
    if (!isDarkMode) {
      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark')
      localStorage.setItem('theme', 'dark')
    } else {
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark')
      localStorage.setItem('theme', 'light')
    }
  }
  
  return (
    <div className={`min-h-screen ${isDarkMode ? 'dark bg-gray-900' : 'bg-gray-50'}`}>
      {/* Simple Header - No Sidebar */}
      <header className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 dark:bg-gray-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            {/* Logo */}
            <Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">T</span>
              </div>
              <span className="font-bold text-lg bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
                Trendlin
              </span>
            </Link>
            
            {/* Dark Mode Toggle */}
            <button
              onClick={toggleDarkMode}
              className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition"
            >
              {isDarkMode ? '☀️' : '🌙'}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>
      
      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
        <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
          <motion.div
            key={router.pathname}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
          >
            {children}
          </motion.div>
        </AnimatePresence>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}

export default React.memo(Layout)

========== src\components\MediaModals\AudioModal.js ==========
import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react'
import { X, Upload, Music } from 'lucide-react'
import { toast } from 'react-toastify'

const AudioModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, onUpload }) => {
  const [file, setFile] = useState(null)
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false)
  const inputRef = useRef(null)
  
  const handleFileSelect = (e) => {
    const f = e.target.files[0]
    if (!f) return
    if (!f.type.includes('audio')) {
      toast.error('Audio file required')
      return
    }
    if (f.size > 50 * 1024 * 1024) {
      toast.error('Max 50MB')
      return
    }
    setFile(f)
    toast.success(f.name)
  }
  
  const handleChangeFile = () => {
    inputRef.current?.click()
  }
  
  const handleUpload = async () => {
    if (!file) return
    setUploading(true)
    toast.loading('Uploading...')
    
    try {
      const formData = new FormData()
      formData.append('file', file)
      formData.append('upload_preset', process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET || 'ml_default')
      
      const res = await fetch(
        `https://api.cloudinary.com/v1_1/${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME || 'demo'}/upload`,
        { method: 'POST', body: formData }
      )
      const data = await res.json()
      
      if (data.secure_url) {
        toast.dismiss()
        toast.success('Uploaded!')
        onUpload(data.secure_url)
        onClose()
      }
    } catch (err) {
      toast.dismiss()
      toast.error('Upload failed')
    } finally {
      setUploading(false)
    }
  }
  
  if (!isOpen) return null
  
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
      
      <div className="relative bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        {/* Hidden file input */}
        <input 
          ref={inputRef} 
          type="file" 
          accept="audio/*" 
          onChange={handleFileSelect} 
          className="hidden" 
        />
        
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="px-5 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white border-b border-gray-100">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-black/5 flex items-center justify-center">
                <Music className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-gray-900">Add Audio</h2>
                <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400">Upload and preview</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button 
              onClick={onClose} 
              className="w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
            >
              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {/* Content */}
        <div className="p-5">
          {!file ? (
            <div
              onClick={() => inputRef.current?.click()}
              className="group relative border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8 text-center cursor-pointer hover:border-gray-400 transition-all"
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gray-50 group-hover:bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-3 transition-all">
                <Upload className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400 group-hover:text-gray-600" />
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Choose audio file</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">MP3, WAV, OGG • 50MB max</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {/* File Card */}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-white shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Music className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{file.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB</p>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={handleChangeFile}
                  className="text-xs text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors"
                >
                  Change
                </button>
              </div>
              
              {/* Audio Player */}
              <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                <audio 
                  src={URL.createObjectURL(file)} 
                  controls 
                  className="w-full [&::-webkit-media-controls-panel]:bg-white [&::-webkit-media-controls-current-time-display]:text-xs [&::-webkit-media-controls-time-remaining-display]:text-xs"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        
        {/* Footer */}
        {file && (
          <div className="px-5 py-4 bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-100">
            <button
              onClick={handleUpload}
              disabled={uploading}
              className="w-full py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:opacity-50 transition-all shadow-sm"
            >
              {uploading ? (
                <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                  <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
                    <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z" />
                  </svg>
                  Uploading...
                </span>
              ) : (
                'Upload Audio'
              )}
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default AudioModal

========== src\components\MediaModals\EmbedModal.js ==========
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
import { 
  X, Link, Code, Play, Check, Eye, 
  Youtube, Twitter, Instagram, Video, 
  RefreshCw, Copy, ExternalLink,
  FileCode, Globe, Smartphone, Monitor,
  Sparkles, ChevronDown, ChevronUp,
  AlertCircle, CheckCircle
} from 'lucide-react'
import { toast } from 'react-toastify'

const EmbedModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, onUpload }) => {
  // State
  const [embedUrl, setEmbedUrl] = useState('')
  const [embedCode, setEmbedCode] = useState('')
  const [embedType, setEmbedType] = useState('url')
  const [width, setWidth] = useState('560')
  const [height, setHeight] = useState('315')
  const [autoplay, setAutoplay] = useState(false)
  const [showPreview, setShowPreview] = useState(false)
  const [showAdvanced, setShowAdvanced] = useState(false)
  const [detectedPlatform, setDetectedPlatform] = useState(null)
  const [embedInfo, setEmbedInfo] = useState(null)
  const [recentEmbeds, setRecentEmbeds] = useState([])
  const [isValidating, setIsValidating] = useState(false)
  const [validationError, setValidationError] = useState(null)
  
  // Refs for focus management
  const urlInputRef = useRef(null)
  const codeTextareaRef = useRef(null)
  const modalRef = useRef(null)
  
  // Load recent embeds from localStorage
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem('recentEmbeds')
      if (saved) {
        try {
          setRecentEmbeds(JSON.parse(saved))
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Failed to load recent embeds')
        }
      }
      // Focus on first input when modal opens
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (embedType === 'url' && urlInputRef.current) {
          urlInputRef.current.focus()
        } else if (embedType === 'code' && codeTextareaRef.current) {
          codeTextareaRef.current.focus()
        }
      }, 100)
    }
  }, [isOpen, embedType])
  
  // Save recent embeds to localStorage
  const saveRecentEmbed = (embed) => {
    const updated = [embed, ...recentEmbeds.filter(e => e.id !== embed.id).slice(0, 4)]
    setRecentEmbeds(updated)
    localStorage.setItem('recentEmbeds', JSON.stringify(updated))
  }
  
  // Validate and detect platform from URL
  useEffect(() => {
    if (embedUrl && embedType === 'url') {
      validateAndDetectPlatform()
    } else {
      setDetectedPlatform(null)
      setEmbedInfo(null)
      setValidationError(null)
    }
  }, [embedUrl])
  
  const validateAndDetectPlatform = async () => {
    setIsValidating(true)
    setValidationError(null)
    
    let platform = null
    let info = { title: '', thumbnail: '', author: '', embedUrl: '' }
    
    // YouTube
    if (embedUrl.includes('youtube.com/watch?v=') || embedUrl.includes('youtu.be/')) {
      let videoId = ''
      if (embedUrl.includes('youtube.com/watch?v=')) {
        videoId = embedUrl.split('v=')[1]?.split('&')[0]
      } else if (embedUrl.includes('youtu.be/')) {
        videoId = embedUrl.split('youtu.be/')[1]?.split('?')[0]
      }
      if (videoId) {
        platform = 'youtube'
        info.title = 'YouTube Video'
        info.thumbnail = `https://img.youtube.com/vi/${videoId}/0.jpg`
        info.author = 'YouTube'
        info.embedUrl = `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${videoId}`
        info.videoId = videoId
      }
    }
    // Vimeo
    else if (embedUrl.includes('vimeo.com/')) {
      const videoId = embedUrl.split('vimeo.com/')[1]?.split('?')[0]
      if (videoId && /^\d+$/.test(videoId)) {
        platform = 'vimeo'
        info.title = 'Vimeo Video'
        info.author = 'Vimeo'
        info.embedUrl = `https://player.vimeo.com/video/${videoId}`
        info.videoId = videoId
      }
    }
    // Twitter
    else if (embedUrl.includes('twitter.com/') && (embedUrl.includes('/status/') || embedUrl.includes('/tweet/'))) {
      platform = 'twitter'
      info.title = 'Tweet'
      info.author = 'Twitter'
      info.embedUrl = embedUrl
    }
    // Instagram
    else if (embedUrl.includes('instagram.com/p/') || embedUrl.includes('instagram.com/reel/')) {
      platform = 'instagram'
      info.title = 'Instagram Post'
      info.author = 'Instagram'
      info.embedUrl = embedUrl
    }
    // Spotify
    else if (embedUrl.includes('spotify.com/track/')) {
      const trackId = embedUrl.split('/track/')[1]?.split('?')[0]
      if (trackId) {
        platform = 'spotify'
        info.title = 'Spotify Track'
        info.author = 'Spotify'
        info.embedUrl = `https://open.spotify.com/embed/track/${trackId}`
      }
    }
    // SoundCloud
    else if (embedUrl.includes('soundcloud.com/')) {
      platform = 'soundcloud'
      info.title = 'SoundCloud Track'
      info.author = 'SoundCloud'
      info.embedUrl = embedUrl
    }
    // Valid URL but unknown platform
    else if (embedUrl.match(/^https?:\/\/.+\..+/)) {
      platform = 'generic'
      info.title = 'External Content'
      info.author = 'Website'
      info.embedUrl = embedUrl
    }
    // Invalid URL
    else if (embedUrl.length > 0) {
      setValidationError('Please enter a valid URL')
    }
    
    setDetectedPlatform(platform)
    setEmbedInfo(info)
    setIsValidating(false)
  }
  
  const getEmbedHtml = () => {
    if (embedType === 'code') {
      return embedCode
    }
    
    if (!embedUrl || validationError) return ''
    
    const responsive = width === '100%'
    
    // YouTube
    if (detectedPlatform === 'youtube' && embedInfo?.videoId) {
      const embedSrc = `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${embedInfo.videoId}${autoplay ? '?autoplay=1' : ''}`
      if (responsive) {
        return `<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px;">
          <iframe style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" 
            src="${embedSrc}" 
            frameborder="0" 
            allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" 
            allowfullscreen>
          </iframe>
        </div>`
      }
      return `<iframe width="${width}" height="${height}" src="${embedSrc}" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen style="border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>`
    }
    
    // Vimeo
    if (detectedPlatform === 'vimeo' && embedInfo?.videoId) {
      const embedSrc = `https://player.vimeo.com/video/${embedInfo.videoId}${autoplay ? '?autoplay=1' : ''}`
      if (responsive) {
        return `<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px;">
          <iframe style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="${embedSrc}" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
        </div>`
      }
      return `<iframe width="${width}" height="${height}" src="${embedSrc}" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen style="border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>`
    }
    
    // Twitter
    if (detectedPlatform === 'twitter') {
      return `<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" data-dnt="true" data-theme="light">
        <a href="${embedUrl}"></a>
      </blockquote>
      <script async src="https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js" charset="utf-8"></script>`
    }
    
    // Instagram
    if (detectedPlatform === 'instagram') {
      return `<blockquote class="instagram-media" data-instgrm-permalink="${embedUrl}" data-instgrm-version="14" style="background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; margin: 0; padding: 0;">
      </blockquote>
      <script async src="//www.instagram.com/embed.js"></script>`
    }
    
    // Spotify
    if (detectedPlatform === 'spotify') {
      return `<iframe src="${embedInfo?.embedUrl}" width="${width}" height="80" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen style="border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>`
    }
    
    // SoundCloud
    if (detectedPlatform === 'soundcloud') {
      return `<iframe width="${width}" height="166" scrolling="no" frameborder="no" src="https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=${encodeURIComponent(embedUrl)}&auto_play=${autoplay}" style="border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>`
    }
    
    // Generic embed
    if (detectedPlatform === 'generic') {
      if (responsive) {
        return `<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px;">
          <iframe style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;" src="${embedUrl}" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
        </div>`
      }
      return `<iframe src="${embedUrl}" width="${width}" height="${height}" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen style="border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>`
    }
    
    return ''
  }
  
  const handleEmbed = () => {
    if (embedType === 'url' && !embedUrl) {
      toast.error('Please enter a URL')
      return
    }
    if (embedType === 'code' && !embedCode) {
      toast.error('Please enter embed code')
      return
    }
    if (embedType === 'url' && validationError) {
      toast.error(validationError)
      return
    }
    
    const embedHtml = getEmbedHtml()
    if (!embedHtml) {
      toast.error('Unable to generate embed code. Please check your input.')
      return
    }
    
    const recentEmbed = {
      id: Date.now(),
      type: embedType,
      url: embedUrl,
      code: embedCode,
      platform: detectedPlatform,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    }
    saveRecentEmbed(recentEmbed)
    
    onUpload(embedHtml)
    toast.success(`✓ ${detectedPlatform ? detectedPlatform.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + detectedPlatform.slice(1) : 'Content'} embedded successfully!`)
    
    handleReset()
    onClose()
  }
  
  const copyToClipboard = async () => {
    const embedHtml = getEmbedHtml()
    if (!embedHtml) {
      toast.error('Nothing to copy')
      return
    }
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(embedHtml)
    toast.success('Embed code copied to clipboard!')
  }
  
  const handleReset = () => {
    setEmbedUrl('')
    setEmbedCode('')
    setWidth('560')
    setHeight('315')
    setAutoplay(false)
    setShowPreview(false)
    setShowAdvanced(false)
    setDetectedPlatform(null)
    setEmbedInfo(null)
    setValidationError(null)
  }
  
  const applyRecentEmbed = (recent) => {
    if (recent.type === 'url') {
      setEmbedUrl(recent.url)
      setEmbedType('url')
      setEmbedCode('')
    } else {
      setEmbedCode(recent.code)
      setEmbedType('code')
      setEmbedUrl('')
    }
    setShowPreview(true)
  }
  
  const getPlatformColor = () => {
    switch(detectedPlatform) {
      case 'youtube': return 'text-red-500'
      case 'twitter': return 'text-blue-500'
      case 'instagram': return 'text-pink-500'
      case 'vimeo': return 'text-blue-500'
      case 'spotify': return 'text-green-500'
      case 'soundcloud': return 'text-orange-500'
      default: return 'text-gray-500'
    }
  }
  
  const getPlatformIcon = () => {
    const iconClass = `w-5 h-5 ${getPlatformColor()}`
    switch(detectedPlatform) {
      case 'youtube': return <Youtube className={iconClass} />
      case 'twitter': return <Twitter className={iconClass} />
      case 'instagram': return <Instagram className={iconClass} />
      case 'vimeo': return <Video className={iconClass} />
      case 'spotify': return <Music className={iconClass} />
      default: return <Globe className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
    }
  }
  
  // Handle escape key
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleEscape = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && isOpen) {
        onClose()
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleEscape)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleEscape)
  }, [isOpen, onClose])
  
  if (!isOpen) return null
  
  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      {isOpen && (
        <div 
          className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm p-4"
          onClick={onClose}
          role="dialog"
          aria-modal="true"
          aria-labelledby="embed-modal-title"
        >
          <motion.div
            ref={modalRef}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: 20 }}
            transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 300 }}
            className="bg-white rounded-2xl w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl flex flex-col"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            {/* Header - Fixed */}
            <div className="flex-shrink-0 px-6 py-5 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <h2 id="embed-modal-title" className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Embed Content</h2>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Embed videos, social posts, and more</p>
                </div>
                <button 
                  onClick={onClose} 
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-all"
                  aria-label="Close modal"
                >
                  <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Scrollable Content Area */}
            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
              
              {/* Recent Embeds */}
              {recentEmbeds.length > 0 && (
                <div className="px-6 pt-4">
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">RECENTLY USED</p>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
                    {recentEmbeds.map((recent) => (
                      <button
                        key={recent.id}
                        onClick={() => applyRecentEmbed(recent)}
                        className="flex-shrink-0 px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-xs text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all"
                      >
                        {recent.platform ? recent.platform.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + recent.platform.slice(1) : (recent.type === 'url' ? 'Link' : 'Code')}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
              
              {/* Tabs */}
              <div className="flex gap-2 p-4 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50">
                <button
                  onClick={() => { setEmbedType('url'); setShowPreview(false); setValidationError(null); }}
                  className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                    embedType === 'url' ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-md' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100'
                  }`}
                  aria-pressed={embedType === 'url'}
                >
                  <Link className="w-4 h-4" />
                  <span>URL</span>
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => { setEmbedType('code'); setShowPreview(false); setValidationError(null); }}
                  className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                    embedType === 'code' ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-md' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100'
                  }`}
                  aria-pressed={embedType === 'code'}
                >
                  <Code className="w-4 h-4" />
                  <span>Embed Code</span>
                </button>
              </div>
              
              {/* Content */}
              <div className="p-6 space-y-5">
                
                {/* URL Input Section */}
                {embedType === 'url' && (
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">ENTER URL</label>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <input
                          ref={urlInputRef}
                          type="url"
                          value={embedUrl}
                          onChange={(e) => setEmbedUrl(e.target.value)}
                          placeholder="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=... or https://twitter.com/..."
                          className={`w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border rounded-xl text-gray-900 text-sm placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all ${
                            validationError ? 'border-red-300 focus:ring-red-200' : 'border-gray-200 focus:border-gray-400 focus:ring-gray-200'
                          }`}
                          aria-invalid={!!validationError}
                          aria-describedby={validationError ? "url-error" : undefined}
                        />
                        {isValidating && (
                          <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
                            <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-gray-400 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
                          </div>
                        )}
                        {detectedPlatform && !isValidating && (
                          <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
                            {getPlatformIcon()}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                      {validationError && (
                        <p id="url-error" className="text-xs text-red-500 mt-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                          <AlertCircle className="w-3 h-3" />
                          {validationError}
                        </p>
                      )}
                      {detectedPlatform && !validationError && (
                        <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                          <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3" />
                          {detectedPlatform.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + detectedPlatform.slice(1)} detected
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    
                    {/* Platform Info */}
                    {detectedPlatform && embedInfo && !validationError && (
                      <motion.div
                        initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
                        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                        className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-100"
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          {getPlatformIcon()}
                          <div className="flex-1">
                            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{embedInfo.title}</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{embedInfo.author}</p>
                          </div>
                          {embedInfo.thumbnail && (
                            <img src={embedInfo.thumbnail} alt="" className="w-12 h-9 rounded object-cover" />
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </motion.div>
                    )}
                    
                    {/* Advanced Options */}
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setShowAdvanced(!showAdvanced)}
                      className="flex items-center justify-between w-full py-2 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900"
                      aria-expanded={showAdvanced}
                    >
                      <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                        Advanced Options
                      </span>
                      {showAdvanced ? <ChevronUp className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />}
                    </button>
                    
                    {showAdvanced && (
                      <motion.div
                        initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }}
                        animate={{ opacity: 1, height: 'auto' }}
                        className="space-y-4 pt-2"
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                          <label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">SIZE OPTIONS</label>
                          <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <button
                              onClick={() => { setWidth('100%'); setHeight('auto'); }}
                              className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs transition-all ${width === '100%' ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'}`}
                            >
                              <Monitor className="w-3 h-3 inline mr-1" />
                              Responsive
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => { setWidth('560'); setHeight('315'); }}
                              className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs transition-all ${width !== '100%' ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'}`}
                            >
                              <Smartphone className="w-3 h-3 inline mr-1" />
                              Fixed
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        {width !== '100%' && (
                          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <div>
                              <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Width (px)</label>
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={width}
                                onChange={(e) => setWidth(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-gray-900 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200"
                              />
                            </div>
                            <div>
                              <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Height (px)</label>
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={height}
                                onChange={(e) => setHeight(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-gray-900 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200"
                              />
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        )}
                        
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer py-2">
                          <div className="relative">
                            <input
                              type="checkbox"
                              checked={autoplay}
                              onChange={(e) => setAutoplay(e.target.checked)}
                              className="sr-only peer"
                            />
                            <div className="w-10 h-5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full peer-checked:bg-gray-800 transition-all"></div>
                            <div className="absolute left-0.5 top-0.5 w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full transition-all peer-checked:translate-x-5"></div>
                          </div>
                          <Play className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Autoplay (if supported)</span>
                        </label>
                      </motion.div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {/* Embed Code Section */}
                {embedType === 'code' && (
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">EMBED CODE</label>
                    <textarea
                      ref={codeTextareaRef}
                      value={embedCode}
                      onChange={(e) => setEmbedCode(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="<iframe src='https://www.youtube.com/embed/...'></iframe>"
                      rows={6}
                      className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-gray-900 text-sm font-mono placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200 transition-all resize-none"
                    />
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
                      Paste any iframe, script, or embed code from any platform
                    </p>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {/* Preview Section */}
                {(embedUrl || embedCode) && !validationError && (
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">PREVIEW</label>
                      <div className="flex gap-3">
                        <button
                          onClick={() => setShowPreview(!showPreview)}
