          margin: 0 auto;
          padding: 4rem 1.5rem 6rem;
        }
        
        .hero {
          margin-bottom: 3rem;
        }
        
        h1 {
          font-size: 2.5rem;
          font-weight: 500;
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
          color: #111827;
          letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) h1 {
          color: #ffffff;
        }
        
        .hero-line {
          width: 40px;
          height: 2px;
          background: #111827;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .hero-line {
          background: #ffffff;
        }
        
        .content {
          color: #4b5563;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .content {
          color: #9ca3af;
        }
        
        .lead {
          font-size: 1.2rem;
          line-height: 1.5;
          margin-bottom: 3rem;
          color: #111827;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .lead {
          color: #e5e7eb;
        }
        
        .grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
          gap: 2rem;
          margin-bottom: 3rem;
        }
        
        .grid-item h3 {
          font-size: 0.85rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 1px;
          margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
          color: #6b7280;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .grid-item h3 {
          color: #9ca3af;
        }
        
        .grid-item p {
          font-size: 0.95rem;
          line-height: 1.6;
          margin: 0;
        }
        
        .mission {
          padding: 2rem 0;
          margin-bottom: 2rem;
          border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
          border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .mission {
          border-color: #1f2937;
        }
        
        .mission p {
          font-size: 1rem;
          line-height: 1.6;
          margin: 0;
          color: #111827;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .mission p {
          color: #e5e7eb;
        }
        
        .contact {
          text-align: center;
          padding-top: 1rem;
        }
        
        .contact p {
          font-size: 0.85rem;
          margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
          color: #6b7280;
        }
        
        .contact-link {
          display: inline-block;
          font-size: 1rem;
          color: #111827;
          text-decoration: none;
          font-weight: 500;
          padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
          border: 1px solid #111827;
          transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .contact-link {
          color: #ffffff;
          border-color: #ffffff;
        }
        
        .contact-link:hover {
          background: #111827;
          color: white;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .contact-link:hover {
          background: #ffffff;
          color: #111827;
        }
        
        /* Tablet */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .container {
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem 5rem;
          }
          
          h1 {
            font-size: 2.2rem;
          }
          
          .lead {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
          }
        }
        
        /* Mobile */
        @media (max-width: 640px) {
          .container {
            padding: 2rem 1rem 4rem;
          }
          
          h1 {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
          }
          
          .lead {
            font-size: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
          }
          
          .grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
          }
          
          .grid-item p {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
          }
          
          .mission {
            padding: 1.5rem 0;
          }
          
          .mission p {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
          }
          
          .contact-link {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
          }
        }
      `}</style>
    </Layout>
  )
}

========== src\pages\admin\ads.js ==========
// pages/admin/ad-manager.js - MOBILE-FIRST CALENDAR FIX
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation'
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  PointElement,
  LineElement,
  BarElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
  Filler,
  ArcElement
} from 'chart.js'
import { Line, Bar, Doughnut } from 'react-chartjs-2'

ChartJS.register(
  CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, BarElement,
  Title, Tooltip, Legend, Filler, ArcElement
)

export default function AdManager() {
  const router = useRouter()
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false)
  const [showExportModal, setShowExportModal] = useState(false)
  const [slots, setSlots] = useState([])
  const [codes, setCodes] = useState([])
  const [revenueData, setRevenueData] = useState([])
  const [showSlotModal, setShowSlotModal] = useState(false)
  const [showCodeModal, setShowCodeModal] = useState(false)
  const [editingSlot, setEditingSlot] = useState(null)
  const [editingCode, setEditingCode] = useState(null)
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState('30days')
  const [customStartDate, setCustomStartDate] = useState('')
  const [customEndDate, setCustomEndDate] = useState('')
  const [showCustomPicker, setShowCustomPicker] = useState(false)
  const [showLocationDropdown, setShowLocationDropdown] = useState(false)
  const [showDimensionsDropdown, setShowDimensionsDropdown] = useState(false)
  const [showAbGroupDropdown, setShowAbGroupDropdown] = useState(false)
  
  // Calendar state
  const [calendarMonth, setCalendarMonth] = useState(new Date())
  const [tempStartDate, setTempStartDate] = useState(null)
  const [tempEndDate, setTempEndDate] = useState(null)
  const [selectingEnd, setSelectingEnd] = useState(false)
  
  // Export options
  const [exportOptions, setExportOptions] = useState({
    revenueData: true,
    slotsData: true,
    codesData: true,
    chartData: true
  })
  
  const locationDropdownRef = useRef(null)
  const dimensionsDropdownRef = useRef(null)
  const abGroupDropdownRef = useRef(null)
  const calendarRef = useRef(null)
  
  const [slotForm, setSlotForm] = useState({
    name: '',
    description: '',
    location: 'sidebar',
    dimensions: '300x250',
    width: 300,
    height: 250,
    priority: 0,
    weight: 1,
    is_active: true
  })
  
  const [codeForm, setCodeForm] = useState({
    name: '',
    description: '',
    code: '',
    is_active: true,
    is_ab_test: false,
    ab_group: 'A',
    ab_percentage: 50
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    checkAuth()
    loadData()
  }, [dateRange, customStartDate, customEndDate])

  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event) {
      if (locationDropdownRef.current && !locationDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowLocationDropdown(false)
      }
      if (dimensionsDropdownRef.current && !dimensionsDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowDimensionsDropdown(false)
      }
      if (abGroupDropdownRef.current && !abGroupDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowAbGroupDropdown(false)
      }
      if (calendarRef.current && !calendarRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowCustomPicker(false)
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
  }, [])

  const checkAuth = async () => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_token')
    if (!token) {
      router.push('/admin/login')
      return
    }
  }

  const getDateFilter = () => {
    const now = new Date()
    let startDate = new Date()
    
    if (dateRange === 'custom' && customStartDate && customEndDate) {
      return { start: customStartDate, end: customEndDate }
    }
    
    if (dateRange === '7days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 7)
    else if (dateRange === '30days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 30)
    else if (dateRange === '90days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 90)
    else if (dateRange === 'all') startDate = new Date('2000-01-01')
    else startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 30)
    
    return { 
      start: startDate.toISOString().split('T')[0], 
      end: now.toISOString().split('T')[0] 
    }
  }

  const loadData = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    await Promise.all([
      loadSlots(),
      loadCodes(),
      loadRevenueData()
    ])
    setLoading(false)
  }

  const loadSlots = async () => {
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('ad_slots')
      .select('*')
      .order('priority', { ascending: false })
    setSlots(data || [])
  }

  const loadCodes = async () => {
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('ad_codes')
      .select('*')
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    setCodes(data || [])
  }

  const loadRevenueData = async () => {
    const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
    
    let query = supabase
      .from('ad_revenue')
      .select('*')
      .order('revenue_date', { ascending: true })
    
    if (dateRange !== 'all') {
      query = query.gte('revenue_date', start).lte('revenue_date', end)
    }
    
    const { data } = await query
    setRevenueData(data || [])
  }

  const saveSlot = async () => {
    if (!slotForm.name.trim()) {
      alert('Slot name is required')
      return
    }

    const slug = slotForm.name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
    const data = { ...slotForm, slug }
    
    let error
    if (editingSlot) {
      const result = await supabase
        .from('ad_slots')
        .update(data)
        .eq('id', editingSlot.id)
      error = result.error
    } else {
      const result = await supabase
        .from('ad_slots')
        .insert([data])
      error = result.error
    }
    
    if (error) {
      alert('Error: ' + error.message)
    } else {
      setShowSlotModal(false)
      setEditingSlot(null)
      resetSlotForm()
      loadSlots()
    }
  }

  const saveCode = async () => {
    if (!codeForm.name.trim()) {
      alert('Code name is required')
      return
    }
    
    if (!codeForm.code.trim()) {
      alert('Ad code is required')
      return
    }

    let error
    if (editingCode) {
      const result = await supabase
        .from('ad_codes')
        .update(codeForm)
        .eq('id', editingCode.id)
      error = result.error
    } else {
      const result = await supabase
        .from('ad_codes')
        .insert([codeForm])
      error = result.error
    }
    
    if (error) {
      alert('Error: ' + error.message)
    } else {
      setShowCodeModal(false)
      setEditingCode(null)
      resetCodeForm()
      loadCodes()
    }
  }

  const toggleSlot = async (slot) => {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('ad_slots')
      .update({ is_active: !slot.is_active })
      .eq('id', slot.id)
    if (!error) loadSlots()
  }

  const toggleCode = async (code) => {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('ad_codes')
      .update({ is_active: !code.is_active })
      .eq('id', code.id)
    if (!error) loadCodes()
  }

  const deleteSlot = async (id) => {
    if (!confirm('Delete this ad slot?')) return
    const { error } = await supabase.from('ad_slots').delete().eq('id', id)
    if (!error) loadSlots()
  }

  const deleteCode = async (id) => {
    if (!confirm('Delete this ad code?')) return
    const { error } = await supabase.from('ad_codes').delete().eq('id', id)
    if (!error) loadCodes()
  }

  const resetSlotForm = () => {
    setSlotForm({
      name: '',
      description: '',
      location: 'sidebar',
      dimensions: '300x250',
      width: 300,
      height: 250,
      priority: 0,
      weight: 1,
      is_active: true
    })
  }

  const resetCodeForm = () => {
    setCodeForm({
      name: '',
      description: '',
      code: '',
      is_active: true,
      is_ab_test: false,
      ab_group: 'A',
      ab_percentage: 50
    })
  }

  // Calendar functions
  const getDaysInMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate()
  }

  const getFirstDayOfMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month, 1).getDay()
  }

  const changeMonth = (delta) => {
    setCalendarMonth(new Date(calendarMonth.getFullYear(), calendarMonth.getMonth() + delta, 1))
  }

  const isDateInRange = (date) => {
    if (!tempStartDate) return false
    if (!tempEndDate) return date.toDateString() === tempStartDate.toDateString()
    return date >= tempStartDate && date <= tempEndDate
  }

  const isStartDate = (date) => {
    return tempStartDate && date.toDateString() === tempStartDate.toDateString()
  }

  const isEndDate = (date) => {
    return tempEndDate && date.toDateString() === tempEndDate.toDateString()
  }

  const handleDateClick = (date) => {
    if (!selectingEnd || !tempStartDate) {
      setTempStartDate(date)
      setTempEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(true)
    } else {
      if (date < tempStartDate) {
        setTempStartDate(date)
        setTempEndDate(null)
      } else {
        setTempEndDate(date)
        setSelectingEnd(false)
      }
    }
  }

  const applyCustomRange = () => {
    if (tempStartDate && tempEndDate) {
      const startStr = tempStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      const endStr = tempEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      setCustomStartDate(startStr)
      setCustomEndDate(endStr)
      setDateRange('custom')
      setShowCustomPicker(false)
      setTempStartDate(null)
      setTempEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(false)
    }
  }

  const resetCustomRange = () => {
    setTempStartDate(null)
    setTempEndDate(null)
    setSelectingEnd(false)
  }

  const renderCalendar = () => {
    const year = calendarMonth.getFullYear()
    const month = calendarMonth.getMonth()
    const daysInMonth = getDaysInMonth(year, month)
    const firstDay = getFirstDayOfMonth(year, month)
    const today = new Date()
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    
    const calendarDays = []
    const weekdays = ['Su', 'Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa']
    
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
      calendarDays.push(null)
    }
    
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const date = new Date(year, month, d)
      date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
      const isToday = date.toDateString() === today.toDateString()
      const inRange = isDateInRange(date)
      const isStart = isStartDate(date)
      const isEnd = isEndDate(date)
      
      calendarDays.push({ date, day: d, isToday, inRange, isStart, isEnd })
    }
    
    return { weekdays, calendarDays }
  }

  const { weekdays, calendarDays } = renderCalendar()

  const exportToCSV = async () => {
    setExporting(true)
    try {
      const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
      
      const allRows = []
      allRows.push([`"Export generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}"`])
      allRows.push([`"Date range: ${start} to ${end}"`])
      allRows.push([])
      
      if (exportOptions.revenueData && revenueData.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== AD REVENUE DATA ==='])
        allRows.push(['Date', 'Slot ID', 'Code ID', 'Impressions', 'Clicks', 'Revenue'])
        revenueData.forEach(row => {
          allRows.push([
            row.revenue_date,
            row.slot_id || '',
            row.code_id || '',
            row.impressions || 0,
            row.clicks || 0,
            row.revenue || 0
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (exportOptions.slotsData && slots.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== AD SLOTS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Name', 'Location', 'Dimensions', 'Priority', 'Weight', 'Active', 'Description'])
        slots.forEach(slot => {
          allRows.push([
            `"${slot.name}"`,
            slot.location,
            slot.dimensions || `${slot.width}x${slot.height}`,
            slot.priority,
            slot.weight,
            slot.is_active ? 'Yes' : 'No',
            `"${slot.description || ''}"`
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (exportOptions.codesData && codes.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== AD CODES ==='])
        allRows.push(['Name', 'Description', 'Active', 'A/B Test', 'Group', 'Percentage', 'Code Preview'])
        codes.forEach(code => {
          allRows.push([
            `"${code.name}"`,
            `"${code.description || ''}"`,
            code.is_active ? 'Yes' : 'No',
            code.is_ab_test ? 'Yes' : 'No',
            code.ab_group || '',
            code.ab_percentage || 0,
            `"${code.code.substring(0, 100).replace(/"/g, '""')}..."`
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (exportOptions.chartData && revenueData.length > 0) {
        const dates = [...new Set(revenueData.map(r => r.revenue_date))].sort()
        const dailySummary = dates.map(date => {
          const dayData = revenueData.filter(r => r.revenue_date === date)
          return {
            date,
            impressions: dayData.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.impressions || 0), 0),
            clicks: dayData.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.clicks || 0), 0),
            revenue: dayData.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.revenue || 0), 0)
          }
        })
        
        allRows.push(['=== CHART DATA SUMMARY ==='])
        allRows.push(['Date', 'Impressions', 'Clicks', 'Revenue'])
        dailySummary.forEach(day => {
          allRows.push([
            day.date,
            day.impressions,
            day.clicks,
            day.revenue.toFixed(4)
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (allRows.length <= 3) {
        alert('No data to export for selected options')
        setExporting(false)
        return
      }
      
      const csvContent = allRows.map(row => row.join(',')).join('\n')
      const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' })
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      const link = document.createElement('a')
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute('download', `ad-analytics-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      document.body.removeChild(link)
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
    } catch (error) {
      alert('Export failed: ' + error.message)
    } finally {
      setExporting(false)
      setShowExportModal(false)
    }
  }

  // Calculate totals from filtered data
  const totalImpressions = revenueData.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.impressions || 0), 0)
  const totalClicks = revenueData.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.clicks || 0), 0)
  const totalRevenue = revenueData.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.revenue || 0), 0)
  const avgCTR = totalImpressions > 0 ? (totalClicks / totalImpressions * 100).toFixed(2) : 0
  const avgCPM = totalImpressions > 0 ? (totalRevenue / totalImpressions * 1000).toFixed(2) : 0

  // Get unique dates from filtered data
  const dates = [...new Set(revenueData.map(r => r.revenue_date))].sort()
  
  const impressionsData = dates.map(date => {
    const dayData = revenueData.filter(r => r.revenue_date === date)
    return dayData.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.impressions || 0), 0)
  })
  
  const clicksData = dates.map(date => {
    const dayData = revenueData.filter(r => r.revenue_date === date)
    return dayData.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.clicks || 0), 0)
  })
  
  const revenueChartData = dates.map(date => {
    const dayData = revenueData.filter(r => r.revenue_date === date)
    return dayData.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.revenue || 0), 0)
  })

  // Format dates for display
  const chartLabels = dates.map(date => {
    const d = new Date(date)
    return `${d.getMonth() + 1}/${d.getDate()}`
  })

  // Top slots by revenue
  const slotPerformance = slots.map(slot => {
    const slotRevenue = revenueData
      .filter(r => r.slot_id === slot.id)
      .reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.revenue || 0), 0)
    return { ...slot, revenue: slotRevenue }
  }).sort((a, b) => b.revenue - a.revenue).slice(0, 5)

  // Top codes by CTR
  const codePerformance = codes.map(code => {
    const codeImpressions = revenueData
      .filter(r => r.code_id === code.id)
      .reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.impressions || 0), 0)
    const codeClicks = revenueData
      .filter(r => r.code_id === code.id)
      .reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.clicks || 0), 0)
    const codeRevenue = revenueData
      .filter(r => r.code_id === code.id)
      .reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.revenue || 0), 0)
    return { 
      ...code, 
      impressions: codeImpressions,
      clicks: codeClicks,
      revenue: codeRevenue,
      ctr: codeImpressions > 0 ? (codeClicks / codeImpressions * 100).toFixed(2) : 0
    }
  }).sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.ctr) - parseFloat(a.ctr)).slice(0, 5)

  const locationOptions = [
    { value: 'header', label: 'Header', icon: '📌' },
    { value: 'sidebar', label: 'Sidebar', icon: '📁' },
    { value: 'in_content', label: 'In Content', icon: '📝' },
    { value: 'between_posts', label: 'Between Posts', icon: '📋' },
    { value: 'footer', label: 'Footer', icon: '🔻' },
    { value: 'popup', label: 'Popup', icon: '💬' }
  ]

  const dimensionOptions = [
    { value: '300x250', label: '300x250 (Medium Rectangle)' },
    { value: '728x90', label: '728x90 (Leaderboard)' },
    { value: '320x100', label: '320x100 (Large Mobile Banner)' },
    { value: '160x600', label: '160x600 (Wide Skyscraper)' },
    { value: '300x600', label: '300x600 (Half Page)' },
    { value: '970x90', label: '970x90 (Super Leaderboard)' },
    { value: '320x50', label: '320x50 (Mobile Banner)' },
    { value: '468x60', label: '468x60 (Full Banner)' }
  ]

  const abGroupOptions = [
    { value: 'A', label: 'Group A' },
    { value: 'B', label: 'Group B' },
    { value: 'C', label: 'Group C' }
  ]

  const chartOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 11 } } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#1e293b', titleColor: '#f1f5f9', bodyColor: '#94a3b8' }
    },
    scales: {
      y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: '#e2e8f0' }, ticks: { color: '#64748b' } },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#64748b', maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45 } }
    }
  }

  const dualAxisOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 11 } } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#1e293b', titleColor: '#f1f5f9', bodyColor: '#94a3b8' }
    },
    scales: {
      y: { 
        beginAtZero: true, 
        grid: { color: '#e2e8f0' }, 
        ticks: { color: '#64748b' }, 
        title: { display: true, text: 'Impressions', color: '#64748b' }
      },
      y1: { 
        beginAtZero: true, 
        position: 'right', 
        grid: { display: false }, 
        ticks: { color: '#10b981' }, 
        title: { display: true, text: 'Revenue ($)', color: '#10b981' }
      },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#64748b' } }
    }
  }

  const impressionsChartData = {
    labels: chartLabels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Impressions',
        data: impressionsData,
        borderColor: '#6366f1',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(99,102,241,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4,
        yAxisID: 'y'
      },
      {
        label: 'Revenue ($)',
        data: revenueChartData,
        borderColor: '#10b981',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(16,185,129,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4,
        yAxisID: 'y1'
      }
    ]
  }

  const clicksChartData = {
    labels: chartLabels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Clicks',
        data: clicksData,
        borderColor: '#f59e0b',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(245,158,11,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4
      }
    ]
  }

  const slotRevenueChartData = {
    labels: slotPerformance.map(s => s.name.length > 15 ? s.name.slice(0, 15) + '...' : s.name),
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Revenue ($)',
        data: slotPerformance.map(s => s.revenue),
        backgroundColor: '#10b981',
        borderRadius: 8
      }
    ]
  }

  const codeCTRChartData = {
    labels: codePerformance.map(c => c.name.length > 15 ? c.name.slice(0, 15) + '...' : c.name),
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'CTR (%)',
        data: codePerformance.map(c => parseFloat(c.ctr)),
        backgroundColor: '#6366f1',
        borderRadius: 8
      }
    ]
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div className="loading-container">
          <div className="loading-spinner"></div>
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    )
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div className="ad-manager">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="header">
          <div>
            <h1>Ad Manager</h1>
            <p>Manage ad slots, codes, and track performance</p>
          </div>
          <div className="header-actions">
            <button className="btn-primary" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(true)} disabled={exporting}>
              {exporting ? '⏳ Exporting...' : '📥 Export CSV'}
            </button>
            <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={() => { setEditingSlot(null); resetSlotForm(); setShowSlotModal(true); }}>+ New Ad Slot</button>
            <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={() => { setEditingCode(null); resetCodeForm(); setShowCodeModal(true); }}>+ New Ad Code</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Date Range Selector */}
        <div className="date-range-container">
          <div className="range-buttons">
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '7days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('7days'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              7 days
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '30days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('30days'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              30 days
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '90days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('90days'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              90 days
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === 'all' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('all'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              All time
            </button>
            
            <div className="custom-range-wrapper" ref={calendarRef}>
              <button className={`range-btn custom-btn ${dateRange === 'custom' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(!showCustomPicker)}>
                📅 {dateRange === 'custom' && customStartDate && customEndDate 
                  ? `${new Date(customStartDate).toLocaleDateString()} - ${new Date(customEndDate).toLocaleDateString()}`
                  : 'Custom range'}
              </button>
              
              {showCustomPicker && (
                <div className="mobile-calendar-picker">
                  <div className="calendar-header">
                    <div className="calendar-title">Select date range</div>
                    <button className="calendar-close" onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(false)}>×</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-presets">
                    <button onClick={() => {
                      const end = new Date()
                      const start = new Date()
                      start.setDate(end.getDate() - 7)
                      setTempStartDate(start)
                      setTempEndDate(end)
                      setSelectingEnd(false)
                    }}>Last 7 days</button>
                    <button onClick={() => {
                      const end = new Date()
                      const start = new Date()
                      start.setDate(end.getDate() - 30)
                      setTempStartDate(start)
                      setTempEndDate(end)
                      setSelectingEnd(false)
                    }}>Last 30 days</button>
                    <button onClick={() => {
                      const end = new Date()
                      const start = new Date()
                      start.setDate(end.getDate() - 90)
                      setTempStartDate(start)
                      setTempEndDate(end)
                      setSelectingEnd(false)
                    }}>Last 90 days</button>
                    <button onClick={resetCustomRange}>Reset</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-status">
                    {selectingEnd ? 'Select end date' : tempStartDate ? 'Select end date' : 'Select start date'}
                  </div>
                  
                  {tempStartDate && (
                    <div className="calendar-selected">
                      {tempStartDate.toLocaleDateString()} {tempEndDate && `→ ${tempEndDate.toLocaleDateString()}`}
                    </div>
                  )}
                  
                  <div className="calendar-nav">
                    <button onClick={() => changeMonth(-1)}>←</button>
                    <span>{calendarMonth.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}</span>
                    <button onClick={() => changeMonth(1)}>→</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-weekdays">
                    {weekdays.map(day => <div key={day}>{day}</div>)}
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-grid">
                    {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="calendar-cell">
                        {day ? (
                          <button
                            className={`calendar-day 
                              ${day.isToday ? 'today' : ''} 
                              ${day.inRange ? 'in-range' : ''} 
                              ${day.isStart ? 'start' : ''} 
                              ${day.isEnd ? 'end' : ''}`}
                            onClick={() => handleDateClick(day.date)}
                          >
                            {day.day}
                          </button>
                        ) : (
                          <div className="calendar-empty"></div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-actions">
                    <button className="calendar-cancel" onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(false)}>Cancel</button>
                    {tempStartDate && tempEndDate && (
                      <button className="calendar-apply" onClick={applyCustomRange}>Apply</button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* KPI Cards */}
        <div className="stats-grid">
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-value">{totalImpressions.toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Total Impressions</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-value">{totalClicks.toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Total Clicks</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-value">${totalRevenue.toFixed(2)}</div><div className="stat-label">Total Revenue</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-value">{avgCTR}%</div><div className="stat-label">Avg CTR</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-value">${avgCPM}</div><div className="stat-label">Avg CPM</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-value">{slots.filter(s => s.is_active).length}</div><div className="stat-label">Active Slots</div></div>
        </div>

        {/* Graph 1 - Impressions & Revenue */}
        <div className="chart-card">
          <div className="card-header">
            <h3>📈 Impressions & Revenue Trend</h3>
            <div className="card-badge">{revenueData.length > 0 ? `${dates.length} days` : 'No data'}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="chart-container">
            {revenueData.length > 0 ? (
              <Line data={impressionsChartData} options={dualAxisOptions} />
            ) : (
              <div className="chart-empty-state">No data for selected period. Try a different date range.</div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Graph 2 - Clicks Trend */}
        <div className="chart-card">
          <div className="card-header">
            <h3>👆 Clicks Trend</h3>
            <div className="card-badge">{revenueData.length > 0 ? `${dates.length} days` : 'No data'}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="chart-container">
            {revenueData.length > 0 ? (
              <Line data={clicksChartData} options={chartOptions} />
            ) : (
              <div className="chart-empty-state">No data for selected period. Try a different date range.</div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Graph 3 - Top Performing Slots */}
        <div className="chart-card">
          <div className="card-header">
            <h3>🏆 Top Performing Ad Slots</h3>
            <div className="card-badge">By revenue</div>
          </div>
          {slotPerformance.length > 0 && slotPerformance[0].revenue > 0 ? (
            <div className="chart-container-small">
              <Bar data={slotRevenueChartData} options={{ ...chartOptions, indexAxis: 'y' }} />
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="chart-empty-state">No revenue data yet. Create ad slots and start displaying ads.</div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Graph 4 - Top Performing Codes */}
        <div className="chart-card">
          <div className="card-header">
            <h3>⭐ Top Performing Ad Codes</h3>
            <div className="card-badge">By CTR</div>
          </div>
          {codePerformance.length > 0 && codePerformance[0].ctr > 0 ? (
            <div className="chart-container-small">
              <Bar data={codeCTRChartData} options={{ ...chartOptions, indexAxis: 'y' }} />
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="chart-empty-state">No CTR data yet. Create ad codes and track performance.</div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Ad Slots Section */}
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-header">
            <h2>Ad Slots</h2>
            <span className="section-count">{slots.length} total</span>
          </div>
          <div className="slots-grid">
            {slots.map(slot => (
              <div key={slot.id} className="slot-card">
                <div className="slot-header">
                  <div className="slot-icon">{slot.location === 'header' ? '📌' : slot.location === 'sidebar' ? '📁' : slot.location === 'in_content' ? '📝' : slot.location === 'footer' ? '🔻' : '💬'}</div>
                  <div className="slot-info">
                    <div className="slot-name">{slot.name}</div>
                    <div className="slot-location">{slot.location.replace('_', ' ')} • {slot.dimensions || `${slot.width}x${slot.height}`}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className={`slot-status ${slot.is_active ? 'active' : 'inactive'}`}>{slot.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}</div>
                </div>
                {slot.description && <div className="slot-description">{slot.description}</div>}
                <div className="slot-actions">
                  <button className="action-edit" onClick={() => { setEditingSlot(slot); setSlotForm(slot); setShowSlotModal(true); }}>Edit</button>
                  <button className="action-toggle" onClick={() => toggleSlot(slot)}>{slot.is_active ? 'Disable' : 'Enable'}</button>
                  <button className="action-delete" onClick={() => deleteSlot(slot.id)}>Delete</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {slots.length === 0 && <div className="empty-state">No ad slots. Click "New Ad Slot" to create one.</div>}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Ad Codes Section */}
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-header">
            <h2>Ad Codes</h2>
            <span className="section-count">{codes.length} total</span>
          </div>
          <div className="codes-grid">
            {codes.map(code => (
              <div key={code.id} className="code-card">
                <div className="code-header">
                  <div className="code-icon">💻</div>
                  <div className="code-info">
                    <div className="code-name">{code.name}</div>
                    {code.description && <div className="code-description">{code.description}</div>}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`code-status ${code.is_active ? 'active' : 'inactive'}`}>{code.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}</div>
                </div>
                <div className="code-preview">
                  <div className="preview-label">Code preview:</div>
                  <pre className="preview-content">{code.code.substring(0, 120)}{code.code.length > 120 ? '...' : ''}</pre>
                </div>
                {code.is_ab_test && <div className="code-ab">A/B Test - Group {code.ab_group} ({code.ab_percentage}% traffic)</div>}
                <div className="code-actions">
                  <button className="action-edit" onClick={() => { setEditingCode(code); setCodeForm(code); setShowCodeModal(true); }}>Edit</button>
                  <button className="action-toggle" onClick={() => toggleCode(code)}>{code.is_active ? 'Disable' : 'Enable'}</button>
                  <button className="action-delete" onClick={() => deleteCode(code.id)}>Delete</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {codes.length === 0 && <div className="empty-state">No ad codes. Click "New Ad Code" to create one.</div>}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Slot Modal */}
        {showSlotModal && (
          <div className="modal" onClick={() => { setShowSlotModal(false); setEditingSlot(null); }}>
            <div className="modal-content" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header">
                <h3>{editingSlot ? 'Edit Ad Slot' : 'New Ad Slot'}</h3>
                <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => { setShowSlotModal(false); setEditingSlot(null); }}>×</button>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Slot Name *</label>
                  <input type="text" value={slotForm.name} onChange={e => setSlotForm({...slotForm, name: e.target.value})} placeholder="e.g., Sidebar Banner" />
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Description</label>
                  <textarea value={slotForm.description} onChange={e => setSlotForm({...slotForm, description: e.target.value})} rows={2} placeholder="Optional description" />
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Location</label>
                  <div className="premium-dropdown" ref={locationDropdownRef}>
                    <button 
                      type="button" 
                      className="dropdown-trigger"
                      onClick={() => setShowLocationDropdown(!showLocationDropdown)}
                    >
                      <span className="dropdown-icon">{locationOptions.find(o => o.value === slotForm.location)?.icon || '📌'}</span>
                      <span>{locationOptions.find(o => o.value === slotForm.location)?.label || 'Select location'}</span>
                      <span className="dropdown-arrow">▼</span>
                    </button>
                    {showLocationDropdown && (
                      <div className="dropdown-menu">
                        {locationOptions.map(opt => (
                          <div 
                            key={opt.value} 
                            className={`dropdown-item ${slotForm.location === opt.value ? 'active' : ''}`}
                            onClick={() => {
                              setSlotForm({...slotForm, location: opt.value})
                              setShowLocationDropdown(false)
                            }}
                          >
                            <span className="dropdown-item-icon">{opt.icon}</span>
                            <span>{opt.label}</span>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Dimensions</label>
                  <div className="premium-dropdown" ref={dimensionsDropdownRef}>
                    <button 
                      type="button" 
                      className="dropdown-trigger"
                      onClick={() => setShowDimensionsDropdown(!showDimensionsDropdown)}
                    >
                      <span>{dimensionOptions.find(o => o.value === slotForm.dimensions)?.label || 'Select dimensions'}</span>
                      <span className="dropdown-arrow">▼</span>
                    </button>
                    {showDimensionsDropdown && (
                      <div className="dropdown-menu dimensions-menu">
                        {dimensionOptions.map(opt => (
                          <div 
                            key={opt.value} 
                            className={`dropdown-item ${slotForm.dimensions === opt.value ? 'active' : ''}`}
                            onClick={() => {
                              const [w, h] = opt.value.split('x')
                              setSlotForm({...slotForm, dimensions: opt.value, width: parseInt(w), height: parseInt(h)})
                              setShowDimensionsDropdown(false)
                            }}
                          >
                            {opt.label}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="form-row">
                  <div className="form-group">
                    <label>Priority (higher = more frequent)</label>
                    <input type="number" value={slotForm.priority} onChange={e => setSlotForm({...slotForm, priority: parseInt(e.target.value)})} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-group">
                    <label>Weight (1-100 for rotation)</label>
                    <input type="number" min="1" max="100" value={slotForm.weight} onChange={e => setSlotForm({...slotForm, weight: parseInt(e.target.value)})} />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <label className="checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={slotForm.is_active} onChange={e => setSlotForm({...slotForm, is_active: e.target.checked})} /> Active</label>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-footer">
                <button className="btn-cancel" onClick={() => { setShowSlotModal(false); setEditingSlot(null); }}>Cancel</button>
                <button className="btn-save" onClick={saveSlot}>{editingSlot ? 'Update' : 'Create'}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Code Modal */}
        {showCodeModal && (
          <div className="modal" onClick={() => { setShowCodeModal(false); setEditingCode(null); }}>
            <div className="modal-content modal-large" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header">
                <h3>{editingCode ? 'Edit Ad Code' : 'New Ad Code'}</h3>
                <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => { setShowCodeModal(false); setEditingCode(null); }}>×</button>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Code Name *</label>
                  <input type="text" value={codeForm.name} onChange={e => setCodeForm({...codeForm, name: e.target.value})} placeholder="e.g., Google AdSense - Sidebar" />
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Description</label>
                  <textarea value={codeForm.description} onChange={e => setCodeForm({...codeForm, description: e.target.value})} rows={2} placeholder="Optional description" />
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Ad Code (HTML/JavaScript) *</label>
                  <textarea value={codeForm.code} onChange={e => setCodeForm({...codeForm, code: e.target.value})} rows={6} className="code-textarea" placeholder="&lt;script&gt;...&lt;/script&gt; or &lt;ins&gt;...&lt;/ins&gt;" />
                </div>
                <label className="checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={codeForm.is_ab_test} onChange={e => setCodeForm({...codeForm, is_ab_test: e.target.checked})} /> Enable A/B Testing</label>
                {codeForm.is_ab_test && (
                  <div className="form-row">
                    <div className="form-group">
                      <label>A/B Group</label>
                      <div className="premium-dropdown" ref={abGroupDropdownRef}>
                        <button 
                          type="button" 
                          className="dropdown-trigger"
                          onClick={() => setShowAbGroupDropdown(!showAbGroupDropdown)}
                        >
                          <span>{abGroupOptions.find(o => o.value === codeForm.ab_group)?.label || 'Select group'}</span>
                          <span className="dropdown-arrow">▼</span>
                        </button>
                        {showAbGroupDropdown && (
                          <div className="dropdown-menu">
                            {abGroupOptions.map(opt => (
                              <div 
                                key={opt.value} 
                                className={`dropdown-item ${codeForm.ab_group === opt.value ? 'active' : ''}`}
                                onClick={() => {
                                  setCodeForm({...codeForm, ab_group: opt.value})
                                  setShowAbGroupDropdown(false)
                                }}
                              >
                                {opt.label}
                              </div>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="form-group">
                      <label>Traffic Percentage</label>
                      <input type="number" min="1" max="100" value={codeForm.ab_percentage} onChange={e => setCodeForm({...codeForm, ab_percentage: parseInt(e.target.value)})} />
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                <label className="checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={codeForm.is_active} onChange={e => setCodeForm({...codeForm, is_active: e.target.checked})} /> Active</label>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-footer">
                <button className="btn-cancel" onClick={() => { setShowCodeModal(false); setEditingCode(null); }}>Cancel</button>
                <button className="btn-save" onClick={saveCode}>{editingCode ? 'Update' : 'Create'}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Export Modal */}
        {showExportModal && (
          <div className="modal" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>
            <div className="modal-content export-modal" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header">
                <h3>📥 Export Analytics Data</h3>
                <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>×</button>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="export-section">
                  <label className="export-label">Select data to export:</label>
                  <div className="export-options">
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.revenueData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, revenueData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>📊 Ad Revenue Data</span>
                      <small>{revenueData.length} records</small>
                    </label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.slotsData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, slotsData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>📌 Ad Slots</span>
                      <small>{slots.length} slots</small>
                    </label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.codesData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, codesData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>💻 Ad Codes</span>
                      <small>{codes.length} codes</small>
                    </label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.chartData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, chartData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>📈 Chart Data Summary</span>
                      <small>{dates.length} days summary</small>
                    </label>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="export-info">
                  <p>📅 Date range: <strong>{dateRange === 'all' ? 'All time' : dateRange === 'custom' ? `${customStartDate} to ${customEndDate}` : dateRange}</strong></p>
                  <p>📄 CSV will include selected data with headers and metadata</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-footer">
                <button className="btn-cancel" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>Cancel</button>
                <button className="btn-save" onClick={exportToCSV} disabled={exporting}>
                  {exporting ? 'Exporting...' : 'Download CSV'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <style jsx>{`
          .ad-manager {
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #f8fafc;
            padding: 1rem;
          }
          
          @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .ad-manager {
              padding: 1.5rem;
            }
          }
          
          :global(body.dark) .ad-manager {
            background: #0f172a;
          }
          
          .header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 1rem;
          }
          
          .header h1 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
          }
          
          @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .header h1 {
              font-size: 1.5rem;
            }
          }
          
          .header p {
            color: #64748b;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
          }
          
          .header-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
          }
          
          .btn-primary, .btn-secondary {
            padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
            border-radius: 30px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            border: none;
            transition: all 0.2s;
          }
          
          @media (min-width: 768px) {
