========== src\pages\admin\affiliate.js ==========
// pages/admin/affiliate-manager.js - MOBILE-FIRST CALENDAR FIX
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation'
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  PointElement,
  LineElement,
  BarElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
  Filler,
  ArcElement
} from 'chart.js'
import { Line, Bar } from 'react-chartjs-2'

ChartJS.register(
  CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, BarElement,
  Title, Tooltip, Legend, Filler, ArcElement
)

export default function AffiliateManager() {
  const router = useRouter()
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false)
  const [showExportModal, setShowExportModal] = useState(false)
  const [links, setLinks] = useState([])
  const [clickData, setClickData] = useState([])
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false)
  const [editingLink, setEditingLink] = useState(null)
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all')
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState('30days')
  const [customStartDate, setCustomStartDate] = useState('')
  const [customEndDate, setCustomEndDate] = useState('')
  const [showCustomPicker, setShowCustomPicker] = useState(false)
  const [toast, setToast] = useState({ show: false, message: '', type: '' })
  const [showCategoryDropdown, setShowCategoryDropdown] = useState(false)
  const [showCommissionTypeDropdown, setShowCommissionTypeDropdown] = useState(false)
  
  // Calendar state
  const [calendarMonth, setCalendarMonth] = useState(new Date())
  const [tempStartDate, setTempStartDate] = useState(null)
  const [tempEndDate, setTempEndDate] = useState(null)
  const [selectingEnd, setSelectingEnd] = useState(false)
  
  // Export options
  const [exportOptions, setExportOptions] = useState({
    linksData: true,
    clicksData: true,
    revenueData: true,
    chartData: true
  })
  
  const categoryDropdownRef = useRef(null)
  const commissionTypeDropdownRef = useRef(null)
  const calendarRef = useRef(null)
  
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: '',
    url: '',
    cloaked_url: '',
    link_category: 'other',
    commission_type: 'percentage',
    commission_value: '',
    cookie_duration: 30,
    is_active: true
  })

  const getDateFilter = useCallback(() => {
    const now = new Date()
    let startDate = new Date()
    
    if (dateRange === 'custom' && customStartDate && customEndDate) {
      return { start: customStartDate, end: customEndDate }
    }
    
    if (dateRange === '7days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 7)
    else if (dateRange === '30days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 30)
    else if (dateRange === '90days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 90)
    else if (dateRange === 'all') startDate = new Date('2000-01-01')
    else startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 30)
    
    return { 
      start: startDate.toISOString().split('T')[0], 
      end: now.toISOString().split('T')[0] 
    }
  }, [dateRange, customStartDate, customEndDate])

  const fetchLinks = useCallback(async () => {
    let query = supabase.from('affiliate_links').select('*')
    
    if (selectedCategory !== 'all') {
      query = query.eq('link_category', selectedCategory)
    }
    
    const { data } = await query.order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    setLinks(data || [])
  }, [selectedCategory])

  const fetchClickData = useCallback(async () => {
    const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
    
    let query = supabase
      .from('affiliate_clicks')
      .select('*')
      .order('clicked_at', { ascending: true })
    
    if (dateRange !== 'all') {
      query = query.gte('clicked_at', `${start}T00:00:00`).lte('clicked_at', `${end}T23:59:59`)
    }
    
    const { data } = await query
    setClickData(data || [])
  }, [getDateFilter, dateRange])

  const loadData = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    await Promise.all([fetchLinks(), fetchClickData()])
    setLoading(false)
  }, [fetchLinks, fetchClickData])

  useEffect(() => {
    checkAuth()
    loadData()
  }, [loadData])

  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event) {
      if (categoryDropdownRef.current && !categoryDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowCategoryDropdown(false)
      }
      if (commissionTypeDropdownRef.current && !commissionTypeDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowCommissionTypeDropdown(false)
      }
      if (calendarRef.current && !calendarRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowCustomPicker(false)
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
  }, [])

  const showToastMessage = (message, type = 'success') => {
    setToast({ show: true, message, type })
    setTimeout(() => setToast({ show: false, message: '', type: '' }), 3000)
  }

  const checkAuth = () => {
    const sessionToken = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_token')
    const sessionExpiry = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_expiry')
    
    if (!sessionToken || !sessionExpiry) {
      router.push('/')
      return
    }
    
    const now = Date.now()
    if (now > parseInt(sessionExpiry)) {
      localStorage.removeItem('admin_session_token')
      localStorage.removeItem('admin_session_expiry')
      router.push('/')
    }
  }

  const generateCloakedUrl = (name) => {
    const slug = name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '')
    return `/go/${slug}`
  }

  const saveLink = async () => {
    if (!formData.name || !formData.url) {
      showToastMessage('Please fill in all required fields', 'error')
      return
    }
    
    const cloakedUrl = formData.cloaked_url || generateCloakedUrl(formData.name)
    
    if (editingLink) {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('affiliate_links')
        .update({
          name: formData.name,
          url: formData.url,
          cloaked_url: cloakedUrl,
          link_category: formData.link_category,
          commission_type: formData.commission_type,
          commission_value: parseFloat(formData.commission_value) || 0,
          cookie_duration: parseInt(formData.cookie_duration),
          is_active: formData.is_active,
          updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
        })
        .eq('id', editingLink.id)
      
      if (error) {
        showToastMessage('Error updating link: ' + error.message, 'error')
      } else {
        showToastMessage('Link updated successfully')
        await fetchLinks()
        setShowModal(false)
        resetForm()
      }
    } else {
      const { error } = await supabase.from('affiliate_links').insert([{
        name: formData.name,
        url: formData.url,
        cloaked_url: cloakedUrl,
        link_category: formData.link_category,
        commission_type: formData.commission_type,
        commission_value: parseFloat(formData.commission_value) || 0,
        cookie_duration: parseInt(formData.cookie_duration),
        is_active: formData.is_active,
        created_at: new Date().toISOString()
      }])
      
      if (error) {
        showToastMessage('Error adding link: ' + error.message, 'error')
      } else {
        showToastMessage('Link added successfully')
        await fetchLinks()
        setShowModal(false)
        resetForm()
      }
    }
  }

  const deleteLink = async (id) => {
    if (!confirm('Delete this affiliate link? This will also delete all click data.')) return
    
    const { error } = await supabase.from('affiliate_links').delete().eq('id', id)
    
    if (!error) {
      showToastMessage('Link deleted')
      await fetchLinks()
    }
  }

  const resetForm = () => {
    setFormData({
      name: '',
      url: '',
      cloaked_url: '',
      link_category: 'other',
      commission_type: 'percentage',
      commission_value: '',
      cookie_duration: 30,
      is_active: true
    })
    setEditingLink(null)
  }

  const editLink = (link) => {
    setEditingLink(link)
    setFormData({
      name: link.name,
      url: link.url,
      cloaked_url: link.cloaked_url || '',
      link_category: link.link_category || 'other',
      commission_type: link.commission_type || 'percentage',
      commission_value: link.commission_value || '',
      cookie_duration: link.cookie_duration || 30,
      is_active: link.is_active
    })
    setShowModal(true)
  }

  // Export to CSV
  const exportToCSV = async () => {
    setExporting(true)
    try {
      const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
      
      const allRows = []
      allRows.push([`"Export generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}"`])
      allRows.push([`"Date range: ${start} to ${end}"`])
      allRows.push([])
      
      // Links data
      if (exportOptions.linksData && links.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== AFFILIATE LINKS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Name', 'URL', 'Cloaked URL', 'Category', 'Commission Type', 'Commission Value', 'Cookie Duration', 'Active', 'Clicks', 'Conversions', 'Revenue'])
        links.forEach(link => {
          allRows.push([
            `"${link.name}"`,
            link.url,
            link.cloaked_url || '',
            link.link_category || 'other',
            link.commission_type || 'percentage',
            link.commission_value || 0,
            link.cookie_duration || 30,
            link.is_active ? 'Yes' : 'No',
            link.clicks || 0,
            link.conversions || 0,
            link.revenue || 0
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // Clicks data
      if (exportOptions.clicksData && clickData.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== AFFILIATE CLICKS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Link ID', 'Clicked At', 'IP Address', 'User Agent', 'Referrer', 'Converted', 'Revenue'])
        clickData.forEach(click => {
          allRows.push([
            click.link_id || '',
            click.clicked_at || '',
            click.ip_address || '',
            `"${(click.user_agent || '').substring(0, 100)}"`,
            click.referrer || '',
            click.converted ? 'Yes' : 'No',
            click.revenue || 0
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // Revenue summary
      if (exportOptions.revenueData) {
        const revenueByDate = {}
        clickData.forEach(click => {
          const date = click.clicked_at?.split('T')[0]
          if (date && click.revenue) {
            revenueByDate[date] = (revenueByDate[date] || 0) + click.revenue
          }
        })
        
        allRows.push(['=== DAILY REVENUE ==='])
        allRows.push(['Date', 'Revenue'])
        Object.entries(revenueByDate).forEach(([date, revenue]) => {
          allRows.push([date, revenue])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // Chart data summary
      if (exportOptions.chartData && clickData.length > 0) {
        const dates = [...new Set(clickData.map(c => c.clicked_at?.split('T')[0]))].sort()
        const dailyClicks = dates.map(date => clickData.filter(c => c.clicked_at?.split('T')[0] === date).length)
        const dailyRevenue = dates.map(date => clickData.filter(c => c.clicked_at?.split('T')[0] === date).reduce((s, c) => s + (c.revenue || 0), 0))
        
        allRows.push(['=== CHART DATA ==='])
        allRows.push(['Date', 'Clicks', 'Revenue'])
        dates.forEach((date, i) => {
          allRows.push([date, dailyClicks[i], dailyRevenue[i]])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      const csvContent = allRows.map(row => row.join(',')).join('\n')
      const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' })
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      const link = document.createElement('a')
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute('download', `affiliate-analytics-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      document.body.removeChild(link)
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
    } catch (error) {
      showToastMessage('Export failed: ' + error.message, 'error')
    } finally {
      setExporting(false)
      setShowExportModal(false)
    }
  }

  // Calendar functions
  const getDaysInMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate()
  }

  const getFirstDayOfMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month, 1).getDay()
  }

  const changeMonth = (delta) => {
    setCalendarMonth(new Date(calendarMonth.getFullYear(), calendarMonth.getMonth() + delta, 1))
  }

  const isDateInRange = (date) => {
    if (!tempStartDate) return false
    if (!tempEndDate) return date.toDateString() === tempStartDate.toDateString()
    return date >= tempStartDate && date <= tempEndDate
  }

  const isStartDate = (date) => {
    return tempStartDate && date.toDateString() === tempStartDate.toDateString()
  }

  const isEndDate = (date) => {
    return tempEndDate && date.toDateString() === tempEndDate.toDateString()
  }

  const handleDateClick = (date) => {
    if (!selectingEnd || !tempStartDate) {
      setTempStartDate(date)
      setTempEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(true)
    } else {
      if (date < tempStartDate) {
        setTempStartDate(date)
        setTempEndDate(null)
      } else {
        setTempEndDate(date)
        setSelectingEnd(false)
      }
    }
  }

  const applyCustomRange = () => {
    if (tempStartDate && tempEndDate) {
      const startStr = tempStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      const endStr = tempEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      setCustomStartDate(startStr)
      setCustomEndDate(endStr)
      setDateRange('custom')
      setShowCustomPicker(false)
      setTempStartDate(null)
      setTempEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(false)
    }
  }

  const resetCustomRange = () => {
    setTempStartDate(null)
    setTempEndDate(null)
    setSelectingEnd(false)
  }

  const renderCalendar = () => {
    const year = calendarMonth.getFullYear()
    const month = calendarMonth.getMonth()
    const daysInMonth = getDaysInMonth(year, month)
    const firstDay = getFirstDayOfMonth(year, month)
    const today = new Date()
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    
    const calendarDays = []
    const weekdays = ['Su', 'Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa']
    
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
      calendarDays.push(null)
    }
    
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const date = new Date(year, month, d)
      date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
      const isToday = date.toDateString() === today.toDateString()
      const inRange = isDateInRange(date)
      const isStart = isStartDate(date)
      const isEnd = isEndDate(date)
      
      calendarDays.push({ date, day: d, isToday, inRange, isStart, isEnd })
    }
    
    return { weekdays, calendarDays }
  }

  const { weekdays, calendarDays } = renderCalendar()

  // Calculate stats
  const totalClicks = links.reduce((sum, l) => sum + (l.clicks || 0), 0)
  const totalRevenue = links.reduce((sum, l) => sum + (l.revenue || 0), 0)
  const totalConversions = links.reduce((sum, l) => sum + (l.conversions || 0), 0)
  const epc = totalClicks > 0 ? totalRevenue / totalClicks : 0

  // Chart data
  const dates = [...new Set(clickData.map(c => c.clicked_at?.split('T')[0]))].sort()
  const clicksByDate = dates.map(date => clickData.filter(c => c.clicked_at?.split('T')[0] === date).length)
  const revenueByDate = dates.map(date => clickData.filter(c => c.clicked_at?.split('T')[0] === date).reduce((sum, c) => sum + (c.revenue || 0), 0))

  const chartLabels = dates.map(date => {
    const d = new Date(date)
    return `${d.getMonth() + 1}/${d.getDate()}`
  })

  const chartOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 11 } } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#1e293b', titleColor: '#f1f5f9', bodyColor: '#94a3b8' }
    },
    scales: {
      y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: '#e2e8f0' }, ticks: { color: '#64748b' } },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#64748b', maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45 } }
    }
  }

  const dualAxisOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 11 } } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#1e293b', titleColor: '#f1f5f9', bodyColor: '#94a3b8' }
    },
    scales: {
      y: { 
        beginAtZero: true, 
        grid: { color: '#e2e8f0' }, 
        ticks: { color: '#64748b' }, 
        title: { display: true, text: 'Clicks', color: '#64748b' }
      },
      y1: { 
        beginAtZero: true, 
        position: 'right', 
        grid: { display: false }, 
        ticks: { color: '#10b981' }, 
        title: { display: true, text: 'Revenue ($)', color: '#10b981' }
      },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#64748b' } }
    }
  }

  const clicksChartData = {
    labels: chartLabels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Clicks',
        data: clicksByDate,
        borderColor: '#6366f1',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(99,102,241,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4
      }
    ]
  }

  const revenueChartData = {
    labels: chartLabels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Revenue ($)',
        data: revenueByDate,
        borderColor: '#10b981',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(16,185,129,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4
      }
    ]
  }

  const combinedChartData = {
    labels: chartLabels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Clicks',
        data: clicksByDate,
        borderColor: '#6366f1',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(99,102,241,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4,
        yAxisID: 'y'
      },
      {
        label: 'Revenue ($)',
        data: revenueByDate,
        borderColor: '#10b981',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(16,185,129,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4,
        yAxisID: 'y1'
      }
    ]
  }

  const topLinks = [...links].sort((a, b) => (b.revenue || 0) - (a.revenue || 0)).slice(0, 5)
  const underperformingLinks = [...links]
    .filter(l => (l.clicks || 0) > 10 && (l.revenue || 0) < 10)
    .sort((a, b) => (a.clicks || 0) - (b.clicks || 0))
    .slice(0, 5)

  const categoryOptions = [
    { value: 'amazon', label: 'Amazon', icon: '🛒' },
    { value: 'shareasale', label: 'ShareASale', icon: '📊' },
    { value: 'cj', label: 'CJ Affiliate', icon: '🔗' },
    { value: 'direct', label: 'Direct', icon: '🤝' },
    { value: 'other', label: 'Other', icon: '📁' }
  ]

  const commissionTypeOptions = [
    { value: 'percentage', label: 'Percentage (%)' },
    { value: 'fixed', label: 'Fixed ($)' }
  ]

  const getCategoryLabel = (category) => {
    const found = categoryOptions.find(c => c.value === category)
    return found ? `${found.icon} ${found.label}` : category
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div className="loading-container">
          <div className="loading-spinner"></div>
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    )
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div className="affiliate-manager">
        {/* Toast Notification */}
        {toast.show && (
          <div className={`toast ${toast.type === 'error' ? 'toast-error' : 'toast-success'}`}>
            <span className="toast-icon">{toast.type === 'error' ? '❌' : '✅'}</span>
            <span className="toast-message">{toast.message}</span>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Header */}
        <div className="header">
          <div>
            <h1>🔗 Affiliate Manager</h1>
            <p>Manage affiliate links, track performance, and optimize earnings</p>
          </div>
          <div className="header-actions">
            <button className="btn-primary" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(true)} disabled={exporting}>
              {exporting ? '⏳ Exporting...' : '📥 Export CSV'}
            </button>
            <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={() => { resetForm(); setShowModal(true); }}>
              + Add Link
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Date Range Selector */}
        <div className="date-range-container">
          <div className="range-buttons">
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '7days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('7days'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              7 days
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '30days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('30days'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              30 days
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '90days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('90days'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              90 days
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === 'all' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('all'); setShowCustomPicker(false); }}>
              All time
            </button>
            
            <div className="custom-range-wrapper" ref={calendarRef}>
              <button className={`range-btn custom-btn ${dateRange === 'custom' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(!showCustomPicker)}>
                📅 {dateRange === 'custom' && customStartDate && customEndDate 
                  ? `${new Date(customStartDate).toLocaleDateString()} - ${new Date(customEndDate).toLocaleDateString()}`
                  : 'Custom range'}
              </button>
              
              {showCustomPicker && (
                <div className="mobile-calendar-picker">
                  <div className="calendar-header">
                    <div className="calendar-title">Select date range</div>
                    <button className="calendar-close" onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(false)}>×</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-presets">
                    <button onClick={() => {
                      const end = new Date()
                      const start = new Date()
                      start.setDate(end.getDate() - 7)
                      setTempStartDate(start)
                      setTempEndDate(end)
                      setSelectingEnd(false)
                    }}>Last 7 days</button>
                    <button onClick={() => {
                      const end = new Date()
                      const start = new Date()
                      start.setDate(end.getDate() - 30)
                      setTempStartDate(start)
                      setTempEndDate(end)
                      setSelectingEnd(false)
                    }}>Last 30 days</button>
                    <button onClick={() => {
                      const end = new Date()
                      const start = new Date()
                      start.setDate(end.getDate() - 90)
                      setTempStartDate(start)
                      setTempEndDate(end)
                      setSelectingEnd(false)
                    }}>Last 90 days</button>
                    <button onClick={resetCustomRange}>Reset</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-status">
                    {selectingEnd ? 'Select end date' : tempStartDate ? 'Select end date' : 'Select start date'}
                  </div>
                  
                  {tempStartDate && (
                    <div className="calendar-selected">
                      {tempStartDate.toLocaleDateString()} {tempEndDate && `→ ${tempEndDate.toLocaleDateString()}`}
                    </div>
                  )}
                  
                  <div className="calendar-nav">
                    <button onClick={() => changeMonth(-1)}>←</button>
                    <span>{calendarMonth.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}</span>
                    <button onClick={() => changeMonth(1)}>→</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-weekdays">
                    {weekdays.map(day => <div key={day}>{day}</div>)}
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-grid">
                    {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="calendar-cell">
                        {day ? (
                          <button
                            className={`calendar-day 
                              ${day.isToday ? 'today' : ''} 
                              ${day.inRange ? 'in-range' : ''} 
                              ${day.isStart ? 'start' : ''} 
                              ${day.isEnd ? 'end' : ''}`}
                            onClick={() => handleDateClick(day.date)}
                          >
                            {day.day}
                          </button>
                        ) : (
                          <div className="calendar-empty"></div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="calendar-actions">
                    <button className="calendar-cancel" onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(false)}>Cancel</button>
                    {tempStartDate && tempEndDate && (
                      <button className="calendar-apply" onClick={applyCustomRange}>Apply</button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* KPI Cards */}
        <div className="stats-grid">
          <div className="stat-card">
            <div className="stat-icon">💰</div>
            <div className="stat-value">${totalRevenue.toFixed(2)}</div>
            <div className="stat-label">Total Revenue</div>
          </div>
          <div className="stat-card">
            <div className="stat-icon">👆</div>
            <div className="stat-value">{totalClicks.toLocaleString()}</div>
            <div className="stat-label">Total Clicks</div>
          </div>
          <div className="stat-card">
            <div className="stat-icon">📊</div>
            <div className="stat-value">{totalConversions}</div>
            <div className="stat-label">Conversions</div>
          </div>
          <div className="stat-card">
            <div className="stat-icon">📈</div>
            <div className="stat-value">${epc.toFixed(2)}</div>
            <div className="stat-label">EPC</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Charts */}
        {clickData.length > 0 ? (
          <>
            <div className="chart-card">
              <div className="card-header">
                <h3>📈 Clicks & Revenue Trend</h3>
                <div className="card-badge">{dates.length} days</div>
              </div>
              <div className="chart-container">
                <Line data={combinedChartData} options={dualAxisOptions} />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="chart-card">
              <div className="card-header">
                <h3>👆 Clicks Trend</h3>
                <div className="card-badge">{dates.length} days</div>
              </div>
              <div className="chart-container">
                <Line data={clicksChartData} options={chartOptions} />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="chart-card">
              <div className="card-header">
                <h3>💰 Revenue Trend</h3>
                <div className="card-badge">{dates.length} days</div>
              </div>
              <div className="chart-container">
                <Line data={revenueChartData} options={chartOptions} />
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        ) : (
          <div className="chart-card">
            <div className="chart-empty-state">No click data for selected period. Try a different date range.</div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Category Filters */}
        <div className="filters-section">
          <div className="filter-buttons">
            <button className={`filter-btn ${selectedCategory === 'all' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('all')}>All</button>
            <button className={`filter-btn ${selectedCategory === 'amazon' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('amazon')}>🛒 Amazon</button>
            <button className={`filter-btn ${selectedCategory === 'shareasale' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('shareasale')}>📊 ShareASale</button>
            <button className={`filter-btn ${selectedCategory === 'cj' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('cj')}>🔗 CJ</button>
            <button className={`filter-btn ${selectedCategory === 'direct' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('direct')}>🤝 Direct</button>
            <button className={`filter-btn ${selectedCategory === 'other' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('other')}>📁 Other</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Links Table */}
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-header">
            <h2>Affiliate Links</h2>
            <span className="section-count">{links.length} total</span>
          </div>
          <div className="table-wrapper">
            <div className="data-table">
              <div className="table-header">
                <div className="col-name">Name</div>
                <div className="col-category">Category</div>
                <div className="col-clicks">Clicks</div>
                <div className="col-conversions">Conv.</div>
                <div className="col-revenue">Revenue</div>
                <div className="col-epc">EPC</div>
                <div className="col-status">Status</div>
                <div className="col-actions">Actions</div>
              </div>
              
              {links.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="table-empty">No affiliate links yet. Click "Add Link" to get started.</div>
              ) : (
                links.map(link => (
                  <div key={link.id} className="table-row">
                    <div className="col-name"><span className="row-label">Name</span><span className="row-value">{link.name}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-category"><span className="row-label">Category</span><span className="category-badge">{getCategoryLabel(link.link_category)}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-clicks"><span className="row-label">Clicks</span><span>{link.clicks || 0}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-conversions"><span className="row-label">Conv.</span><span>{link.conversions || 0}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-revenue"><span className="row-label">Revenue</span><span className="revenue-value">${(link.revenue || 0).toFixed(2)}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-epc"><span className="row-label">EPC</span><span>${((link.revenue || 0) / ((link.clicks || 1))).toFixed(2)}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-status"><span className="row-label">Status</span><span className={`status-badge ${link.is_active ? 'active' : 'inactive'}`}>{link.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}</span></div>
                    <div className="col-actions">
                      <span className="row-label">Actions</span>
                      <div className="action-buttons">
                        <button onClick={() => editLink(link)} className="action-edit">Edit</button>
                        <button onClick={() => deleteLink(link.id)} className="action-delete">Delete</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Performance Section */}
        <div className="performance-section">
          <div className="chart-card">
            <div className="card-header">
              <h3>🏆 Top Performing Links</h3>
              <span className="card-badge">By revenue</span>
            </div>
            <div className="top-list">
              {topLinks.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="empty-state">No data yet</div>
              ) : (
                topLinks.map((link, index) => (
                  <div key={link.id} className="top-item">
                    <div className={`top-rank rank-${index + 1}`}>{index + 1}</div>
                    <div className="top-info">
                      <div className="top-name">{link.name}</div>
                      <div className="top-meta">{link.clicks || 0} clicks • ${(link.revenue || 0).toFixed(2)} revenue</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="top-value">${(link.revenue || 0).toFixed(2)}</div>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="chart-card">
            <div className="card-header">
              <h3>⚠️ Needs Attention</h3>
              <span className="card-badge">10+ clicks, &lt;$10 revenue</span>
            </div>
            <div className="warning-list">
              {underperformingLinks.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="empty-state">No underperforming links</div>
              ) : (
                underperformingLinks.map(link => (
                  <div key={link.id} className="warning-item">
                    <div className="warning-info">
                      <div className="warning-name">{link.name}</div>
                      <div className="warning-stats">{link.clicks || 0} clicks • ${(link.revenue || 0).toFixed(2)} revenue</div>
                    </div>
                    <button onClick={() => editLink(link)} className="optimize-btn">Optimize →</button>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Add/Edit Modal */}
        {showModal && (
          <div className="modal" onClick={() => setShowModal(false)}>
            <div className="modal-content" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header">
                <h3>{editingLink ? 'Edit Affiliate Link' : 'Add Affiliate Link'}</h3>
                <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setShowModal(false)}>×</button>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Link Name *</label>
                  <input type="text" value={formData.name} onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, name: e.target.value})} placeholder="e.g., Best Noise Cancelling Headphones" />
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Affiliate URL *</label>
                  <input type="url" value={formData.url} onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, url: e.target.value})} placeholder="https://amazon.com/..." />
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Cloaked URL (optional)</label>
                  <input type="text" value={formData.cloaked_url} onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, cloaked_url: e.target.value})} placeholder="/go/your-link" />
                  <small>Leave empty to auto-generate</small>
                </div>
                
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Category</label>
                  <div className="premium-dropdown" ref={categoryDropdownRef}>
                    <button type="button" className="dropdown-trigger" onClick={() => setShowCategoryDropdown(!showCategoryDropdown)}>
                      <span className="dropdown-icon">{categoryOptions.find(o => o.value === formData.link_category)?.icon || '📁'}</span>
                      <span>{categoryOptions.find(o => o.value === formData.link_category)?.label || 'Select category'}</span>
                      <span className="dropdown-arrow">▼</span>
                    </button>
                    {showCategoryDropdown && (
                      <div className="dropdown-menu">
                        {categoryOptions.map(opt => (
                          <div key={opt.value} className={`dropdown-item ${formData.link_category === opt.value ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setFormData({...formData, link_category: opt.value}); setShowCategoryDropdown(false); }}>
                            <span className="dropdown-item-icon">{opt.icon}</span>
                            <span>{opt.label}</span>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="form-row">
                  <div className="form-group">
                    <label>Commission Type</label>
                    <div className="premium-dropdown" ref={commissionTypeDropdownRef}>
                      <button type="button" className="dropdown-trigger" onClick={() => setShowCommissionTypeDropdown(!showCommissionTypeDropdown)}>
                        <span>{commissionTypeOptions.find(o => o.value === formData.commission_type)?.label || 'Select type'}</span>
                        <span className="dropdown-arrow">▼</span>
                      </button>
                      {showCommissionTypeDropdown && (
                        <div className="dropdown-menu">
                          {commissionTypeOptions.map(opt => (
                            <div key={opt.value} className={`dropdown-item ${formData.commission_type === opt.value ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setFormData({...formData, commission_type: opt.value}); setShowCommissionTypeDropdown(false); }}>
                              {opt.label}
                            </div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-group">
                    <label>Commission Value</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.01" value={formData.commission_value} onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, commission_value: e.target.value})} placeholder="10 for 10% or 5.00 for $5" />
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label>Cookie Duration (days)</label>
                  <input type="number" value={formData.cookie_duration} onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, cookie_duration: e.target.value})} />
                </div>
                
                <label className="checkbox">
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={formData.is_active} onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, is_active: e.target.checked})} />
                  Active (link is working and trackable)
                </label>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-footer">
                <button onClick={() => setShowModal(false)} className="btn-cancel">Cancel</button>
                <button onClick={saveLink} className="btn-save">{editingLink ? 'Update' : 'Add'} Link</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Export Modal */}
        {showExportModal && (
          <div className="modal" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>
            <div className="modal-content export-modal" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header">
                <h3>📥 Export Analytics Data</h3>
                <button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>×</button>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="export-section">
                  <label className="export-label">Select data to export:</label>
                  <div className="export-options">
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.linksData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, linksData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>🔗 Affiliate Links</span>
                      <small>{links.length} links</small>
                    </label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.clicksData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, clicksData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>👆 Click Data</span>
                      <small>{clickData.length} clicks</small>
                    </label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.revenueData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, revenueData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>💰 Revenue Summary</span>
                      <small>Daily breakdown</small>
                    </label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox">
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={exportOptions.chartData} onChange={e => setExportOptions({...exportOptions, chartData: e.target.checked})} />
                      <span>📊 Chart Data</span>
                      <small>Daily clicks & revenue</small>
                    </label>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="export-info">
                  <p>📅 Date range: <strong>{dateRange === 'all' ? 'All time' : dateRange === 'custom' ? `${customStartDate} to ${customEndDate}` : dateRange}</strong></p>
                  <p>📄 CSV will include selected data with headers</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="modal-footer">
                <button className="btn-cancel" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>Cancel</button>
                <button className="btn-save" onClick={exportToCSV} disabled={exporting}>
                  {exporting ? 'Exporting...' : 'Download CSV'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <style jsx>{`
          .affiliate-manager {
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #f8fafc;
            padding: 1rem;
          }
          
          @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .affiliate-manager {
              padding: 1.5rem;
            }
          }
          
          :global(body.dark) .affiliate-manager {
            background: #0f172a;
          }
          
          /* Toast */
          .toast {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 1rem;
            right: 1rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            z-index: 1100;
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;
          }
          
          @keyframes slideIn {
            from { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; }
            to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; }
          }

          .toast-error { border-left: 4px solid #ef4444; }

            display: flex;

            background: white;

            border-radius: 30px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.2s;
          }
          
          @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .range-btn {
              padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
              font-size: 0.8rem;
            }
          }

            background: #f1f5f9;
            border-color: #6366f1;

            background: #6366f1;
            color: white;
            border-color: #6366f1;

            display: flex;

              to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
            }

          }

          }
          
          .calendar-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            padding: 0.75rem;
            border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
          }
          
          .calendar-cancel, .calendar-apply {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 0.5rem;
            border-radius: 30px;

            cursor: pointer;
          }

          .calendar-apply {
            background: #6366f1;
            color: white;
            border: none;
          }
          
          /* Stats Grid */
          .stats-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);

          }

              grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            }

            background: white;

          }
          
          :global(body.dark) .stat-card {

            font-weight: 700;
            color: #0f172a;
          }
          
          @media (min-width: 768px) {

          }

            background: #1e293b;
          }
          
          .card-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;

          }
          
          .card-header h3 {

          }

            padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;

            font-size: 0.65rem;
            color: #64748b;
          }

========== src\pages\admin\content-calendar.js ==========
// pages/admin/content-calendar.js
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation'

export default function ContentCalendar() {
  const router = useRouter()
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [posts, setPosts] = useState([])
  const [currentDate, setCurrentDate] = useState(new Date())
  const [showPostModal, setShowPostModal] = useState(false)
  const [editingPost, setEditingPost] = useState(null)
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([])
  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState('all')
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    title: '',
    scheduled_for: '',
    status: 'scheduled',
    category_id: ''
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    checkAuth()
    fetchCategories()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchPosts()
  }, [currentDate, filterStatus])

  const checkAuth = () => {
    const sessionToken = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_token')
    const sessionExpiry = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_expiry')
    
    if (!sessionToken || !sessionExpiry) {
      router.push('/admin/login')
      return
    }
    
    const now = Date.now()
    if (now > parseInt(sessionExpiry)) {
      localStorage.removeItem('admin_session_token')
      localStorage.removeItem('admin_session_expiry')
      router.push('/admin/login')
    }
  }

  const fetchCategories = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('categories')
        .select('id, name')
        .order('name')

      if (error) throw error
      setCategories(data || [])
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching categories:', error)
    }
  }

  const fetchPosts = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    try {
      const year = currentDate.getFullYear()
      const month = currentDate.getMonth()
      const startDate = new Date(year, month, 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]
      const endDate = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).toISOString().split('T')[0]

      let query = supabase
        .from('posts')
        .select(`
          id,
          title,
          scheduled_for,
          status,
          category_id,
          categories (name)
        `)
        .gte('scheduled_for', startDate)
        .lte('scheduled_for', endDate)
        .order('scheduled_for', { ascending: true })

      if (filterStatus !== 'all') {
        query = query.eq('status', filterStatus)
      }

      const { data, error } = await query

      if (error) throw error
      setPosts(data || [])
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching posts:', error)
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const createOrUpdatePost = async () => {
    if (!formData.title.trim()) {
      alert('Please enter a post title')
      return
    }

    if (!formData.scheduled_for) {
      alert('Please select a date')
      return
    }

    try {
      const slug = formData.title
        .toLowerCase()
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
        .replace(/^-|-$/g, '')

      const postData = {
        title: formData.title,
        slug: slug,
        scheduled_for: formData.scheduled_for,
        status: formData.status,
        category_id: formData.category_id || null,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
      }

      let result
      if (editingPost) {
        result = await supabase
          .from('posts')
          .update(postData)
          .eq('id', editingPost.id)
      } else {
        postData.created_at = new Date().toISOString()
        postData.views = 0
        result = await supabase
          .from('posts')
          .insert([postData])
      }

      if (result.error) throw result.error

      setShowPostModal(false)
      setEditingPost(null)
      setFormData({ title: '', scheduled_for: '', status: 'scheduled', category_id: '' })
      fetchPosts()
      alert(editingPost ? 'Post updated successfully!' : 'Post scheduled successfully!')
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving post:', error)
      alert('Error saving post: ' + error.message)
    }
  }

  const deletePost = async (postId) => {
    if (!confirm('Delete this post?')) return

    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .delete()
        .eq('id', postId)

      if (error) throw error
      fetchPosts()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting post:', error)
    }
  }

  const updatePostStatus = async (postId, newStatus) => {
    try {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .update({ status: newStatus, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
        .eq('id', postId)

      if (error) throw error
      fetchPosts()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating status:', error)
    }
  }

  const changeMonth = (delta) => {
    setCurrentDate(new Date(currentDate.getFullYear(), currentDate.getMonth() + delta, 1))
  }

  const goToToday = () => {
    setCurrentDate(new Date())
  }

  const statusCounts = {
    all: posts.length,
    scheduled: posts.filter(p => p.status === 'scheduled').length,
    draft: posts.filter(p => p.status === 'draft').length,
    published: posts.filter(p => p.status === 'published').length
  }

  // Build calendar grid
  const buildCalendarGrid = () => {
    const year = currentDate.getFullYear()
    const month = currentDate.getMonth()
    const firstDayOfMonth = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay()
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate()
    const daysInPrevMonth = new Date(year, month, 0).getDate()
    
    const grid = []
    const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
    
    // Previous month days
    for (let i = firstDayOfMonth - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const prevDate = daysInPrevMonth - i
      const prevMonth = month === 0 ? 11 : month - 1
      const prevYear = month === 0 ? year - 1 : year
      const dateStr = `${prevYear}-${String(prevMonth + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(prevDate).padStart(2, '0')}`
      grid.push({
        date: prevDate,
        dateStr: dateStr,
        isCurrentMonth: false,
        isToday: false,
        posts: []
      })
    }
    
    // Current month days
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const dateStr = `${year}-${String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(d).padStart(2, '0')}`
      const isToday = dateStr === today
      const dayPosts = posts.filter(post => post.scheduled_for === dateStr)
      
      grid.push({
        date: d,
        dateStr: dateStr,
        isCurrentMonth: true,
        isToday: isToday,
        posts: dayPosts
      })
    }
    
    // Next month days to fill grid (make sure we have 6 rows = 42 cells)
    const remainingCells = 42 - grid.length
    for (let i = 1; i <= remainingCells; i++) {
      const nextMonth = month === 11 ? 0 : month + 1
      const nextYear = month === 11 ? year + 1 : year
      const dateStr = `${nextYear}-${String(nextMonth + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(i).padStart(2, '0')}`
      grid.push({
        date: i,
        dateStr: dateStr,
        isCurrentMonth: false,
        isToday: false,
        posts: []
      })
    }
    
    return grid
  }

  const calendarGrid = buildCalendarGrid()
  const weekdays = ['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat']

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div className="content-calendar">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="header">
          <div>
            <h1>📅 Content Calendar</h1>
            <p className="subtitle">Schedule and manage posts</p>
          </div>
          <button 
            onClick={() => {
              setEditingPost(null)
              setFormData({ title: '', scheduled_for: '', status: 'scheduled', category_id: '' })
              setShowPostModal(true)
            }} 
            className="fab"
          >
            +
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Stats */}
        <div className="stats-scroll">
          <div className="stats-grid">
            <div className={`stat-card ${filterStatus === 'all' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setFilterStatus('all')}>
              <div className="stat-value">{statusCounts.all}</div>
              <div className="stat-label">Total</div>
            </div>
            <div className={`stat-card ${filterStatus === 'scheduled' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setFilterStatus('scheduled')}>
              <div className="stat-value">{statusCounts.scheduled}</div>
              <div className="stat-label">Scheduled</div>
            </div>
            <div className={`stat-card ${filterStatus === 'draft' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setFilterStatus('draft')}>
              <div className="stat-value">{statusCounts.draft}</div>
              <div className="stat-label">Drafts</div>
            </div>
            <div className={`stat-card ${filterStatus === 'published' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setFilterStatus('published')}>
              <div className="stat-value">{statusCounts.published}</div>
              <div className="stat-label">Published</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Month Navigation */}
        <div className="month-nav">
          <button onClick={() => changeMonth(-1)} className="nav-btn">←</button>
          <button onClick={goToToday} className="today-btn">Today</button>
          <h2>{currentDate.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'long' })} {currentDate.getFullYear()}</h2>
          <button onClick={() => changeMonth(1)} className="nav-btn">→</button>
        </div>

        {/* Calendar Grid */}
        <div className="calendar-container">
          {loading ? (
            <div className="loading">Loading calendar...</div>
          ) : (
            <>
              {/* Weekday Headers */}
              <div className="calendar-weekdays">
                {weekdays.map(day => (
                  <div key={day} className="weekday">{day}</div>
                ))}
              </div>
              
              {/* Calendar Days Grid */}
              <div className="calendar-grid">
                {calendarGrid.map((day, index) => (
                  <div
                    key={index}
                    className={`calendar-day 
                      ${!day.isCurrentMonth ? 'other-month' : ''} 
                      ${day.isToday ? 'today' : ''}
                      ${day.posts.length > 0 ? 'has-posts' : ''}
                    `}
                    onClick={() => {
                      setFormData({ ...formData, scheduled_for: day.dateStr })
                      setShowPostModal(true)
                    }}
                  >
                    <div className="day-number">{day.date}</div>
                    <div className="day-posts">
                      {day.posts.slice(0, 2).map(post => (
                        <div 
                          key={post.id} 
                          className="day-post"
                          onClick={(e) => {
                            e.stopPropagation()
                            setEditingPost(post)
                            setFormData({
                              title: post.title,
                              scheduled_for: post.scheduled_for,
                              status: post.status,
                              category_id: post.category_id || ''
                            })
                            setShowPostModal(true)
                          }}
                        >
                          <span className={`post-dot ${post.status}`}></span>
                          <span className="post-title">{post.title.length > 18 ? post.title.slice(0, 18) + '...' : post.title}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                      {day.posts.length > 2 && (
                        <div className="more-posts">+{day.posts.length - 2} more</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Bottom Sheet Modal */}
        {showPostModal && (
          <div className="bottom-sheet">
            <div className="bottom-sheet-content">
              <div className="bottom-sheet-header">
                <h3>{editingPost ? '✏️ Edit Post' : '📝 New Post'}</h3>
                <button className="close-btn" onClick={() => setShowPostModal(false)}>✕</button>
              </div>
              <div className="bottom-sheet-body">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Post title"
                  value={formData.title}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, title: e.target.value })}
                  className="input-title"
                  autoFocus
                />
                <input
                  type="date"
                  value={formData.scheduled_for}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, scheduled_for: e.target.value })}
                  className="input-date"
                />
                <select
                  value={formData.status}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, status: e.target.value })}
                  className="input-select"
                >
                  <option value="scheduled">Scheduled</option>
                  <option value="draft">Draft</option>
                  <option value="published">Published</option>
                </select>
                <select
                  value={formData.category_id}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, category_id: e.target.value })}
                  className="input-select"
                >
                  <option value="">Select category</option>
                  {categories.map(cat => (
                    <option key={cat.id} value={cat.id}>{cat.name}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </div>
              <div className="bottom-sheet-footer">
                <button className="btn-cancel" onClick={() => setShowPostModal(false)}>Cancel</button>
                <button className="btn-save" onClick={createOrUpdatePost}>
                  {editingPost ? 'Update' : 'Schedule'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <style jsx>{`
          .content-calendar {
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #f8fafc;
            padding: 1rem;
            padding-bottom: 2rem;
          }
          
          :global(body.dark) .content-calendar {
            background: #0f172a;
          }
          
          /* Header */
          .header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
          }
          
          .header h1 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
          }
          
          .subtitle {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #64748b;
          }
          
          .fab {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #6366f1;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
          }
          
          .fab:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
          }
          
          /* Stats */
          .stats-scroll {
            overflow-x: auto;
            margin: 0 -1rem;
            padding: 0 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
          }
          
          .stats-grid {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            min-width: min-content;
          }
          
          .stat-card {
            background: white;
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            text-align: center;
            min-width: 80px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
          }
          
          :global(body.dark) .stat-card {
            background: #1e293b;
          }
          
          .stat-card.active {
            background: #6366f1;
            color: white;
          }
          
          .stat-card.active .stat-value {
            color: white;
          }
          
          .stat-card:active {
            transform: scale(0.97);
          }
          
          .stat-value {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #6366f1;
          }
          
          .stat-label {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-top: 0.25rem;
          }
          
          .stat-card.active .stat-label {
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
          }
          
          /* Month Navigation */
          .month-nav {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            gap: 0.5rem;
          }
          
          .nav-btn {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1rem;
          }
          
          .today-btn {
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            background: #6366f1;
            color: white;

            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 500;
          }

            font-size: 1rem;

            border-radius: 8px;

            flex-direction: column;
          }

========== src\pages\admin\dashboard.js ==========
// pages/admin/dashboard.js
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { 
  FileText, CheckCircle, Edit3, Eye, DollarSign, Link as LinkIcon,
  TrendingUp, Calendar, BarChart3, Target, Zap, Users, Clock,
  ArrowUpRight, MoreHorizontal, Activity, Circle, Star, Plus
} from 'lucide-react';

export default function AdminDashboard() {
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({
    totalPosts: 0,
    publishedPosts: 0,
    draftPosts: 0,
    totalViews: 0,
    totalRevenue: 0,
    affiliateClicks: 0
  });
  const [recentPosts, setRecentPosts] = useState([]);
  const [topPosts, setTopPosts] = useState([]);
  const [recentActivity, setRecentActivity] = useState([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchDashboardData();
  }, []);

  const fetchDashboardData = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    
    try {
      const { data: posts } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .select('*')
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
      
      if (!posts) {
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }
      
      const totalPosts = posts.length;
      const publishedPosts = posts.filter(p => p.status === 'published').length;
      const draftPosts = posts.filter(p => p.status === 'draft').length;
      const totalViews = posts.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.views || 0), 0);
      
      let totalRevenue = 0;
      let affiliateClicks = 0;
      
      try {
        const { data: affiliateLinks } = await supabase
          .from('affiliate_links')
          .select('clicks, revenue');
        
        if (affiliateLinks) {
          affiliateClicks = affiliateLinks.reduce((sum, l) => sum + (l.clicks || 0), 0);
          totalRevenue = affiliateLinks.reduce((sum, l) => sum + (l.revenue || 0), 0);
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.log('Affiliate table not found');
      }
      
      setStats({
        totalPosts,
        publishedPosts,
        draftPosts,
        totalViews,
        totalRevenue,
        affiliateClicks
      });
      
      setRecentPosts(posts.slice(0, 5));
      
      const top5 = [...posts]
        .sort((a, b) => (b.views || 0) - (a.views || 0))
        .slice(0, 5)
        .map((post, index) => ({
          id: post.id,
          title: post.title,
          slug: post.slug,
          views: post.views || 0,
          status: post.status,
          rank: index + 1
        }));
      
      setTopPosts(top5);
      
      // Mock recent activity
      setRecentActivity([
        { id: 1, action: 'New post published', title: 'The Future of AI', time: '2 minutes ago', type: 'publish' },
        { id: 2, action: 'Revenue milestone', title: '$500 earned this month', time: '1 hour ago', type: 'revenue' },
        { id: 3, action: 'Traffic spike', title: '+45% views today', time: '3 hours ago', type: 'traffic' },
        { id: 4, action: 'New affiliate link', title: 'Amazon Deal Added', time: '5 hours ago', type: 'affiliate' },
      ]);
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching dashboard data:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const statCards = [
    { icon: FileText, value: stats.totalPosts, label: 'Total Posts', color: '#000000', bgColor: '#f5f5f5' },
    { icon: CheckCircle, value: stats.publishedPosts, label: 'Published', color: '#000000', bgColor: '#f5f5f5' },
    { icon: Edit3, value: stats.draftPosts, label: 'Drafts', color: '#000000', bgColor: '#f5f5f5' },
    { icon: Eye, value: stats.totalViews.toLocaleString(), label: 'Total Views', color: '#000000', bgColor: '#f5f5f5' },
    { icon: DollarSign, value: `$${stats.totalRevenue.toFixed(2)}`, label: 'Revenue', color: '#000000', bgColor: '#f5f5f5' },
    { icon: LinkIcon, value: stats.affiliateClicks.toLocaleString(), label: 'Affiliate Clicks', color: '#000000', bgColor: '#f5f5f5' },
  ];

  const featureLinks = [
    { href: '/admin/posts-manager', icon: FileText, title: 'Post Manager', description: 'Create, edit, and manage all your posts' },
    { href: '/admin/content-calendar', icon: Calendar, title: 'Content Calendar', description: 'Plan and schedule your content' },
    { href: '/admin/affiliate-manager', icon: LinkIcon, title: 'Affiliate Manager', description: 'Track affiliate links and earnings' },
    { href: '/admin/revenue-tracker', icon: TrendingUp, title: 'Revenue Tracker', description: 'Monitor your earnings' },
    { href: '/admin/post-analytics', icon: BarChart3, title: 'Post Analytics', description: 'Deep dive into post performance' },
    { href: '/admin/ad-manager', icon: Target, title: 'Ad Manager', description: 'Manage ad placements and revenue' },
  ];

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div className="loading-container">
          <div className="loading-spinner"></div>
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    );
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div className="dashboard">
        {/* Header with Create Post Button */}
        <div className="dashboard-header">
          <div>
            <h1>Dashboard</h1>
            <p className="subtitle">Welcome back to your control center</p>
          </div>
          <div className="header-actions">
            <Link href="/create-post" passHref>
              <button className="btn-primary">
                <Plus size={16} />
                <span>New Post</span>
              </button>
            </Link>
            <div className="header-date">
              <Clock size={14} />
              <span>{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stats Grid */}
        <div className="stats-grid">
          {statCards.map((stat, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="stat-card">
              <div className="stat-icon" style={{ backgroundColor: stat.bgColor }}>
                <stat.icon size={20} color={stat.color} />
              </div>
              <div className="stat-content">
                <div className="stat-value">{stat.value}</div>
                <div className="stat-label">{stat.label}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Two Column Layout */}
        <div className="two-columns">
          {/* Left Column - Top Posts */}
          <div className="card">
            <div className="card-header">
              <div className="card-title">
                <TrendingUp size={18} />
                <h3>Top Performing Posts</h3>
              </div>
              <Link href="/admin/post-analytics" className="card-link">
                View all <ArrowUpRight size={14} />
              </Link>
            </div>
            <div className="card-content">
              {topPosts.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="empty-state">No posts yet</div>
              ) : (
                <div className="top-posts-list">
                  {topPosts.map((post) => (
                    <Link key={post.id} href={`/admin/posts-manager?edit=${post.id}`} className="post-item">
                      <div className="post-rank">
                        {post.rank === 1 && <Star size={14} fill="#000" color="#000" />}
                        {post.rank === 2 && <span>2</span>}
                        {post.rank === 3 && <span>3</span>}
                        {post.rank > 3 && <span>{post.rank}</span>}
                      </div>
                      <div className="post-details">
                        <div className="post-title">{post.title || 'Untitled'}</div>
                        <div className="post-meta">
                          <span className={`status-badge ${post.status}`}>{post.status || 'draft'}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="post-views">{post.views.toLocaleString()} views</div>
                    </Link>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Right Column - Recent Activity */}
          <div className="card">
            <div className="card-header">
              <div className="card-title">
                <Activity size={18} />
                <h3>Recent Activity</h3>
              </div>
              <button className="card-link" onClick={() => fetchDashboardData()}>
                Refresh <ArrowUpRight size={14} />
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="card-content">
              <div className="activity-list">
                {recentActivity.map((activity) => (
                  <div key={activity.id} className="activity-item">
                    <div className="activity-icon">
                      {activity.type === 'publish' && <FileText size={14} />}
                      {activity.type === 'revenue' && <DollarSign size={14} />}
                      {activity.type === 'traffic' && <Eye size={14} />}
                      {activity.type === 'affiliate' && <LinkIcon size={14} />}
                    </div>
                    <div className="activity-details">
                      <div className="activity-action">{activity.action}</div>
                      <div className="activity-title">{activity.title}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="activity-time">{activity.time}</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Quick Actions Section */}
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-header">
            <h2>Quick Actions</h2>
            <p>Jump to your most used features</p>
          </div>
          <div className="features-grid">
            {featureLinks.map((feature, index) => (
              <Link key={index} href={feature.href} className="feature-card">
                <div className="feature-icon-wrapper">
                  <feature.icon size={24} strokeWidth={1.5} />
                </div>
                <div className="feature-info">
                  <h4>{feature.title}</h4>
                  <p>{feature.description}</p>
                </div>
                <ArrowUpRight size={16} className="feature-arrow" />
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Recent Posts Table */}
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-header">
            <h2>Recent Posts</h2>
            <Link href="/admin/posts-manager" className="section-link">
              Manage all posts <ArrowUpRight size={14} />
            </Link>
          </div>
          <div className="table-container">
            <table className="data-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Title</th>
                  <th>Status</th>
                  <th>Views</th>
                  <th>Date</th>
                  <th></th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {recentPosts.slice(0, 5).map((post) => (
                  <tr key={post.id}>
                    <td className="post-title-cell">
                      <Link href={`/admin/posts-manager?edit=${post.id}`} className="post-link">
                        {post.title || 'Untitled'}
                      </Link>
                    </td>
                    <td>
                      <span className={`status-badge ${post.status || 'draft'}`}>
                        {post.status || 'draft'}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="views-cell">{post.views?.toLocaleString() || 0}</td>
                    <td className="date-cell">{new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                    <td className="actions-cell">
                      <button className="action-btn">
                        <MoreHorizontal size={16} />
                      </button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
                {recentPosts.length === 0 && (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="empty-table">No posts yet. Create your first post!</td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <style jsx>{`
