========== src\pages\admin\login.js ==========
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'

export default function AdminLogin() {
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('')
  const [error, setError] = useState('')
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const router = useRouter()

  // Check if already logged in
  useEffect(() => {
    const sessionToken = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_token')
    const sessionExpiry = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_expiry')
    
    if (sessionToken && sessionExpiry) {
      const now = Date.now()
      if (now < parseInt(sessionExpiry)) {
        router.push('/admin')
      }
    }
  }, [router])

  const handleLogin = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    setLoading(true)
    setError('')

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/admin/verify', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ password })
      })

      const data = await res.json()

      if (data.success) {
        // Create session token (24 hour expiry)
        const token = btoa(`admin:${Date.now()}`)
        const expiry = Date.now() + (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
        
        localStorage.setItem('admin_session_token', token)
        localStorage.setItem('admin_session_expiry', expiry.toString())
        
        router.push('/admin')
      } else {
        setError('Invalid password')
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError('An error occurred. Please try again.')
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="login-container">
      <div className="login-card">
        <div className="login-header">
          <span className="login-icon">🔐</span>
          <h1>Admin Login</h1>
          <p>Enter your password to access the admin panel</p>
        </div>

        <form onSubmit={handleLogin}>
          <div className="input-group">
            <input
              type="password"
              placeholder="Enter admin password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              autoFocus
              required
            />
          </div>

          {error && <div className="error">{error}</div>}

          <button type="submit" disabled={loading}>
            {loading ? 'Logging in...' : 'Login'}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>

      <style jsx>{`
        .login-container {
          min-height: 100vh;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
          padding: 1rem;
        }
        
        .login-card {
          background: white;
          border-radius: 24px;
          padding: 2rem;
          width: 100%;
          max-width: 400px;
          box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
          animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease;
        }
        
        @keyframes fadeIn {
          from {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px);
          }
          to {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
          }
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .login-card {
          background: #1e293b;
        }
        
        .login-header {
          text-align: center;
          margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }
        
        .login-icon {
          font-size: 3rem;
          display: block;
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        
        .login-header h1 {
          font-size: 1.75rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
          background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
          -webkit-background-clip: text;
          -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
          background-clip: text;
        }
        
        .login-header p {
          color: #64748b;
          font-size: 0.875rem;
        }
        
        .input-group {
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        
        input {
          width: 100%;
          padding: 0.875rem 1rem;
          border: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
          border-radius: 12px;
          font-size: 1rem;
          transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) input {
          background: #0f172a;
          border-color: #334155;
          color: white;
        }
        
        input:focus {
          outline: none;
          border-color: #667eea;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.1);
        }
        
        button {
          width: 100%;
          padding: 0.875rem;
          background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
          color: white;
          border: none;
          border-radius: 12px;
          font-size: 1rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          cursor: pointer;
          transition: all 0.2s;
          margin-top: 0.5rem;
        }
        
        button:hover:not(:disabled) {
          transform: translateY(-2px);
          box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
        }
        
        button:active:not(:disabled) {
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        button:disabled {
          opacity: 0.7;
          cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        
        .error {
          color: #ef4444;
          font-size: 0.875rem;
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
          text-align: center;
          padding: 0.5rem;
          background: #fef2f2;
          border-radius: 8px;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .error {
          background: #7f1d1d;
          color: #fca5a5;
        }
        
        @media (max-width: 640px) {
          .login-card {
            padding: 1.5rem;
          }
          
          .login-header h1 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
          }
          
          input, button {
            padding: 0.75rem;
          }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

========== src\pages\admin\post-analytics.js ==========
// pages/admin/post-analytics.js - COMPLETE FIXED VERSION WITH ADMIN NAVIGATION
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation'
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  PointElement,
  LineElement,
  BarElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
  Filler,
  ArcElement
} from 'chart.js'
import { Line, Bar, Doughnut } from 'react-chartjs-2'

ChartJS.register(
  CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, BarElement,
  Title, Tooltip, Legend, Filler, ArcElement
)

export default function PostAnalytics() {
  const router = useRouter()
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState('30days')
  const [customStartDate, setCustomStartDate] = useState('')
  const [customEndDate, setCustomEndDate] = useState('')
  const [showDatePicker, setShowDatePicker] = useState(false)
  const [pickerMonth, setPickerMonth] = useState(new Date())
  const [selectedStartDate, setSelectedStartDate] = useState(null)
  const [selectedEndDate, setSelectedEndDate] = useState(null)
  const [selectingEnd, setSelectingEnd] = useState(false)
  const [selectedPost, setSelectedPost] = useState(null)
  const [showExportModal, setShowExportModal] = useState(false)
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false)
  const [exportDateRange, setExportDateRange] = useState('current')
  const [exportCustomStart, setExportCustomStart] = useState('')
  const [exportCustomEnd, setExportCustomEnd] = useState('')
  const [showExportCalendar, setShowExportCalendar] = useState(false)
  const [exportPickerMonth, setExportPickerMonth] = useState(new Date())
  const [exportSelectedStart, setExportSelectedStart] = useState(null)
  const [exportSelectedEnd, setExportSelectedEnd] = useState(null)
  const [exportSelectingEnd, setExportSelectingEnd] = useState(false)
  const [earliestPostDate, setEarliestPostDate] = useState(null)
  const [exportDataType, setExportDataType] = useState({
    posts: true,
    clicks: true,
    shares: true,
    referrals: true,
    devices: true,
    hourly: true,
    scroll: true
  })
  
  const datePickerRef = useRef(null)
  const exportPickerRef = useRef(null)
  
  const [overview, setOverview] = useState({
    totalViews: 0,
    uniqueViews: 0,
    totalPosts: 0,
    avgViewsPerPost: 0,
    publishedInRange: 0
  })
  
  const [dailyViews, setDailyViews] = useState([])
  const [dailyLabels, setDailyLabels] = useState([])
  const [categoryStats, setCategoryStats] = useState([])
  const [topPosts, setTopPosts] = useState([])
  const [referralSources, setReferralSources] = useState([])
  const [deviceStats, setDeviceStats] = useState({ mobile: 0, desktop: 0, tablet: 0 })
  const [hourlyData, setHourlyData] = useState([])
  const [scrollData, setScrollData] = useState({ depth25: 0, depth50: 0, depth75: 0, depth100: 0 })
  const [clickData, setClickData] = useState([])
  const [shareData, setShareData] = useState([])

  useEffect(() => {
    checkAuth()
    fetchEarliestPostDate()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!loading) {
      fetchAllData()
    }
  }, [dateRange, customStartDate, customEndDate])

  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event) {
      if (datePickerRef.current && !datePickerRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowDatePicker(false)
      }
      if (exportPickerRef.current && !exportPickerRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowExportCalendar(false)
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
  }, [])

  const checkAuth = async () => {
    const sessionToken = localStorage.getItem('admin_session_token')
    if (!sessionToken) {
      router.push('/admin/login')
      return
    }
    setLoading(false)
  }

  const fetchEarliestPostDate = async () => {
    try {
      const { data } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .select('published_at')
        .eq('status', 'published')
        .order('published_at', { ascending: true })
        .limit(1)
      
      if (data && data.length > 0 && data[0].published_at) {
        const date = new Date(data[0].published_at)
        const dateStr = `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}`
        setEarliestPostDate(dateStr)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching earliest post:', error)
    }
  }

  // Helper function to format date without timezone issues
  const formatDateYMD = (date) => {
    if (!date) return ''
    return `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}`
  }

  const getDateFilter = () => {
    const now = new Date()
    let startDate = new Date()
    
    if (dateRange === 'custom' && customStartDate && customEndDate) {
      return { start: customStartDate, end: customEndDate }
    }
    
    if (dateRange === '7days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 7)
    else if (dateRange === '30days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 30)
    else if (dateRange === '90days') startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 90)
    else startDate.setDate(now.getDate() - 30)
    
    return { 
      start: formatDateYMD(startDate), 
      end: formatDateYMD(now) 
    }
  }

  const formatDisplayDate = (dateStr) => {
    if (!dateStr) return ''
    const [year, month, day] = dateStr.split('-')
    const date = new Date(year, month - 1, day)
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })
  }

  const resetDateSelection = () => {
    setSelectedStartDate(null)
    setSelectedEndDate(null)
    setSelectingEnd(false)
    setCustomStartDate('')
    setCustomEndDate('')
    setDateRange('30days')
    setShowDatePicker(false)
  }

  const resetExportDateSelection = () => {
    setExportSelectedStart(null)
    setExportSelectedEnd(null)
    setExportSelectingEnd(false)
    setExportCustomStart('')
    setExportCustomEnd('')
    setShowExportCalendar(false)
  }

  const getDaysInMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate()
  }

  const getFirstDayOfMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month, 1).getDay()
  }

  const changeMonth = (delta) => {
    setPickerMonth(new Date(pickerMonth.getFullYear(), pickerMonth.getMonth() + delta, 1))
  }

  const changeExportMonth = (delta) => {
    setExportPickerMonth(new Date(exportPickerMonth.getFullYear(), exportPickerMonth.getMonth() + delta, 1))
  }

  const isDateInRange = (date) => {
    if (!selectedStartDate) return false
    if (!selectedEndDate) return date.toDateString() === selectedStartDate.toDateString()
    return date >= selectedStartDate && date <= selectedEndDate
  }

  const isStartDate = (date) => {
    return selectedStartDate && date.toDateString() === selectedStartDate.toDateString()
  }

  const isEndDate = (date) => {
    return selectedEndDate && date.toDateString() === selectedEndDate.toDateString()
  }

  const isExportDateInRange = (date) => {
    if (!exportSelectedStart) return false
    if (!exportSelectedEnd) return date.toDateString() === exportSelectedStart.toDateString()
    return date >= exportSelectedStart && date <= exportSelectedEnd
  }

  const isExportStartDate = (date) => {
    return exportSelectedStart && date.toDateString() === exportSelectedStart.toDateString()
  }

  const isExportEndDate = (date) => {
    return exportSelectedEnd && date.toDateString() === exportSelectedEnd.toDateString()
  }

  const handleDateClick = (date) => {
    if (!selectingEnd || !selectedStartDate) {
      setSelectedStartDate(date)
      setSelectedEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(true)
    } else {
      if (date < selectedStartDate) {
        setSelectedStartDate(date)
        setSelectedEndDate(null)
      } else {
        setSelectedEndDate(date)
        setSelectingEnd(false)
      }
    }
  }

  const handleExportDateClick = (date) => {
    if (!exportSelectingEnd || !exportSelectedStart) {
      setExportSelectedStart(date)
      setExportSelectedEnd(null)
      setExportSelectingEnd(true)
    } else {
      if (date < exportSelectedStart) {
        setExportSelectedStart(date)
        setExportSelectedEnd(null)
      } else {
        setExportSelectedEnd(date)
        setExportSelectingEnd(false)
      }
    }
  }

  // FIXED: Proper date formatting without timezone shift
  const applyCustomRange = () => {
    if (selectedStartDate && selectedEndDate) {
      const startStr = formatDateYMD(selectedStartDate)
      const endStr = formatDateYMD(selectedEndDate)
      setCustomStartDate(startStr)
      setCustomEndDate(endStr)
      setDateRange('custom')
      setShowDatePicker(false)
    }
  }

  // FIXED: Proper date formatting without timezone shift
  const applyExportCustomRange = () => {
    if (exportSelectedStart && exportSelectedEnd) {
      const startStr = formatDateYMD(exportSelectedStart)
      const endStr = formatDateYMD(exportSelectedEnd)
      setExportCustomStart(startStr)
      setExportCustomEnd(endStr)
      setExportDateRange('custom')
      setShowExportCalendar(false)
    }
  }

  const applyPresetRange = (days) => {
    const end = new Date()
    const start = new Date()
    start.setDate(end.getDate() - days)
    setCustomStartDate(formatDateYMD(start))
    setCustomEndDate(formatDateYMD(end))
    setDateRange('custom')
    setShowDatePicker(false)
    setSelectedStartDate(null)
    setSelectedEndDate(null)
    setSelectingEnd(false)
  }

  // FIXED: Proper date formatting without timezone shift
  const applyExportPresetRange = (days) => {
    const end = new Date()
    const start = new Date()
    start.setDate(end.getDate() - days)
    setExportCustomStart(formatDateYMD(start))
    setExportCustomEnd(formatDateYMD(end))
    setExportDateRange('custom')
    setShowExportCalendar(false)
    setExportSelectedStart(null)
    setExportSelectedEnd(null)
    setExportSelectingEnd(false)
  }

  const renderCalendar = () => {
    const year = pickerMonth.getFullYear()
    const month = pickerMonth.getMonth()
    const daysInMonth = getDaysInMonth(year, month)
    const firstDay = getFirstDayOfMonth(year, month)
    const today = new Date()
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    
    const calendarDays = []
    const weekdays = ['Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa', 'Su']
    
    let adjustedFirstDay = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1
    
    for (let i = 0; i < adjustedFirstDay; i++) {
      calendarDays.push(null)
    }
    
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const date = new Date(year, month, d)
      date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
      const isToday = date.toDateString() === today.toDateString()
      const inRange = isDateInRange(date)
      const isStart = isStartDate(date)
      const isEnd = isEndDate(date)
      
      calendarDays.push({ date, day: d, isToday, inRange, isStart, isEnd })
    }
    
    return { weekdays, calendarDays }
  }

  const renderExportCalendar = () => {
    const year = exportPickerMonth.getFullYear()
    const month = exportPickerMonth.getMonth()
    const daysInMonth = getDaysInMonth(year, month)
    const firstDay = getFirstDayOfMonth(year, month)
    const today = new Date()
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    
    const calendarDays = []
    const weekdays = ['Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa', 'Su']
    
    let adjustedFirstDay = firstDay === 0 ? 6 : firstDay - 1
    
    for (let i = 0; i < adjustedFirstDay; i++) {
      calendarDays.push(null)
    }
    
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const date = new Date(year, month, d)
      date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
      const isToday = date.toDateString() === today.toDateString()
      const inRange = isExportDateInRange(date)
      const isStart = isExportStartDate(date)
      const isEnd = isExportEndDate(date)
      
      calendarDays.push({ date, day: d, isToday, inRange, isStart, isEnd })
    }
    
    return { weekdays, calendarDays }
  }

  const { weekdays, calendarDays } = renderCalendar()
  const { weekdays: exportWeekdays, calendarDays: exportCalendarDays } = renderExportCalendar()

  const exportToCSV = async () => {
    setExporting(true)
    
    try {
      let start, end
      
      if (exportDateRange === 'current') {
        const filter = getDateFilter()
        start = filter.start
        end = filter.end
      } else if (exportDateRange === 'all') {
        if (earliestPostDate) {
          start = earliestPostDate
        } else {
          start = formatDateYMD(new Date())
        }
        end = formatDateYMD(new Date())
      } else if (exportDateRange === 'custom') {
        if (!exportCustomStart || !exportCustomEnd) {
          alert('Please select both start and end dates for custom range')
          setExporting(false)
          return
        }
        start = exportCustomStart
        end = exportCustomEnd
      } else {
        alert('Please select a valid date range')
        setExporting(false)
        return
      }
      
      if (!start || !end) {
        alert('Invalid date range selected')
        setExporting(false)
        return
      }
      
      const allRows = []
      
      allRows.push([`"Export generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}"`])
      allRows.push([`"Date range: ${start} to ${end}"`])
      allRows.push([])
      
      // POSTS DATA
      if (exportDataType.posts) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('posts')
          .select('title, category, views, unique_views, published_at, slug, status')
          .order('published_at', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          const startDateTime = `${start}T00:00:00`
          const endDateTime = `${end}T23:59:59`
          query = query.gte('published_at', startDateTime).lte('published_at', endDateTime)
        }
        
        const { data: posts } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== POSTS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Title', 'Category', 'Views', 'Unique Views', 'Published Date', 'Slug', 'Status'])
        
        if (posts && posts.length > 0) {
          posts.forEach(post => {
            allRows.push([
              `"${(post.title || '').replace(/"/g, '""')}"`,
              post.category || 'Uncategorized',
              post.views || 0,
              post.unique_views || 0,
              post.published_at ? new Date(post.published_at).toLocaleDateString() : '',
              post.slug || '',
              post.status || ''
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No posts data found for selected range', '', '', '', '', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // CLICKS DATA
      if (exportDataType.clicks) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('post_clicks')
          .select('post_id, link_url, link_type, click_count, click_date')
          .order('click_date', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          query = query.gte('click_date', start).lte('click_date', end)
        }
        
        const { data: clicks } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== LINK CLICKS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Post ID', 'Link URL', 'Link Type', 'Click Count', 'Click Date'])
        
        if (clicks && clicks.length > 0) {
          clicks.forEach(click => {
            allRows.push([
              click.post_id || '',
              click.link_url || '',
              click.link_type || 'internal',
              click.click_count || 0,
              click.click_date || ''
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No clicks data found for selected range', '', '', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // SHARES DATA
      if (exportDataType.shares) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('post_shares')
          .select('post_id, platform, share_count, share_date')
          .order('share_date', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          query = query.gte('share_date', start).lte('share_date', end)
        }
        
        const { data: shares } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== SHARES ==='])
        allRows.push(['Post ID', 'Platform', 'Share Count', 'Share Date'])
        
        if (shares && shares.length > 0) {
          shares.forEach(share => {
            allRows.push([
              share.post_id || '',
              share.platform || '',
              share.share_count || 0,
              share.share_date || ''
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No shares data found for selected range', '', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // REFERRALS DATA
      if (exportDataType.referrals) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('post_referrals')
          .select('post_id, source, referrer_url, view_count, view_date')
          .order('view_date', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          query = query.gte('view_date', start).lte('view_date', end)
        }
        
        const { data: referrals } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== TRAFFIC SOURCES ==='])
        allRows.push(['Post ID', 'Source', 'Referrer URL', 'View Count', 'View Date'])
        
        if (referrals && referrals.length > 0) {
          referrals.forEach(ref => {
            allRows.push([
              ref.post_id || '',
              ref.source || '',
              ref.referrer_url || 'direct',
              ref.view_count || 0,
              ref.view_date || ''
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No traffic sources data found for selected range', '', '', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // DEVICES DATA
      if (exportDataType.devices) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('post_sessions')
          .select('post_id, device_type, browser, os, country')
          .order('entry_time', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          const startDateTime = `${start}T00:00:00`
          const endDateTime = `${end}T23:59:59`
          query = query.gte('entry_time', startDateTime).lte('entry_time', endDateTime)
        }
        
        const { data: devices } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== DEVICES & BROWSERS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Post ID', 'Device Type', 'Browser', 'OS', 'Country'])
        
        if (devices && devices.length > 0) {
          devices.forEach(device => {
            allRows.push([
              device.post_id || '',
              device.device_type || 'unknown',
              device.browser || 'unknown',
              device.os || 'unknown',
              device.country || 'unknown'
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No devices data found for selected range', '', '', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // HOURLY DATA
      if (exportDataType.hourly) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('post_hourly_views')
          .select('post_id, view_hour, view_count')
          .order('view_hour', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          const startDateTime = `${start}T00:00:00`
          const endDateTime = `${end}T23:59:59`
          query = query.gte('view_hour', startDateTime).lte('view_hour', endDateTime)
        }
        
        const { data: hourly } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== HOURLY ENGAGEMENT ==='])
        allRows.push(['Post ID', 'View Hour', 'View Count'])
        
        if (hourly && hourly.length > 0) {
          hourly.forEach(hour => {
            allRows.push([
              hour.post_id || '',
              hour.view_hour ? new Date(hour.view_hour).toLocaleString() : '',
              hour.view_count || 0
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No hourly data found for selected range', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      // SCROLL DATA
      if (exportDataType.scroll) {
        let query = supabase
          .from('post_scroll_depth')
          .select('post_id, depth_25, depth_50, depth_75, depth_100')
          .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
        
        if (exportDateRange !== 'all') {
          const startDateTime = `${start}T00:00:00`
          const endDateTime = `${end}T23:59:59`
          query = query.gte('created_at', startDateTime).lte('created_at', endDateTime)
        }
        
        const { data: scroll } = await query
        
        allRows.push(['=== SCROLL DEPTH ==='])
        allRows.push(['Post ID', '25% Scroll', '50% Scroll', '75% Scroll', '100% Scroll'])
        
        if (scroll && scroll.length > 0) {
          scroll.forEach(item => {
            allRows.push([
              item.post_id || '',
              item.depth_25 ? 'Yes' : 'No',
              item.depth_50 ? 'Yes' : 'No',
              item.depth_75 ? 'Yes' : 'No',
              item.depth_100 ? 'Yes' : 'No'
            ])
          })
        } else {
          allRows.push(['No scroll depth data found for selected range', '', '', '', ''])
        }
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (allRows.length <= 3) {
        alert('No data found for the selected range')
        setExporting(false)
        return
      }
      
      const csvContent = allRows.map(row => row.join(',')).join('\n')
      const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' })
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      const link = document.createElement('a')
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute('download', `analytics-export-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      document.body.removeChild(link)
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Export error:', error)
      alert('Export failed: ' + error.message)
    } finally {
      setExporting(false)
      setShowExportModal(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchAllData = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
    
    try {
      const { data: posts, error: postsError } = await supabase
        .from('posts')
        .select('id, title, slug, category, views, unique_views, created_at, published_at, status')
        .order('views', { ascending: false })

      if (postsError) throw postsError
      const safePosts = posts || []

      const filteredPosts = safePosts.filter(post => {
        const postDate = post.published_at?.split('T')[0]
        return postDate >= start && postDate <= end
      })

      const totalViews = filteredPosts.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.views || 0), 0)
      const uniqueViews = filteredPosts.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.unique_views || 0), 0)
      const totalPostsCount = filteredPosts.length
      const avgViewsPerPost = totalPostsCount > 0 ? Math.round(totalViews / totalPostsCount) : 0
      const publishedInRange = filteredPosts.length

      setOverview({ totalViews, uniqueViews, totalPosts: safePosts.length, avgViewsPerPost, publishedInRange })

      const { data: daily, error: dailyError } = await supabase
        .from('post_daily_views')
        .select('view_date, view_count')
        .gte('view_date', start)
        .lte('view_date', end)
        .order('view_date', { ascending: true })

      if (!dailyError && daily && daily.length > 0) {
        setDailyLabels(daily.map(d => new Date(d.view_date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })))
        setDailyViews(daily.map(d => d.view_count))
      } else {
        setDailyLabels([])
        setDailyViews([])
      }

      const categoryMap = new Map()
      filteredPosts.forEach(post => {
        const cat = post.category || 'Uncategorized'
        if (!categoryMap.has(cat)) categoryMap.set(cat, { views: 0, count: 0 })
        const data = categoryMap.get(cat)
        data.views += post.views || 0
        data.count++
      })
      setCategoryStats(Array.from(categoryMap.entries()).map(([name, data]) => ({
        name, views: data.views, count: data.count
      })).sort((a, b) => b.views - a.views))

      setTopPosts(filteredPosts.slice(0, 10).map((post, i) => ({
        rank: i + 1, id: post.id, title: post.title, category: post.category || 'Uncategorized',
        views: post.views || 0, slug: post.slug
      })))

      const { data: referrals, error: refError } = await supabase
        .from('post_referrals')
        .select('source, view_count')
        .gte('view_date', start)
        .lte('view_date', end)

      if (!refError && referrals && referrals.length > 0) {
        const sourceMap = new Map()
        referrals.forEach(r => {
          sourceMap.set(r.source, (sourceMap.get(r.source) || 0) + (r.view_count || 0))
        })
        setReferralSources(Array.from(sourceMap.entries()).map(([name, count]) => ({ name, count })))
      } else {
        setReferralSources([])
      }

      const { data: sessions, error: sessionError } = await supabase
        .from('post_sessions')
        .select('device_type')
        .gte('entry_time', `${start}T00:00:00`)
        .lte('entry_time', `${end}T23:59:59`)

      if (!sessionError && sessions && sessions.length > 0) {
        const devices = { mobile: 0, desktop: 0, tablet: 0 }
        sessions.forEach(s => {
          const device = s.device_type || 'desktop'
          devices[device] = (devices[device] || 0) + 1
        })
        setDeviceStats(devices)
      } else {
        setDeviceStats({ mobile: 0, desktop: 0, tablet: 0 })
      }

      const { data: hourly, error: hourlyError } = await supabase
        .from('post_hourly_views')
        .select('view_hour, view_count')
        .gte('view_hour', `${start}T00:00:00`)
        .lte('view_hour', `${end}T23:59:59`)

      if (!hourlyError && hourly && hourly.length > 0) {
        const hourMap = new Array(24).fill(0)
        hourly.forEach(h => {
          const hour = new Date(h.view_hour).getHours()
          hourMap[hour] += h.view_count || 0
        })
        setHourlyData(hourMap)
      } else {
        setHourlyData(new Array(24).fill(0))
      }

      const { data: scroll, error: scrollError } = await supabase
        .from('post_scroll_depth')
        .select('depth_25, depth_50, depth_75, depth_100')
        .gte('created_at', `${start}T00:00:00`)
        .lte('created_at', `${end}T23:59:59`)

      if (!scrollError && scroll && scroll.length > 0) {
        setScrollData({
          depth25: scroll.filter(s => s.depth_25).length,
          depth50: scroll.filter(s => s.depth_50).length,
          depth75: scroll.filter(s => s.depth_75).length,
          depth100: scroll.filter(s => s.depth_100).length
        })
      } else {
        setScrollData({ depth25: 0, depth50: 0, depth75: 0, depth100: 0 })
      }

      const { data: clicks, error: clickError } = await supabase
        .from('post_clicks')
        .select('link_type, click_count')
        .gte('click_date', start)
        .lte('click_date', end)

      if (!clickError && clicks && clicks.length > 0) {
        const clickMap = new Map()
        clicks.forEach(c => {
          clickMap.set(c.link_type || 'internal', (clickMap.get(c.link_type || 'internal') || 0) + (c.click_count || 0))
        })
        setClickData(Array.from(clickMap.entries()).map(([type, count]) => ({ type, count })))
      } else {
        setClickData([])
      }

      const { data: shares, error: shareError } = await supabase
        .from('post_shares')
        .select('platform, share_count')
        .gte('share_date', start)
        .lte('share_date', end)

      if (!shareError && shares && shares.length > 0) {
        const shareMap = new Map()
        shares.forEach(s => {
          shareMap.set(s.platform, (shareMap.get(s.platform) || 0) + (s.share_count || 0))
        })
        setShareData(Array.from(shareMap.entries()).map(([platform, count]) => ({ platform, count })))
      } else {
        setShareData([])
      }

    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching analytics:', error)
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const chartOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 10 } } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#1e293b', titleColor: '#f1f5f9', bodyColor: '#94a3b8' }
    },
    scales: {
      y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: '#e2e8f0' }, ticks: { color: '#64748b' } },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#64748b', maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45 } }
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div className="loading-container">
          <div className="loading-spinner"></div>
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    )
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div className="analytics">
        <div className="analytics-header">
          <div className="header-left">
            <div className="header-icon">📊</div>
            <div>
              <h1>Post Analytics</h1>
              <p className="subtitle">Track your content performance</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowExportModal(true)} className="export-btn" disabled={exporting}>
            {exporting ? '⏳ Exporting...' : '📥 Export CSV'}
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Date Range Selector */}
        <div className="date-range-container">
          <div className="range-buttons">
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '7days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('7days'); setShowDatePicker(false); }}>
              7d
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '30days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('30days'); setShowDatePicker(false); }}>
              30d
            </button>
            <button className={`range-btn ${dateRange === '90days' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setDateRange('90days'); setShowDatePicker(false); }}>
              90d
            </button>
            
            <div className="custom-range-wrapper" ref={datePickerRef}>
              <button className={`range-btn custom-btn ${dateRange === 'custom' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(!showDatePicker)}>
                📅 {dateRange === 'custom' && customStartDate && customEndDate 
                  ? `${formatDisplayDate(customStartDate)} - ${formatDisplayDate(customEndDate)}`
                  : 'Custom'}
              </button>
              
              {showDatePicker && (
                <div className="compact-calendar-picker">
                  <div className="picker-header">
                    <span>Select date range</span>
                    <button className="picker-close" onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(false)}>×</button>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="picker-body">
                    <div className="preset-row">
                      <button onClick={() => { applyPresetRange(7); setDateRange('custom'); }}>7d</button>
                      <button onClick={() => { applyPresetRange(30); setDateRange('custom'); }}>30d</button>
                      <button onClick={() => { applyPresetRange(90); setDateRange('custom'); }}>90d</button>
                      <button onClick={() => { applyPresetRange(365); setDateRange('custom'); }}>1y</button>
                      <button onClick={resetDateSelection}>Reset</button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="selection-status">
                      {selectingEnd ? 'Select end date →' : selectedStartDate ? 'Select end date' : 'Select start date'}
                    </div>
                    
                    {selectedStartDate && (
                      <div className="selected-range">
                        {selectedStartDate.toLocaleDateString()} {selectedEndDate && `→ ${selectedEndDate.toLocaleDateString()}`}
                      </div>
                    )}
                    
                    <div className="compact-calendar-nav">
                      <button onClick={() => changeMonth(-1)}>←</button>
                      <span>{pickerMonth.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })}</span>
                      <button onClick={() => changeMonth(1)}>→</button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="compact-weekdays">
                      {weekdays.map(day => <div key={day}>{day}</div>)}
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="compact-days">
                      {calendarDays.map((day, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="compact-day-cell">
                          {day && (
                            <button
                              className={`compact-day-btn 
                                ${day.isToday ? 'today' : ''} 
                                ${day.inRange ? 'in-range' : ''} 
                                ${day.isStart ? 'start' : ''} 
                                ${day.isEnd ? 'end' : ''}`}
                              onClick={() => handleDateClick(day.date)}
                            >
                              {day.day}
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="picker-footer">
                    <button className="cancel-btn" onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(false)}>Cancel</button>
                    {selectedStartDate && selectedEndDate && (
                      <button className="apply-btn" onClick={applyCustomRange}>Apply</button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stats Grid */}
        <div className="stats-grid">
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">👁️</div><div className="stat-value">{overview.totalViews.toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Total views</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">👤</div><div className="stat-value">{overview.uniqueViews.toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Unique visitors</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">📝</div><div className="stat-value">{overview.totalPosts}</div><div className="stat-label">Total posts</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">📊</div><div className="stat-value">{overview.avgViewsPerPost.toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Avg per post</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">📅</div><div className="stat-value">{overview.publishedInRange}</div><div className="stat-label">Published in range</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">🔗</div><div className="stat-value">{clickData.reduce((s, c) => s + c.count, 0).toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Total clicks</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">📢</div><div className="stat-value">{shareData.reduce((s, c) => s + c.count, 0).toLocaleString()}</div><div className="stat-label">Total shares</div></div>
          <div className="stat-card"><div className="stat-icon">🌐</div><div className="stat-value">{referralSources.length}</div><div className="stat-label">Traffic sources</div></div>
        </div>

        {/* Views Chart */}
        {dailyViews.length > 0 ? (
          <div className="chart-card">
            <div className="card-header"><h3>📈 Views over time</h3><div className="card-badge">{dailyViews.reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0).toLocaleString()} total views</div></div>
            <div className="chart-container"><Line data={{ labels: dailyLabels, datasets: [{ label: 'Views', data: dailyViews, borderColor: '#6366f1', backgroundColor: 'rgba(99,102,241,0.05)', fill: true, tension: 0.3 }] }} options={chartOptions} /></div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="chart-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>📈 Views over time</h3></div><div className="empty-state">No data for selected period</div></div>
        )}

        {/* Two Column Layouts */}
        <div className="grid-2">
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>🏆 Top performing posts</h3><span className="card-badge">{topPosts.length} posts</span></div>
            {topPosts.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="posts-list">{topPosts.map(post => (<div key={post.id} className="post-item" onClick={() => setSelectedPost(post)}><div className={`post-rank rank-${post.rank}`}>{post.rank}</div><div className="post-info"><div className="post-title">{post.title.length > 35 ? post.title.slice(0, 35) + '...' : post.title}</div><div className="post-meta">{post.category}</div></div><div className="post-views">{post.views.toLocaleString()}</div></div>))}</div>
            ) : <div className="empty-state">No posts in this period</div>}
          </div>
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>📁 Views by category</h3></div>
            {categoryStats.length > 0 ? (<div className="chart-container-small"><Bar data={{ labels: categoryStats.map(c => c.name.length > 12 ? c.name.slice(0, 12) + '...' : c.name), datasets: [{ label: 'Views', data: categoryStats.map(c => c.views), backgroundColor: '#10b981', borderRadius: 8 }] }} options={{ ...chartOptions, indexAxis: 'y', plugins: { ...chartOptions.plugins, legend: { display: false } } }} /></div>) : <div className="empty-state">No category data</div>}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid-2">
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>🌐 Traffic sources</h3></div>
            {referralSources.length > 0 ? (<div className="chart-container-small"><Doughnut data={{ labels: referralSources.map(r => r.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + r.name.slice(1)), datasets: [{ data: referralSources.map(r => r.count), backgroundColor: ['#6366f1', '#8b5cf6', '#ec4899', '#f59e0b', '#10b981', '#06b6d4'], borderWidth: 0 }] }} options={{ responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'right' } } }} /></div>) : <div className="empty-state">No referral data</div>}
          </div>
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>📱 Device breakdown</h3></div>
            {(deviceStats.mobile > 0 || deviceStats.desktop > 0 || deviceStats.tablet > 0) ? (<><div className="chart-container-small"><Doughnut data={{ labels: ['Mobile', 'Desktop', 'Tablet'], datasets: [{ data: [deviceStats.mobile, deviceStats.desktop, deviceStats.tablet], backgroundColor: ['#6366f1', '#10b981', '#f59e0b'], borderWidth: 0 }] }} options={{ responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'right' } } }} /></div><div className="device-insight">{deviceStats.mobile > deviceStats.desktop ? '📱 Mobile-first audience' : '🖥️ Desktop-first audience'}</div></>) : <div className="empty-state">No device data</div>}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid-2">
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>⏰ Hourly engagement</h3></div>
            {hourlyData.some(v => v > 0) ? (<><div className="hourly-grid">{hourlyData.map((views, hour) => { const maxViews = Math.max(...hourlyData); const intensity = maxViews > 0 ? (views / maxViews) * 100 : 0; return (<div key={hour} className="hour-cell" style={{ backgroundColor: `rgba(99, 102, 241, ${Math.max(0.1, intensity / 100)})` }}><span className="hour-label">{hour}</span><span className="hour-value">{views}</span></div>); })}</div><div className="hourly-insight">🔥 Peak: {hourlyData.indexOf(Math.max(...hourlyData))}:00 ({Math.max(...hourlyData)} views)</div></>) : <div className="empty-state">No hourly data</div>}
          </div>
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>📜 Scroll depth</h3></div>
            {(scrollData.depth25 > 0 || scrollData.depth50 > 0 || scrollData.depth75 > 0 || scrollData.depth100 > 0) ? (<div className="scroll-stats"><div className="scroll-row"><span className="scroll-label">25%</span><div className="scroll-bar"><div className="scroll-fill" style={{ width: '100%' }}></div></div><span className="scroll-value">{scrollData.depth25}</span></div><div className="scroll-row"><span className="scroll-label">50%</span><div className="scroll-bar"><div className="scroll-fill" style={{ width: scrollData.depth25 > 0 ? (scrollData.depth50 / scrollData.depth25) * 100 : 0, background: '#10b981' }}></div></div><span className="scroll-value">{scrollData.depth50}</span></div><div className="scroll-row"><span className="scroll-label">75%</span><div className="scroll-bar"><div className="scroll-fill" style={{ width: scrollData.depth50 > 0 ? (scrollData.depth75 / scrollData.depth50) * 100 : 0, background: '#f59e0b' }}></div></div><span className="scroll-value">{scrollData.depth75}</span></div><div className="scroll-row"><span className="scroll-label">100%</span><div className="scroll-bar"><div className="scroll-fill" style={{ width: scrollData.depth75 > 0 ? (scrollData.depth100 / scrollData.depth75) * 100 : 0, background: '#ef4444' }}></div></div><span className="scroll-value">{scrollData.depth100}</span></div></div>) : <div className="empty-state">No scroll data</div>}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid-2">
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>🔗 Link clicks</h3></div>
            {clickData.length > 0 ? (<div className="chart-container-small"><Doughnut data={{ labels: clickData.map(c => c.type), datasets: [{ data: clickData.map(c => c.count), backgroundColor: ['#6366f1', '#10b981', '#f59e0b'], borderWidth: 0 }] }} options={{ responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'right' } } }} /></div>) : <div className="empty-state">No click data</div>}
          </div>
          <div className="data-card"><div className="card-header"><h3>📢 Shares by platform</h3></div>
            {shareData.length > 0 ? (<div className="chart-container-small"><Doughnut data={{ labels: shareData.map(s => s.platform), datasets: [{ data: shareData.map(s => s.count), backgroundColor: ['#1877F2', '#1DA1F2', '#0A66C2', '#25D366'], borderWidth: 0 }] }} options={{ responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'right' } } }} /></div>) : <div className="empty-state">No share data</div>}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Export Modal */}
        {showExportModal && (
          <div className="modal-overlay" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>
            <div className="modal-content export-modal" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header"><h3>📥 Export Analytics Data</h3><button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>×</button></div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="export-section">
                  <label className="export-label">Date Range</label>
                  <div className="export-range-buttons">
                    <button className={`export-range-btn ${exportDateRange === 'current' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setExportDateRange('current'); setShowExportCalendar(false); resetExportDateSelection(); }}>
                      Current Range
                    </button>
                    <button className={`export-range-btn ${exportDateRange === 'all' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setExportDateRange('all'); setShowExportCalendar(false); resetExportDateSelection(); }}>
                      All Time
                    </button>
                    
                    <div className="custom-range-wrapper" ref={exportPickerRef}>
                      <button className={`export-range-btn ${exportDateRange === 'custom' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setShowExportCalendar(!showExportCalendar)}>
                        Custom Range
                      </button>
                      
                      {showExportCalendar && (
                        <div className="export-calendar-picker">
                          <div className="picker-header">
                            <span>Select date range</span>
                            <button className="picker-close" onClick={() => setShowExportCalendar(false)}>×</button>
                          </div>
                          
                          <div className="picker-body">
                            <div className="preset-row">
                              <button onClick={() => { applyExportPresetRange(7); setExportDateRange('custom'); }}>7d</button>
                              <button onClick={() => { applyExportPresetRange(30); setExportDateRange('custom'); }}>30d</button>
                              <button onClick={() => { applyExportPresetRange(90); setExportDateRange('custom'); }}>90d</button>
                              <button onClick={() => { applyExportPresetRange(365); setExportDateRange('custom'); }}>1y</button>
                              <button onClick={resetExportDateSelection}>Reset</button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div className="selection-status">
                              {exportSelectingEnd ? 'Select end date →' : exportSelectedStart ? 'Select end date' : 'Select start date'}
                            </div>
                            
                            {exportSelectedStart && (
                              <div className="selected-range">
                                {exportSelectedStart.toLocaleDateString()} {exportSelectedEnd && `→ ${exportSelectedEnd.toLocaleDateString()}`}
                              </div>
                            )}
                            
                            <div className="compact-calendar-nav">
                              <button onClick={() => changeExportMonth(-1)}>←</button>
                              <span>{exportPickerMonth.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })}</span>
                              <button onClick={() => changeExportMonth(1)}>→</button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div className="compact-weekdays">
                              {exportWeekdays.map(day => <div key={day}>{day}</div>)}
                            </div>
                            
                            <div className="compact-days">
                              {exportCalendarDays.map((day, idx) => (
                                <div key={idx} className="compact-day-cell">
                                  {day && (
                                    <button
                                      className={`compact-day-btn 
                                        ${day.isToday ? 'today' : ''} 
                                        ${day.inRange ? 'in-range' : ''} 
                                        ${day.isStart ? 'start' : ''} 
                                        ${day.isEnd ? 'end' : ''}`}
                                      onClick={() => handleExportDateClick(day.date)}
                                    >
                                      {day.day}
                                    </button>
                                  )}
                                </div>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          
                          <div className="picker-footer">
                            <button className="cancel-btn" onClick={() => setShowExportCalendar(false)}>Cancel</button>
                            {exportSelectedStart && exportSelectedEnd && (
                              <button className="apply-btn" onClick={applyExportCustomRange}>Apply</button>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="export-section">
                  <label className="export-label">Data to Include</label>
                  <div className="export-checkboxes">
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.posts} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, posts: e.target.checked})} /><span>📝 Posts Data</span></label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.clicks} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, clicks: e.target.checked})} /><span>🔗 Link Clicks</span></label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.shares} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, shares: e.target.checked})} /><span>📢 Shares</span></label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.referrals} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, referrals: e.target.checked})} /><span>🌐 Traffic Sources</span></label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.devices} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, devices: e.target.checked})} /><span>📱 Devices & Browsers</span></label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.hourly} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, hourly: e.target.checked})} /><span>⏰ Hourly Engagement</span></label>
                    <label className="export-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked={exportDataType.scroll} onChange={(e) => setExportDataType({...exportDataType, scroll: e.target.checked})} /><span>📜 Scroll Depth</span></label>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="export-actions">
                  <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={() => setShowExportModal(false)}>Cancel</button>
                  <button className="btn-primary" onClick={exportToCSV} disabled={exporting}>{exporting ? 'Exporting...' : 'Download CSV'}</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Post Modal */}
        {selectedPost && (
          <div className="modal-overlay" onClick={() => setSelectedPost(null)}>
            <div className="modal-content" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <div className="modal-header"><h3>{selectedPost.title}</h3><button className="modal-close" onClick={() => setSelectedPost(null)}>×</button></div>
              <div className="modal-body">
                <div className="modal-stats"><div><strong>{selectedPost.views.toLocaleString()}</strong> views</div><div><strong>#{selectedPost.rank}</strong> rank</div><div><strong>{selectedPost.category}</strong></div></div>
                <div className="modal-actions"><a href={`/blog/${selectedPost.slug}`} target="_blank" className="btn-primary">View post</a><a href={`/admin/edit/${selectedPost.id}`} className="btn-secondary">Edit post</a></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <style jsx>{`
          .analytics {
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #f8fafc;
            padding: 1rem;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 100%;
          }
          
          :global(body.dark) .analytics {
            background: #0f172a;
          }
          
          .analytics-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.75rem;
          }
          
          .header-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
          }
          
          .header-icon {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6);
            border-radius: 12px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1.25rem;
          }
          
          .analytics-header h1 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 0.125rem;
          }
          
          .subtitle {
            color: #64748b;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
          }
          
          .export-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;

            padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
            background: white;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 10px;

            font-size: 0.75rem;

          }

            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            width: 100%;
          }

            display: flex;

            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
          }

            padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
            background: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 30px;
            cursor: pointer;

            font-weight: 500;

          }

            background: #6366f1;

          }

            display: flex;

          }

            position: relative;

            position: absolute;

          }

            width: 24px;

          }

            font-size: 0.7rem;
          }

            display: grid;

            gap: 2px;

          }

            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.55rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #64748b;
            padding: 0.2rem;
          }
          
          .compact-days {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 2px;
          }
          
          .compact-day-cell {
            aspect-ratio: 1;
          }
          
          .compact-day-btn {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            font-weight: 500;
          }
          
          .compact-day-btn:hover {
            background: #f1f5f9;
          }
          
          .compact-day-btn.today {
            border: 1px solid #6366f1;

========== src\pages\admin\posts-manager.js ==========
// pages/admin/posts-manager.js
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation'
import Link from 'next/link'

// ============================================
// DEVICE DETECTION & PREVIEW COMPONENT
// ============================================
const DevicePreviewModal = ({ post, onClose }) => {
  const [device, setDevice] = useState('desktop')
  const [iframeRef, setIframeRef] = useState(null)
  
  const devices = {
    desktop: { width: '1200px', height: '800px', icon: '🖥️', userAgent: 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' },
    tablet: { width: '768px', height: '1024px', icon: '📱', userAgent: 'Mozilla/5.0 (iPad; CPU OS 14_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15' },
    mobile: { width: '375px', height: '667px', icon: '📱', userAgent: 'Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 14_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15' }
  }
  
  const generatePreviewHTML = () => {
    const styles = `
      <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body { 
          font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
          line-height: 1.6;
          color: #1a1a2e;
          background: white;
        }
        .preview-container {
          max-width: 800px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          padding: 40px 20px;
        }
        .preview-title {
          font-size: 48px;
          font-weight: 700;
          line-height: 1.2;
          margin-bottom: 24px;
          color: #1a1a2e;
        }
        .preview-meta {
          display: flex;
          gap: 16px;
          margin-bottom: 32px;
          padding-bottom: 16px;
          border-bottom: 1px solid #eef2f6;
          color: #64748b;
          font-size: 14px;
        }
        .preview-content {
          font-size: 18px;
        }
        .preview-content p {
          margin-bottom: 24px;
        }
        .preview-content img {
          max-width: 100%;
          height: auto;
          border-radius: 12px;
          margin: 32px 0;
        }
        .preview-content h2 {
          font-size: 32px;
          margin: 32px 0 16px;
        }
        .preview-content h3 {
          font-size: 24px;
          margin: 24px 0 12px;
        }
        .preview-content blockquote {
          border-left: 4px solid #1a1a2e;
          padding-left: 20px;
          margin: 24px 0;
          color: #475569;
          font-style: italic;
        }
        .device-watermark {
          position: fixed;
          bottom: 16px;
          right: 16px;
          font-size: 12px;
          color: #cbd5e1;
          background: white;
          padding: 4px 12px;
          border-radius: 20px;
          box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .preview-title { font-size: 32px; }
          .preview-container { padding: 20px; }
          .preview-content { font-size: 16px; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
          .preview-title { font-size: 24px; }
          .preview-container { padding: 16px; }
        }
      </style>
    `
    
    // Handle both template types
    let content = ''
    if (post.template_type === 'block_based' && post.blocks && post.blocks.length > 0) {
      content = post.blocks.map(block => {
        if (block.content?.html) return block.content.html
        return ''
      }).join('')
    } else {
      content = post.content || '<p>No content available for preview.</p>'
    }
    
    return `
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>
        <head>
          <meta charset="UTF-8">
          <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
          <title>Preview: ${post.title}</title>
          ${styles}
        </head>
        <body>
          <div class="preview-container">
            <h1 class="preview-title">${post.title || 'Untitled Post'}</h1>
            <div class="preview-meta">
              <span>📅 ${new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
              <span>📁 ${post.category || 'Uncategorized'}</span>
              <span>👁️ ${post.views || 0} views</span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-content">
              ${content}
            </div>
            <div class="device-watermark">
              Previewing on ${device} • ${devices[device].width}
            </div>
          </div>
        </body>
      </html>
    `
  }
  
  useEffect(() => {
    if (iframeRef) {
      const doc = iframeRef.contentDocument
      doc.open()
      doc.write(generatePreviewHTML())
      doc.close()
    }
  }, [device, iframeRef, post])
  
  return (
    <div style={{
      position: 'fixed',
      top: 0,
      left: 0,
      right: 0,
      bottom: 0,
      background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
      backdropFilter: 'blur(8px)',
      zIndex: 1000,
      display: 'flex',
      alignItems: 'center',
      justifyContent: 'center',
      padding: '24px'
    }}>
      <div style={{
        background: 'white',
        borderRadius: '24px',
        width: '100%',
        maxWidth: '1400px',
        height: '90vh',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        boxShadow: '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'
      }}>
        {/* Preview Header */}
        <div style={{
          padding: '20px 24px',
          borderBottom: '1px solid #eef2f6',
          display: 'flex',
          justifyContent: 'space-between',
          alignItems: 'center',
          background: 'white'
        }}>
          <div>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: '600', margin: 0 }}>Post Preview</h3>
            <p style={{ fontSize: '13px', color: '#64748b', marginTop: '4px' }}>{post.title}</p>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{
            background: 'none',
            border: 'none',
            fontSize: '24px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
            padding: '4px 8px',
            borderRadius: '8px',
            transition: 'background 0.2s'
          }}>×</button>
        </div>
        
        {/* Device Selector */}
        <div style={{
          padding: '16px 24px',
          borderBottom: '1px solid #eef2f6',
          display: 'flex',
          gap: '12px',
          background: '#f8fafc'
        }}>
          {Object.entries(devices).map(([key, config]) => (
            <button
              key={key}
              onClick={() => setDevice(key)}
              style={{
                padding: '10px 20px',
                background: device === key ? '#1a1a2e' : 'white',
                color: device === key ? 'white' : '#1a1a2e',
                border: device === key ? 'none' : '1px solid #eef2f6',
                borderRadius: '12px',
                cursor: 'pointer',
                fontSize: '14px',
                fontWeight: '500',
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: '8px',
                transition: 'all 0.2s'
              }}
            >
              <span>{config.icon}</span>
              <span>{key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1)}</span>
              <span style={{ fontSize: '11px', opacity: 0.7 }}>({config.width})</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        {/* Device Frame & Preview */}
        <div style={{
          flex: 1,
          overflow: 'auto',
          padding: '24px',
          background: '#f1f5f9',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'center'
        }}>
          <div style={{
            width: devices[device].width,
            height: devices[device].height,
            background: 'white',
            borderRadius: device !== 'desktop' ? '32px' : '0',
            boxShadow: '0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)',
            overflow: 'auto',
            transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
            position: 'relative'
          }}>
            <iframe
              ref={setIframeRef}
              title="Post Preview"
              style={{
                width: '100%',
                height: '100%',
                border: 'none',
                background: 'white'
              }}
              sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts"
            />
            {device !== 'desktop' && (
              <div style={{
                position: 'absolute',
                top: '8px',
                left: '50%',
                transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
                width: '120px',
                height: '4px',
                background: '#e2e8f0',
                borderRadius: '2px'
              }} />
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ============================================
// PREMIUM CUSTOM DROPDOWN
// ============================================
const PremiumSelect = ({ value, onChange, options, placeholder }) => {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)
  const ref = useRef(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e) => {
      if (ref.current && !ref.current.contains(e.target)) setIsOpen(false)
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
  }, [])

  const selected = options.find(opt => opt.value === value)

  return (
    <div ref={ref} style={{ position: 'relative', width: '100%' }}>
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '14px 16px',
          background: 'white',
          border: '1px solid #eef2f6',
          borderRadius: '14px',
          fontSize: '14px',
          textAlign: 'left',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          display: 'flex',
          justifyContent: 'space-between',
          alignItems: 'center',
          color: '#1a1a2e',
          fontWeight: '500',
          transition: 'all 0.2s'
        }}
      >
        <span>{selected?.label || placeholder}</span>
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style={{ transform: isOpen ? 'rotate(180deg)' : 'none', transition: 'transform 0.2s' }}>
          <path d="M6 9L12 15L18 9" stroke="#94a3b8" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </button>
      
      {isOpen && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: 'calc(100% + 8px)',
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          background: 'white',
          border: '1px solid #eef2f6',
          borderRadius: '14px',
          boxShadow: '0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)',
          zIndex: 50,
          overflow: 'hidden'
        }}>
          {options.map(opt => (
            <button
              key={opt.value}
              onClick={() => { onChange(opt.value); setIsOpen(false) }}
              style={{
                width: '100%',
                padding: '12px 16px',
                textAlign: 'left',
                background: value === opt.value ? '#f8fafc' : 'white',
                border: 'none',
                cursor: 'pointer',
                fontSize: '14px',
                color: '#1a1a2e',
                transition: 'background 0.15s'
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = '#f8fafc'}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = value === opt.value ? '#f8fafc' : 'white'}
            >
              {opt.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ============================================
// PREMIUM CALENDAR DATE PICKER
// ============================================
const PremiumDatePicker = ({ startDate, endDate, onStartChange, onEndChange }) => {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)
  const [tempStart, setTempStart] = useState(startDate)
  const [tempEnd, setTempEnd] = useState(endDate)
  const [currentMonth, setCurrentMonth] = useState(new Date())
  const ref = useRef(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e) => {
      if (ref.current && !ref.current.contains(e.target)) setIsOpen(false)
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
  }, [])

  const getDaysInMonth = (date) => {
    const year = date.getFullYear()
    const month = date.getMonth()
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1)
    const lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0)
    const daysInMonth = lastDay.getDate()
    const startingDay = firstDay.getDay()
    
    const days = []
    for (let i = 0; i < startingDay; i++) {
      days.push(null)
    }
    for (let i = 1; i <= daysInMonth; i++) {
      days.push(new Date(year, month, i))
    }
    return days
  }

  const monthNames = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December']
  const weekDays = ['Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa', 'Su']
  const days = getDaysInMonth(currentMonth)

  const prevMonth = () => {
    setCurrentMonth(new Date(currentMonth.getFullYear(), currentMonth.getMonth() - 1))
  }

  const nextMonth = () => {
    setCurrentMonth(new Date(currentMonth.getFullYear(), currentMonth.getMonth() + 1))
  }

  const isDateSelected = (date) => {
    if (!date) return false
    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    return dateStr === tempStart || dateStr === tempEnd
  }

  const isInRange = (date) => {
    if (!date || !tempStart || !tempEnd) return false
    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    return dateStr > tempStart && dateStr < tempEnd
  }

  const selectDate = (date) => {
    if (!date) return
    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
    
    if (!tempStart || (tempStart && tempEnd)) {
      setTempStart(dateStr)
      setTempEnd('')
    } else if (tempStart && !tempEnd) {
      if (dateStr < tempStart) {
        setTempEnd(tempStart)
        setTempStart(dateStr)
      } else {
        setTempEnd(dateStr)
      }
    }
  }

  const applyRange = () => {
    onStartChange(tempStart)
    onEndChange(tempEnd)
    setIsOpen(false)
  }

  const getDisplayText = () => {
    if (startDate && endDate) return `${startDate.slice(5)} — ${endDate.slice(5)}`
    return 'Select dates'
  }

  const presetRanges = [
    { label: 'Today', get: () => {
      const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
      return { start: today, end: today }
    }},
    { label: 'Yesterday', get: () => {
      const yesterday = new Date()
      yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1)
      const day = yesterday.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      return { start: day, end: day }
    }},
    { label: 'Last 7 days', get: () => {
      const end = new Date()
      const start = new Date()
      start.setDate(start.getDate() - 7)
      return { start: start.toISOString().split('T')[0], end: end.toISOString().split('T')[0] }
    }},
    { label: 'Last 30 days', get: () => {
      const end = new Date()
      const start = new Date()
      start.setDate(start.getDate() - 30)
      return { start: start.toISOString().split('T')[0], end: end.toISOString().split('T')[0] }
    }},
    { label: 'This month', get: () => {
      const now = new Date()
      const start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1)
      const end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() + 1, 0)
      return { start: start.toISOString().split('T')[0], end: end.toISOString().split('T')[0] }
    }},
    { label: 'Last month', get: () => {
      const now = new Date()
      const start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - 1, 1)
      const end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 0)
      return { start: start.toISOString().split('T')[0], end: end.toISOString().split('T')[0] }
    }}
  ]

  const applyPreset = (preset) => {
    const { start, end } = preset.get()
    setTempStart(start)
    setTempEnd(end)
  }

  return (
    <div ref={ref} style={{ position: 'relative', width: '100%' }}>
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '14px 16px',
          background: 'white',
          border: '1px solid #eef2f6',
          borderRadius: '14px',
          fontSize: '14px',
          textAlign: 'left',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          display: 'flex',
          justifyContent: 'space-between',
          alignItems: 'center',
          color: '#1a1a2e',
          fontWeight: '500'
        }}
      >
        <span>{getDisplayText()}</span>
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style={{ transform: isOpen ? 'rotate(180deg)' : 'none', transition: 'transform 0.2s' }}>
