          <path d="M6 9L12 15L18 9" stroke="#94a3b8" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </button>
      
      {isOpen && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: 'calc(100% + 8px)',
          right: 0,
          background: 'white',
          borderRadius: '24px',
          boxShadow: '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)',
          zIndex: 50,
          width: '720px',
          maxWidth: 'calc(100vw - 32px)',
          overflow: 'hidden',
          border: '1px solid #f0f0f0'
        }}>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', padding: '24px' }}>
            
            {/* Header with Month Navigation */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: '24px' }}>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px' }}>
                <button
                  onClick={prevMonth}
                  style={{
                    width: '36px',
                    height: '36px',
                    borderRadius: '10px',
                    background: '#f8fafc',
                    border: 'none',
                    cursor: 'pointer',
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center'
                  }}
                >
                  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#1a1a2e" strokeWidth="2">
                    <path d="M15 18L9 12L15 6" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={nextMonth}
                  style={{
                    width: '36px',
                    height: '36px',
                    borderRadius: '10px',
                    background: '#f8fafc',
                    border: 'none',
                    cursor: 'pointer',
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center'
                  }}
                >
                  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#1a1a2e" strokeWidth="2">
                    <path d="M9 18L15 12L9 6" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
                <span style={{ fontSize: '16px', fontWeight: '600', marginLeft: '8px', alignSelf: 'center' }}>
                  {monthNames[currentMonth.getMonth()]} {currentMonth.getFullYear()}
                </span>
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  setTempStart('')
                  setTempEnd('')
                }}
                style={{ background: 'none', border: 'none', fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b', cursor: 'pointer' }}
              >
                Clear
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Calendar Grid */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '48px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
              {/* Calendar */}
              <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(7, 1fr)', gap: '4px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
                  {weekDays.map(day => (
                    <div key={day} style={{ textAlign: 'center', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: '500', color: '#94a3b8', padding: '8px' }}>
                      {day}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(7, 1fr)', gap: '4px' }}>
                  {days.map((date, idx) => {
                    const isSelected = date && isDateSelected(date)
                    const inRange = date && isInRange(date)
                    const isStart = date && tempStart === date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
                    const isEnd = date && tempEnd === date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
                    
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={idx}
                        onClick={() => selectDate(date)}
                        disabled={!date}
                        style={{
                          aspectRatio: '1',
                          borderRadius: '10px',
                          background: inRange && !isSelected ? '#f1f5f9' : isSelected ? '#1a1a2e' : 'white',
                          color: isSelected ? 'white' : date ? '#1a1a2e' : '#cbd5e1',
                          border: 'none',
                          cursor: date ? 'pointer' : 'default',
                          fontSize: '14px',
                          fontWeight: isSelected ? '500' : '400',
                          transition: 'all 0.15s'
                        }}
                      >
                        {date?.getDate()}
                      </button>
                    )
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Presets Sidebar */}
              <div style={{ width: '180px' }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: '500', textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '0.5px', color: '#94a3b8', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
                  Quick select
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '6px' }}>
                  {presetRanges.map(preset => (
                    <button
                      key={preset.label}
                      onClick={() => applyPreset(preset)}
                      style={{
                        padding: '8px 12px',
                        background: 'white',
                        border: 'none',
                        borderRadius: '10px',
                        fontSize: '13px',
                        textAlign: 'left',
                        cursor: 'pointer',
                        color: '#1a1a2e',
                        transition: 'background 0.15s'
                      }}
                      onMouseEnter={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = '#f8fafc'}
                      onMouseLeave={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = 'white'}
                    >
                      {preset.label}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Selected Range Display */}
            <div style={{ marginTop: '24px', paddingTop: '20px', borderTop: '1px solid #f0f0f0', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '13px', color: '#64748b' }}>
                {tempStart && tempEnd ? (
                  <span>Selected: <strong>{tempStart}</strong> — <strong>{tempEnd}</strong></span>
                ) : tempStart ? (
                  <span>Selected: <strong>{tempStart}</strong> — <span style={{ color: '#94a3b8' }}>end date</span></span>
                ) : (
                  <span>No dates selected</span>
                )}
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '12px' }}>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
                  style={{ padding: '8px 20px', background: '#f1f5f9', border: 'none', borderRadius: '10px', fontSize: '13px', cursor: 'pointer' }}
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={applyRange}
                  style={{ padding: '8px 20px', background: '#1a1a2e', border: 'none', borderRadius: '10px', fontSize: '13px', cursor: 'pointer', color: 'white' }}
                >
                  Apply
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ============================================
// PREMIUM SEARCH BAR
// ============================================
const PremiumSearchBar = ({ value, onChange }) => {
  return (
    <div style={{ position: 'relative' }}>
      <svg
        style={{ position: 'absolute', left: '16px', top: '50%', transform: 'translateY(-50%)', width: '18px', height: '18px', color: '#94a3b8' }}
        fill="none"
        stroke="currentColor"
        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
      >
        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
      </svg>
      <input
        type="text"
        placeholder="Search posts..."
        value={value}
        onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '14px 16px 14px 48px',
          borderRadius: '14px',
          border: '1px solid #eef2f6',
          fontSize: '14px',
          outline: 'none',
          background: 'white',
          transition: 'all 0.2s'
        }}
        onFocus={(e) => {
          e.target.style.borderColor = '#1a1a2e'
          e.target.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 3px rgba(26,26,46,0.05)'
        }}
        onBlur={(e) => {
          e.target.style.borderColor = '#eef2f6'
          e.target.style.boxShadow = 'none'
        }}
      />
      {value && (
        <button
          onClick={() => onChange('')}
          style={{
            position: 'absolute',
            right: '16px',
            top: '50%',
            transform: 'translateY(-50%)',
            background: 'none',
            border: 'none',
            cursor: 'pointer',
            padding: '4px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            display: 'flex',
            alignItems: 'center',
            justifyContent: 'center'
          }}
        >
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" strokeWidth="2">
            <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6L18 18" />
          </svg>
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ============================================
// MAIN POSTS MANAGER COMPONENT
// ============================================
export default function PostsManager() {
  const router = useRouter()
  const [posts, setPosts] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  
  // Filters
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all')
  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('all')
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('')
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('')
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
  const [hasDateFilter, setHasDateFilter] = useState(false)

  // Schedule modal
  const [showScheduleModal, setShowScheduleModal] = useState(false)
  const [selectedPost, setSelectedPost] = useState(null)
  const [scheduleDate, setScheduleDate] = useState('')
  const [scheduleTime, setScheduleTime] = useState('')

  // Preview modal
  const [showPreviewModal, setShowPreviewModal] = useState(false)
  const [previewPost, setPreviewPost] = useState(null)

  // Stats
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ all: 0, published: 0, draft: 0, scheduled: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchPosts()
  }, [])

  const fetchPosts = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    const { data } = await supabase.from('posts').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    setPosts(data || [])
    setStats({
      all: data?.length || 0,
      published: data?.filter(p => p.status === 'published').length || 0,
      draft: data?.filter(p => p.status === 'draft').length || 0,
      scheduled: data?.filter(p => p.status === 'scheduled').length || 0
    })
    setLoading(false)
  }

  const getFilteredPosts = () => {
    let filtered = [...posts]
    if (statusFilter !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.status === statusFilter)
    if (categoryFilter !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.category === categoryFilter)
    if (hasDateFilter && startDate && endDate) {
      const start = new Date(startDate)
      const end = new Date(endDate)
      end.setHours(23, 59, 59)
      filtered = filtered.filter(p => {
        const postDate = new Date(p.created_at)
        return postDate >= start && postDate <= end
      })
    }
    if (searchQuery.trim()) {
      const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase()
      filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.title?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || p.excerpt?.toLowerCase().includes(q))
    }
    return filtered
  }

  const filteredPosts = getFilteredPosts()
  const hasActiveFilters = statusFilter !== 'all' || categoryFilter !== 'all' || hasDateFilter || searchQuery !== ''

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setStatusFilter('all')
    setCategoryFilter('all')
    setStartDate('')
    setEndDate('')
    setHasDateFilter(false)
    setSearchQuery('')
  }

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    if (confirm('Delete this post?')) {
      await supabase.from('posts').delete().eq('id', id)
      fetchPosts()
    }
  }

  const handleStatusChange = async (post, newStatus) => {
    await supabase.from('posts').update({ status: newStatus, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('id', post.id)
    fetchPosts()
  }

  const openScheduleModal = (post) => {
    setSelectedPost(post)
    const tomorrow = new Date()
    tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1)
    setScheduleDate(tomorrow.toISOString().split('T')[0])
    setScheduleTime('09:00')
    setShowScheduleModal(true)
  }

  const handleSchedule = async () => {
    if (!selectedPost || !scheduleDate || !scheduleTime) return
    const scheduledDateTime = new Date(`${scheduleDate}T${scheduleTime}:00`).toISOString()
    await supabase.from('posts').update({ status: 'scheduled', scheduled_for: scheduledDateTime }).eq('id', selectedPost.id)
    setShowScheduleModal(false)
    fetchPosts()
  }

  const handleReschedule = async (post) => {
    setSelectedPost(post)
    if (post.scheduled_for) {
      const date = new Date(post.scheduled_for)
      setScheduleDate(date.toISOString().split('T')[0])
      setScheduleTime(date.toTimeString().slice(0, 5))
    } else {
      const tomorrow = new Date()
      tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1)
      setScheduleDate(tomorrow.toISOString().split('T')[0])
      setScheduleTime('09:00')
    }
    setShowScheduleModal(true)
  }

  const openPreview = (post) => {
    setPreviewPost(post)
    setShowPreviewModal(true)
  }

  const statusOptions = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'All status' },
    { value: 'published', label: 'Published' },
    { value: 'draft', label: 'Draft' },
    { value: 'scheduled', label: 'Scheduled' }
  ]

  const categoryOptions = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'All categories' },
    { value: 'tech', label: 'Technology' },
    { value: 'wealth', label: 'Wealth' },
    { value: 'health', label: 'Health' },
    { value: 'growth', label: 'Growth' },
    { value: 'entertainment', label: 'Entertainment' },
    { value: 'world', label: 'World' },
    { value: 'lifestyle', label: 'Lifestyle' }
  ]

  const formatDate = (dateString) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    const now = new Date()
    const diff = Math.floor((now - date) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
    if (diff === 0) return 'Today'
    if (diff === 1) return 'Yesterday'
    if (diff < 7) return `${diff} days ago`
    return date.toLocaleDateString()
  }

  const formatScheduledDate = (dateString) => {
    if (!dateString) return ''
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    return `${date.toLocaleDateString()} at ${date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}`
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', minHeight: '100vh', background: '#f8fafc' }}>
          <div style={{ width: '32px', height: '32px', border: '2px solid #eef2f6', borderTopColor: '#1a1a2e', borderRadius: '50%', animation: 'spin 0.6s linear infinite' }} />
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    )
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div style={{ maxWidth: '100%', padding: '20px', background: '#f8fafc', minHeight: '100vh' }}>
        
        {/* Header with Create Post Button */}
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '28px', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '16px' }}>
          <div>
            <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: '600', color: '#1a1a2e', margin: 0 }}>Posts</h1>
            <p style={{ fontSize: '14px', color: '#64748b', marginTop: '4px' }}>Manage your content</p>
          </div>
          
          {/* Create New Post Button */}
          <Link href="/create-post" passHref>
            <button
              style={{
                background: '#1a1a2e',
                color: 'white',
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: '14px',
                padding: '12px 24px',
                fontSize: '14px',
                fontWeight: '500',
                cursor: 'pointer',
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: '8px',
                transition: 'background 0.2s'
              }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = '#2d2d44'}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.background = '#1a1a2e'}
            >
              <span style={{ fontSize: '18px' }}>+</span> New Post
            </button>
          </Link>
        </div>

        {/* Stats Cards */}
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>
          <div style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '16px', padding: '16px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b' }}>Total</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: '600', color: '#1a1a2e' }}>{stats.all}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '16px', padding: '16px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b' }}>Published</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: '600', color: '#10b981' }}>{stats.published}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '16px', padding: '16px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b' }}>Drafts</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: '600', color: '#f59e0b' }}>{stats.draft}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '16px', padding: '16px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b' }}>Scheduled</div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: '600', color: '#8b5cf6' }}>{stats.scheduled}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Premium Search Bar */}
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '16px' }}>
          <PremiumSearchBar value={searchQuery} onChange={setSearchQuery} />
        </div>

        {/* Premium Filters */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>
          <PremiumSelect value={statusFilter} onChange={setStatusFilter} options={statusOptions} placeholder="Filter by status" />
          <PremiumSelect value={categoryFilter} onChange={setCategoryFilter} options={categoryOptions} placeholder="Filter by category" />
          <PremiumDatePicker 
            startDate={startDate} 
            endDate={endDate} 
            onStartChange={(d) => { setStartDate(d); setHasDateFilter(true) }} 
            onEndChange={(d) => { setEndDate(d); setHasDateFilter(true) }} 
          />
        </div>

        {/* Clear Filters */}
        {hasActiveFilters && (
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'right', marginBottom: '20px' }}>
            <button onClick={clearFilters} style={{ background: 'none', border: 'none', fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b', cursor: 'pointer', textDecoration: 'underline' }}>
              Clear all filters
            </button>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Posts List */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '12px' }}>
          {filteredPosts.length === 0 ? (
            <div style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '16px', padding: '60px 24px', textAlign: 'center', border: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '48px', marginBottom: '12px' }}>📭</div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '14px', color: '#64748b' }}>No posts found</div>
              <Link href="/create-post" passHref>
                <button style={{
                  marginTop: '20px',
                  padding: '10px 20px',
                  background: '#1a1a2e',
                  color: 'white',
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: '12px',
                  cursor: 'pointer'
                }}>
                  Create your first post →
                </button>
              </Link>
            </div>
          ) : (
            filteredPosts.map((post) => (
              <div key={post.id} style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '16px', padding: '16px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
                
                {/* Post Header */}
                <div style={{ marginBottom: '12px' }}>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '6px' }}>
                    <Link href={`/edit-post/${post.id}`} passHref>
                      <h3 style={{ fontSize: '16px', fontWeight: '500', color: '#1a1a2e', margin: 0, cursor: 'pointer' }}>
                        {post.title || 'Untitled'}
                      </h3>
                    </Link>
                    <span style={{
                      fontSize: '10px',
                      padding: '2px 8px',
                      borderRadius: '12px',
                      background: post.status === 'published' ? '#d1fae5' : post.status === 'draft' ? '#fef3c7' : '#ede9fe',
                      color: post.status === 'published' ? '#065f46' : post.status === 'draft' ? '#92400e' : '#5b21b6'
                    }}>
                      {post.status}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: '#94a3b8', display: 'flex', gap: '12px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
                    <span>{formatDate(post.created_at)}</span>
                    <span>👁️ {post.views || 0}</span>
                    <span>📁 {post.category || 'uncategorized'}</span>
                    {post.status === 'scheduled' && post.scheduled_for && (
                      <span>📅 {formatScheduledDate(post.scheduled_for)}</span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Actions */}
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', flexWrap: 'wrap', paddingTop: '12px', borderTop: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
                  <Link href={`/edit-post/${post.id}`} passHref>
                    <button style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#f1f5f9', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer' }}>
                      ✏️ Edit
                    </button>
                  </Link>
                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(post.id)} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#fef2f2', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#dc2626' }}>
                    🗑️ Delete
                  </button>
                  <button onClick={() => openPreview(post)} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#f0fdf4', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#059669' }}>
                    👁️ Preview
                  </button>

                  {post.status === 'published' && (
                    <button onClick={() => handleStatusChange(post, 'draft')} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#fffbeb', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#d97706' }}>
                      📥 Unpublish
                    </button>
                  )}

                  {post.status === 'draft' && (
                    <>
                      <button onClick={() => handleStatusChange(post, 'published')} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#ecfdf5', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#059669' }}>
                        📤 Publish
                      </button>
                      <button onClick={() => openScheduleModal(post)} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#f5f3ff', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#7c3aed' }}>
                        📅 Schedule
                      </button>
                    </>
                  )}

                  {post.status === 'scheduled' && (
                    <>
                      <button onClick={() => handleStatusChange(post, 'published')} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#ecfdf5', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#059669' }}>
                        ⚡ Publish now
                      </button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleReschedule(post)} style={{ padding: '5px 12px', background: '#f5f3ff', border: 'none', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '12px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#7c3aed' }}>
                        📅 Reschedule
                      </button>
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Schedule Modal */}
        {showScheduleModal && selectedPost && (
          <div style={{ position: 'fixed', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.4)', backdropFilter: 'blur(4px)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', zIndex: 1000, padding: '16px' }}>
            <div style={{ background: 'white', borderRadius: '24px', width: '100%', maxWidth: '360px', overflow: 'hidden', boxShadow: '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)' }}>
              <div style={{ padding: '20px', borderBottom: '1px solid #eef2f6' }}>
                <h3 style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: '600', margin: 0 }}>{selectedPost.status === 'scheduled' ? 'Reschedule' : 'Schedule'}</h3>
                <p style={{ fontSize: '13px', color: '#64748b', marginTop: '4px' }}>{selectedPost.title}</p>
              </div>
              <div style={{ padding: '20px' }}>
                <div style={{ marginBottom: '16px' }}>
                  <label style={{ fontSize: '13px', fontWeight: '500', marginBottom: '6px', display: 'block', color: '#1a1a2e' }}>Date</label>
                  <input type="date" value={scheduleDate} onChange={(e) => setScheduleDate(e.target.value)} style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px', borderRadius: '12px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6', fontSize: '14px' }} />
                </div>
                <div style={{ marginBottom: '20px' }}>
                  <label style={{ fontSize: '13px', fontWeight: '500', marginBottom: '6px', display: 'block', color: '#1a1a2e' }}>Time</label>
                  <input type="time" value={scheduleTime} onChange={(e) => setScheduleTime(e.target.value)} style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px', borderRadius: '12px', border: '1px solid #eef2f6', fontSize: '14px' }} />
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '12px' }}>
                  <button onClick={() => setShowScheduleModal(false)} style={{ flex: 1, padding: '12px', background: '#f1f5f9', border: 'none', borderRadius: '12px', fontSize: '14px', cursor: 'pointer' }}>Cancel</button>
                  <button onClick={handleSchedule} style={{ flex: 1, padding: '12px', background: '#1a1a2e', border: 'none', borderRadius: '12px', fontSize: '14px', cursor: 'pointer', color: 'white' }}>Confirm</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Preview Modal */}
        {showPreviewModal && previewPost && (
          <DevicePreviewModal 
            post={previewPost} 
            onClose={() => setShowPreviewModal(false)} 
          />
        )}
      </div>

      <style jsx>{`
        @keyframes spin {
          to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
      `}</style>
    </AdminNavigation>
  )
}

========== src\pages\admin\posts.js ==========
// pages/admin/post.js
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
import dynamic from 'next/dynamic';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { generateSlug, ensureUniqueSlug } from '@/utils/slugify';
import toast, { Toaster } from 'react-hot-toast';
import DatePicker from 'react-datepicker';
import 'react-datepicker/dist/react-datepicker.css';
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation';

// Dynamic imports for client-side only components
const PremiumEditor = dynamic(() => import('@/components/PremiumEditor'), { ssr: false });
const MediaUploader = dynamic(() => import('@/components/MediaUploader'), { ssr: false });
const PreviewModal = dynamic(() => import('@/components/PreviewModal'), { ssr: false });

export default function PostEditor() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { id } = router.query;
  const isEditMode = !!id;
  
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(isEditMode);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [showPreview, setShowPreview] = useState(false);
  const [showSchedulePicker, setShowSchedulePicker] = useState(false);
  
  // Post Data
  const [title, setTitle] = useState('');
  const [slug, setSlug] = useState('');
  const [content, setContent] = useState('');
  const [excerpt, setExcerpt] = useState('');
  const [featuredImage, setFeaturedImage] = useState(null);
  const [featuredVideo, setFeaturedVideo] = useState(null);
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('');
  const [tags, setTags] = useState([]);
  const [tagInput, setTagInput] = useState('');
  const [status, setStatus] = useState('draft');
  const [scheduledDate, setScheduledDate] = useState(null);
  const [isFeatured, setIsFeatured] = useState(false);
  
  // SEO Data
  const [seoTitle, setSeoTitle] = useState('');
  const [seoDescription, setSeoDescription] = useState('');
  
  const categories = ['Technology', 'Wealth', 'Health', 'Growth', 'Entertainment', 'World', 'Lifestyle'];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isEditMode && id) fetchPost();
  }, [id]);

  const fetchPost = async () => {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('posts')
      .select('*')
      .eq('id', id)
      .single();

    if (error) {
      toast.error('Failed to load post');
      router.push('/admin/posts');
      return;
    }

    if (data) {
      setTitle(data.title || '');
      setSlug(data.slug || '');
      setContent(data.content || '');
      setExcerpt(data.excerpt || '');
      setCategory(data.category || '');
      setTags(data.tags || []);
      setStatus(data.status || 'draft');
      setIsFeatured(data.is_featured || false);
      setScheduledDate(data.scheduled_for ? new Date(data.scheduled_for) : null);
      setSeoTitle(data.seo_title || '');
      setSeoDescription(data.seo_description || '');
      setFeaturedImage(data.featured_image ? { url: data.featured_image } : null);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const handleTitleChange = (e) => {
    const newTitle = e.target.value;
    setTitle(newTitle);
    if (!isEditMode || !slug) {
      setSlug(generateSlug(newTitle));
    }
  };

  const addTag = () => {
    if (tagInput.trim() && !tags.includes(tagInput.trim())) {
      setTags([...tags, tagInput.trim()]);
      setTagInput('');
      toast.success(`Tag added: ${tagInput}`);
    }
  };

  const removeTag = (tagToRemove) => {
    setTags(tags.filter(tag => tag !== tagToRemove));
  };

  const savePost = async (publishStatus = null) => {
    setSaving(true);
    let finalStatus = publishStatus || status;
    
    if (scheduledDate && publishStatus === null) {
      finalStatus = 'scheduled';
    }

    if (!title.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please enter a title');
      setSaving(false);
      return;
    }

    const baseSlug = slug || generateSlug(title);
    const uniqueSlug = await ensureUniqueSlug(supabase, baseSlug, id);

    const postData = {
      title: title.trim(),
      slug: uniqueSlug,
      excerpt: excerpt || `${title.substring(0, 160)}...`,
      content: content,
      category: category || null,
      tags: tags,
      status: finalStatus,
      is_featured: isFeatured,
      seo_title: seoTitle || title,
      seo_description: seoDescription || excerpt,
      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    if (finalStatus === 'scheduled' && scheduledDate) {
      postData.scheduled_for = scheduledDate.toISOString();
    }

    if (featuredImage?.url) {
      postData.featured_image = featuredImage.url;
    }

    if (!isEditMode) {
      postData.created_at = new Date().toISOString();
    }

    try {
      let result;
      
      if (isEditMode) {
        result = await supabase.from('posts').update(postData).eq('id', id);
      } else {
        result = await supabase.from('posts').insert([postData]);
      }

      if (result.error) throw result.error;
      
      const successMessage = finalStatus === 'published' ? '🎉 Post published!' : 
                            finalStatus === 'scheduled' ? '📅 Post scheduled!' : 
                            '💾 Draft saved';
      toast.success(successMessage);
      router.push('/admin/posts');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error('Failed to save: ' + error.message);
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div className="loading-screen">
          <div className="loading-spinner"></div>
          <p>Loading your post...</p>
          <style jsx>{`
            .loading-screen {
              min-height: 100vh;
              display: flex;
              flex-direction: column;
              align-items: center;
              justify-content: center;
              gap: 16px;
              background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
              color: white;
            }
            .loading-spinner {
              width: 50px;
              height: 50px;
              border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
              border-top-color: white;
              border-radius: 50%;
              animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
            }
            @keyframes spin {
              to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
            }
          `}</style>
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    );
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <div className="post-editor">
        <Toaster position="top-right" />
        
        {/* Header with Action Buttons */}
        <header className="editor-header">
          <div className="header-container">
            <div className="header-left">
              <h1>{isEditMode ? 'Edit Post' : 'Create New Post'}</h1>
              {status === 'published' && <span className="published-badge">Published</span>}
            </div>
            
            <div className="header-actions">
              <button onClick={() => savePost('draft')} disabled={saving} className="btn-draft">
                💾 Save Draft
              </button>
              
              <button onClick={() => setShowSchedulePicker(true)} disabled={saving} className="btn-schedule">
                📅 Schedule
              </button>
              
              <button onClick={() => savePost('published')} disabled={saving} className="btn-publish">
                🚀 Publish
              </button>
              
              <button onClick={() => setShowPreview(true)} className="btn-preview">
                👁️ Preview
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Schedule Modal */}
        {showSchedulePicker && (
          <div className="schedule-modal">
            <div className="schedule-modal-content">
              <h3>Schedule Post</h3>
              <DatePicker
                selected={scheduledDate}
                onChange={date => {
                  setScheduledDate(date);
                  setShowSchedulePicker(false);
                  setTimeout(() => savePost('scheduled'), 100);
                }}
                showTimeSelect
                dateFormat="MMMM d, yyyy h:mm aa"
                inline
              />
              <button className="close-schedule" onClick={() => setShowSchedulePicker(false)}>Cancel</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Title Section */}
        <div className="title-section">
          <div className="title-container">
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Add title"
              value={title}
              onChange={handleTitleChange}
              className="title-input"
            />
            <div className="slug-preview">
              <span>trendlin.com/blog/</span>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={slug}
                onChange={(e) => setSlug(generateSlug(e.target.value))}
                placeholder="post-url"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Main Grid */}
        <div className="editor-grid">
          {/* Left Column - Editor */}
          <div className="editor-column">
            <MediaUploader
              onImageUpload={setFeaturedImage}
              onVideoUpload={setFeaturedVideo}
              image={featuredImage}
              video={featuredVideo}
            />
            <PremiumEditor
              content={content}
              onChange={setContent}
            />
          </div>

          {/* Right Column - Settings */}
          <div className="settings-column">
            {/* Status Card */}
            <div className="settings-card">
              <h3>📊 Status</h3>
              <div className="status-buttons">
                <button onClick={() => setStatus('draft')} className={`status-draft ${status === 'draft' ? 'active' : ''}`}>
                  Draft
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => setStatus('published')} className={`status-published ${status === 'published' ? 'active' : ''}`}>
                  Published
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => setStatus('scheduled')} className={`status-scheduled ${status === 'scheduled' ? 'active' : ''}`}>
                  Scheduled
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Featured Card */}
            <div className="settings-card">
              <label className="featured-toggle">
                <input type="checkbox" checked={isFeatured} onChange={(e) => setIsFeatured(e.target.checked)} />
                <span className="toggle-slider"></span>
                <span>⭐ Feature this post</span>
              </label>
              <p className="card-hint">Featured posts appear at the top of your blog</p>
            </div>

            {/* Category Card */}
            <div className="settings-card">
              <h3>📁 Category</h3>
              <div className="category-list">
                {categories.map(cat => (
                  <button key={cat} onClick={() => setCategory(cat)} className={`category-item ${category === cat ? 'active' : ''}`}>
                    {cat}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Tags Card */}
            <div className="settings-card">
              <h3>🏷️ Tags</h3>
              <div className="tags-list">
                {tags.map(tag => (
                  <span key={tag} className="tag">
                    #{tag}
                    <button onClick={() => removeTag(tag)}>×</button>
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div className="tag-input-group">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={tagInput}
                  onChange={(e) => setTagInput(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && addTag()}
                  placeholder="Add a tag..."
                />
                <button onClick={addTag}>Add</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* SEO Card */}
            <div className="settings-card">
              <h3>🔍 SEO Settings</h3>
              <div className="seo-field">
                <label>SEO Title</label>
                <input type="text" value={seoTitle} onChange={(e) => setSeoTitle(e.target.value)} placeholder={title} />
                <span className="field-hint">{seoTitle?.length || title?.length || 0}/60</span>
              </div>
              <div className="seo-field">
                <label>Meta Description</label>
                <textarea value={seoDescription} onChange={(e) => setSeoDescription(e.target.value)} placeholder={excerpt} rows="3" />
                <span className="field-hint">{seoDescription?.length || excerpt?.length || 0}/160</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Excerpt Card */}
            <div className="settings-card">
              <h3>📝 Excerpt</h3>
              <textarea value={excerpt} onChange={(e) => setExcerpt(e.target.value)} placeholder="Write a compelling excerpt..." rows="4" />
              <span className="field-hint">{excerpt.length}/160 characters</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Preview Modal */}
        {showPreview && (
          <PreviewModal
            title={title}
            content={content}
            featuredImage={featuredImage}
            featuredVideo={featuredVideo}
            onClose={() => setShowPreview(false)}
          />
        )}

        <style jsx>{`
          .post-editor {
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #f5f7fb;
          }

          .editor-header {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 50;
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            padding: 16px 24px;
          }

          .header-container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 16px;
          }

          .header-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
          }

          .header-left h1 {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #1e293b;
            margin: 0;
          }

          .published-badge {
            background: #10b981;
            color: white;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 500;
          }

          .header-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
          }

          .header-actions button {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 40px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            border: none;
          }

          .btn-draft {
            background: #f1f5f9;
            color: #475569;
          }

          .btn-draft:hover {
            background: #e2e8f0;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
          }

          .btn-schedule {
            background: #fef3c7;
            color: #d97706;
          }

          .btn-schedule:hover {
            background: #fde68a;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
          }

          .btn-publish {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
          }

          .btn-publish:hover {
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
          }

          .btn-preview {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
            color: #64748b;
          }

          .btn-preview:hover {
            background: #f8fafc;
            border-color: #667eea;
            color: #667eea;
          }

          .schedule-modal {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 1000;
          }

          .schedule-modal-content {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 24px;
            padding: 24px;
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
            text-align: center;
          }

          .schedule-modal-content h3 {
            font-size: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
          }

          .close-schedule {
            margin-top: 16px;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: #f1f5f9;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 40px;
            cursor: pointer;
          }

          .title-section {
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            padding: 24px;
          }

          .title-container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
          }

          .title-input {
            width: 100%;
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 700;
            border: none;
            outline: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            color: #1e293b;
          }

          .title-input::placeholder {
            color: #cbd5e1;
          }

          .slug-preview {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 8px 0;
            color: #64748b;
            font-size: 14px;
          }

          .slug-preview input {
            border: none;
            outline: none;
            background: transparent;
            color: #667eea;
            font-size: 14px;
            padding: 0;
          }

          .editor-grid {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 360px;
            gap: 24px;
          }

          @media (max-width: 1024px) {
            .editor-grid {
              grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
          }

          .editor-column {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 24px;
          }

          .settings-column {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 24px;
          }

          .settings-card {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
          }

          .settings-card h3 {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #1e293b;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
          }

          .status-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
          }

          .status-buttons button {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 40px;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.2s;
          }

          .status-draft {
            background: #f1f5f9;
            color: #475569;
          }

          .status-draft.active {
            background: #475569;
            color: white;
          }

          .status-published {
            background: #dcfce7;
            color: #166534;
          }

          .status-published.active {
            background: #10b981;
            color: white;
          }

          .status-scheduled {
            background: #fef3c7;
            color: #92400e;
          }

          .status-scheduled.active {
            background: #f59e0b;
            color: white;
          }

          .featured-toggle {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
          }

          .featured-toggle input {
            display: none;
          }

          .toggle-slider {
            width: 44px;
            height: 24px;
            background: #cbd5e1;
            border-radius: 24px;
            position: relative;
            transition: all 0.3s;
          }

          .toggle-slider:before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            top: 2px;
            left: 2px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
          }

          .featured-toggle input:checked + .toggle-slider {
            background: #667eea;
          }

          .featured-toggle input:checked + .toggle-slider:before {
            transform: translateX(20px);
          }

          .card-hint {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #94a3b8;
            margin-top: 8px;
          }

          .category-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
          }

          .category-item {
            padding: 6px 14px;
            background: #f1f5f9;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 40px;
            font-size: 13px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
          }

          .category-item:hover {
            background: #e2e8f0;
          }

          .category-item.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: white;
          }

          .tags-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
          }

          .tag {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            background: #f1f5f9;
            border-radius: 40px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #475569;
          }

          .tag button {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #94a3b8;
          }

          .tag-input-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
          }

          .tag-input-group input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 13px;
          }

          .tag-input-group button {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: #f1f5f9;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
          }

          .seo-field {
            margin-bottom: 16px;
          }

          .seo-field label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            color: #475569;
          }

          .seo-field input,
          .seo-field textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px 12px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 13px;
            resize: none;
          }

          .field-hint {
            display: block;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #94a3b8;
            margin-top: 4px;
          }

          .settings-card textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px 12px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 13px;
            resize: none;
          }

          @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .title-input {
              font-size: 32px;
            }
            
            .header-actions button span {
              display: none;
            }
            
            .header-actions button {
              padding: 10px 14px;
            }
            
            .editor-grid {
              padding: 16px;
            }
          }
        `}</style>
      </div>
    </AdminNavigation>
  );
}

========== src\pages\admin\revenue.js ==========
// pages/admin/revenue-tracker.js - WITH 4 GRAPHS AND CSV EXPORT
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import AdminNavigation from '@/components/AdminNavigation'
import StatsCard from '@/components/StatsCard'
import DataTable from '@/components/DataTable'
import Toast from '@/components/Toast'
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  PointElement,
  LineElement,
  BarElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
  Filler,
  ArcElement
} from 'chart.js'
import { Line, Bar, Doughnut } from 'react-chartjs-2'

ChartJS.register(
  CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, BarElement,
  Title, Tooltip, Legend, Filler, ArcElement
)

export default function RevenueTracker() {
  const [revenueEntries, setRevenueEntries] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false)
  const [toast, setToast] = useState(null)
  const [selectedMonth, setSelectedMonth] = useState(new Date().getMonth() + 1)
  const [selectedYear, setSelectedYear] = useState(new Date().getFullYear())
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false)
  const [showExportModal, setShowExportModal] = useState(false)
  
  // Calendar state for custom date range
  const [showCustomPicker, setShowCustomPicker] = useState(false)
  const [calendarMonth, setCalendarMonth] = useState(new Date())
  const [tempStartDate, setTempStartDate] = useState(null)
  const [tempEndDate, setTempEndDate] = useState(null)
  const [selectingEnd, setSelectingEnd] = useState(false)
  const [customStartDate, setCustomStartDate] = useState('')
  const [customEndDate, setCustomEndDate] = useState('')
  const [useCustomRange, setUseCustomRange] = useState(false)
  
  // Export options
  const [exportOptions, setExportOptions] = useState({
    revenueData: true,
    summaryData: true,
    chartData: true,
    sourceBreakdown: true
  })
  
  const calendarRef = useRef(null)
  
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    source: 'ad_revenue',
    amount: '',
    date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    note: ''
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRevenueEntries()
  }, [selectedMonth, selectedYear, customStartDate, customEndDate, useCustomRange])

  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event) {
      if (calendarRef.current && !calendarRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setShowCustomPicker(false)
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
  }, [])

  const getDateFilter = () => {
    if (useCustomRange && customStartDate && customEndDate) {
      return { start: customStartDate, end: customEndDate }
    }
    const startDate = `${selectedYear}-${String(selectedMonth).padStart(2, '0')}-01`
    const lastDay = new Date(selectedYear, selectedMonth, 0).getDate()
    const endDate = `${selectedYear}-${String(selectedMonth).padStart(2, '0')}-${lastDay}`
    return { start: startDate, end: endDate }
  }

  const fetchRevenueEntries = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
    
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('revenue_entries')
      .select('*')
      .gte('date', start)
      .lte('date', end)
      .order('date', { ascending: true })
    
    setRevenueEntries(data || [])
    setLoading(false)
  }

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!formData.amount || parseFloat(formData.amount) <= 0) {
      setToast({ message: 'Please enter a valid amount', type: 'error' })
      return
    }
    
    const { error } = await supabase.from('revenue_entries').insert([{
      source: formData.source,
      amount: parseFloat(formData.amount),
      date: formData.date,
      note: formData.note,
      created_at: new Date().toISOString()
    }])
    
    if (error) {
      setToast({ message: 'Error adding revenue entry', type: 'error' })
    } else {
      setToast({ message: 'Revenue entry added', type: 'success' })
      await fetchRevenueEntries()
      setShowModal(false)
      setFormData({
        source: 'ad_revenue',
        amount: '',
        date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
        note: ''
      })
    }
  }

  // Calendar functions
  const getDaysInMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate()
  }

  const getFirstDayOfMonth = (year, month) => {
    return new Date(year, month, 1).getDay()
  }

  const changeMonth = (delta) => {
    setCalendarMonth(new Date(calendarMonth.getFullYear(), calendarMonth.getMonth() + delta, 1))
  }

  const isDateInRange = (date) => {
    if (!tempStartDate) return false
    if (!tempEndDate) return date.toDateString() === tempStartDate.toDateString()
    return date >= tempStartDate && date <= tempEndDate
  }

  const isStartDate = (date) => {
    return tempStartDate && date.toDateString() === tempStartDate.toDateString()
  }

  const isEndDate = (date) => {
    return tempEndDate && date.toDateString() === tempEndDate.toDateString()
  }

  const handleDateClick = (date) => {
    if (!selectingEnd || !tempStartDate) {
      setTempStartDate(date)
      setTempEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(true)
    } else {
      if (date < tempStartDate) {
        setTempStartDate(date)
        setTempEndDate(null)
      } else {
        setTempEndDate(date)
        setSelectingEnd(false)
      }
    }
  }

  const applyCustomRange = () => {
    if (tempStartDate && tempEndDate) {
      const startStr = tempStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      const endStr = tempEndDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]
      setCustomStartDate(startStr)
      setCustomEndDate(endStr)
      setUseCustomRange(true)
      setShowCustomPicker(false)
      setTempStartDate(null)
      setTempEndDate(null)
      setSelectingEnd(false)
    }
  }

  const resetCustomRange = () => {
    setTempStartDate(null)
    setTempEndDate(null)
    setSelectingEnd(false)
  }

  const clearCustomRange = () => {
    setUseCustomRange(false)
    setCustomStartDate('')
    setCustomEndDate('')
  }

  const renderCalendar = () => {
    const year = calendarMonth.getFullYear()
    const month = calendarMonth.getMonth()
    const daysInMonth = getDaysInMonth(year, month)
    const firstDay = getFirstDayOfMonth(year, month)
    const today = new Date()
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    
    const calendarDays = []
    const weekdays = ['Su', 'Mo', 'Tu', 'We', 'Th', 'Fr', 'Sa']
    
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
      calendarDays.push(null)
    }
    
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const date = new Date(year, month, d)
      date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
      const isToday = date.toDateString() === today.toDateString()
      const inRange = isDateInRange(date)
      const isStart = isStartDate(date)
      const isEnd = isEndDate(date)
      
      calendarDays.push({ date, day: d, isToday, inRange, isStart, isEnd })
    }
    
    return { weekdays, calendarDays }
  }

  const { weekdays, calendarDays } = renderCalendar()

  // Calculate metrics for charts
  const totalRevenue = revenueEntries.reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0)
  
  const revenueBySource = {
    ad_revenue: revenueEntries.filter(e => e.source === 'ad_revenue').reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0),
    affiliate_revenue: revenueEntries.filter(e => e.source === 'affiliate_revenue').reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0),
    sponsored: revenueEntries.filter(e => e.source === 'sponsored').reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0),
    other: revenueEntries.filter(e => e.source === 'other').reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0)
  }

  // Group by date for trend chart
  const dates = [...new Set(revenueEntries.map(e => e.date))].sort()
  const revenueByDate = dates.map(date => {
    return revenueEntries.filter(e => e.date === date).reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0)
  })

  // Group by source for pie chart
  const sourceLabels = {
    ad_revenue: 'Ad Revenue',
    affiliate_revenue: 'Affiliate',
    sponsored: 'Sponsored',
    other: 'Other'
  }

  const sourceData = Object.keys(revenueBySource).map(key => revenueBySource[key])
  const sourceColors = {
    ad_revenue: '#6366f1',
    affiliate_revenue: '#10b981',
    sponsored: '#f59e0b',
    other: '#ef4444'
  }

  // Daily average
  const dailyAverage = revenueEntries.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / revenueEntries.length : 0

  // Best day
  let bestDay = { date: '', amount: 0 }
  dates.forEach(date => {
    const dayTotal = revenueEntries.filter(e => e.date === date).reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0)
    if (dayTotal > bestDay.amount) {
      bestDay = { date, amount: dayTotal }
    }
  })

  // Source performance data for bar chart
  const sourcePerformance = Object.keys(revenueBySource).map(key => ({
    source: sourceLabels[key],
    amount: revenueBySource[key],
    color: sourceColors[key]
  })).sort((a, b) => b.amount - a.amount)

  // Cumulative revenue data
  let cumulativeTotal = 0
  const cumulativeData = revenueByDate.map(dayAmount => {
    cumulativeTotal += dayAmount
    return cumulativeTotal
  })

  const columns = [
    { key: 'date', header: 'Date', render: (val) => new Date(val).toLocaleDateString() },
    { key: 'source', header: 'Source', render: (val) => sourceLabels[val] || val.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase() },
    { key: 'amount', header: 'Amount', render: (val) => `$${val.toFixed(2)}` },
    { key: 'note', header: 'Note', render: (val) => val || '-' }
  ]

  const monthNames = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December']

  // Chart configurations
  const lineChartOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 11 } } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: '#1e293b', titleColor: '#f1f5f9', bodyColor: '#94a3b8' }
    },
    scales: {
      y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: '#e2e8f0' }, ticks: { color: '#64748b' } },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#64748b', maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45 } }
    }
  }

  const revenueTrendData = {
    labels: dates.map(date => new Date(date).toLocaleDateString()),
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Daily Revenue',
        data: revenueByDate,
        borderColor: '#6366f1',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(99,102,241,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4
      }
    ]
  }

  const cumulativeDataChart = {
    labels: dates.map(date => new Date(date).toLocaleDateString()),
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Cumulative Revenue',
        data: cumulativeData,
        borderColor: '#10b981',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(16,185,129,0.1)',
        fill: true,
        tension: 0.4
      }
    ]
  }

  const sourceBreakdownData = {
    labels: sourcePerformance.map(s => s.source),
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'Revenue by Source',
        data: sourcePerformance.map(s => s.amount),
        backgroundColor: sourcePerformance.map(s => s.color),
        borderRadius: 8
      }
    ]
  }

  const doughnutData = {
    labels: sourcePerformance.map(s => s.source),
    datasets: [
      {
        data: sourcePerformance.map(s => s.amount),
        backgroundColor: sourcePerformance.map(s => s.color),
        borderWidth: 0
      }
    ]
  }

  const doughnutOptions = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 11 } } },
      tooltip: { callbacks: { label: (context) => `$${context.raw.toFixed(2)}` } }
    }
  }

  // Export to CSV
  const exportToCSV = async () => {
    setExporting(true)
    try {
      const { start, end } = getDateFilter()
      
      const allRows = []
      allRows.push([`"Export generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}"`])
      allRows.push([`"Date range: ${start} to ${end}"`])
      allRows.push([])
      
      if (exportOptions.summaryData) {
        allRows.push(['=== SUMMARY STATISTICS ==='])
        allRows.push(['Metric', 'Value'])
        allRows.push(['Total Revenue', `$${totalRevenue.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push(['Total Entries', revenueEntries.length])
        allRows.push(['Daily Average', `$${dailyAverage.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push(['Best Day', `${bestDay.date} - $${bestDay.amount.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push(['Ad Revenue', `$${revenueBySource.ad_revenue.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push(['Affiliate Revenue', `$${revenueBySource.affiliate_revenue.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push(['Sponsored Revenue', `$${revenueBySource.sponsored.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push(['Other Revenue', `$${revenueBySource.other.toFixed(2)}`])
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (exportOptions.revenueData && revenueEntries.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== REVENUE ENTRIES ==='])
        allRows.push(['Date', 'Source', 'Amount', 'Note'])
        revenueEntries.forEach(entry => {
          allRows.push([
            entry.date,
            sourceLabels[entry.source] || entry.source,
            entry.amount.toFixed(2),
            `"${entry.note || ''}"`
          ])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (exportOptions.sourceBreakdown && sourcePerformance.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== REVENUE BY SOURCE ==='])
        allRows.push(['Source', 'Amount', 'Percentage'])
        sourcePerformance.forEach(source => {
          const percentage = totalRevenue > 0 ? (source.amount / totalRevenue * 100).toFixed(1) : 0
          allRows.push([source.source, `$${source.amount.toFixed(2)}`, `${percentage}%`])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (exportOptions.chartData && dates.length > 0) {
        allRows.push(['=== DAILY BREAKDOWN ==='])
        allRows.push(['Date', 'Daily Revenue', 'Cumulative Revenue'])
        let runningTotal = 0
        dates.forEach((date, index) => {
          runningTotal += revenueByDate[index]
          allRows.push([date, `$${revenueByDate[index].toFixed(2)}`, `$${runningTotal.toFixed(2)}`])
        })
        allRows.push([])
      }
      
      if (allRows.length <= 3) {
        alert('No data to export for selected options')
        setExporting(false)
        return
      }
      
      const csvContent = allRows.map(row => row.join(',')).join('\n')
      const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' })
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      const link = document.createElement('a')
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute('download', `revenue-report-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      document.body.removeChild(link)
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
      
      setToast({ message: 'Export completed successfully', type: 'success' })
    } catch (error) {
      setToast({ message: 'Export failed: ' + error.message, type: 'error' })
    } finally {
      setExporting(false)
      setShowExportModal(false)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <AdminNavigation>
        <div className="loading-container">
          <div className="loading-spinner"></div>
        </div>
      </AdminNavigation>
    )
  }

  return (
    <AdminNavigation>
      <style jsx>{`
        .revenue-tracker {
          min-height: 100vh;
          background: #f8fafc;
          padding: 1rem;
        }
        
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
          .revenue-tracker {
            padding: 1.5rem;
          }
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .revenue-tracker {
          background: #0f172a;
        }
        
        .header {
          display: flex;
          justify-content: space-between;
          align-items: center;
          margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          gap: 1rem;
        }
        
        .header h1 {
          font-size: 1.25rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
        }
        
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
          .header h1 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
          }
        }
        
        .header p {
          color: #64748b;
          font-size: 0.7rem;
        }
        
        .header-actions {
          display: flex;
          gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        
        .btn-primary, .btn-secondary {
          padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
          border-radius: 30px;
          font-size: 0.75rem;
          font-weight: 500;
          cursor: pointer;
          transition: all 0.2s;
          border: none;
        }
        
        .btn-primary {
          background: #6366f1;
          color: white;
        }
        
        .btn-primary:hover {
          transform: translateY(-1px);
          background: #4f46e5;
        }
        
        .btn-secondary {
          background: white;
          border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
          color: #475569;
        }
        
        .btn-secondary:hover {
          background: #f1f5f9;
        }
        
        :global(body.dark) .btn-secondary {
          background: #1e293b;
          border-color: #334155;
          color: #cbd5e1;
        }
        
        /* Date Range Selector */
        .date-range-container {
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        
        .range-buttons {
          display: flex;
          gap: 0.5rem;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .range-btn {
          padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
          background: white;
          border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
          border-radius: 30px;
          cursor: pointer;
          font-size: 0.7rem;
          font-weight: 500;
          transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
          .range-btn {
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
          }
        }
        
        .range-btn:hover {
          background: #f1f5f9;
          border-color: #6366f1;
        }
        
        .range-btn.active {
          background: #6366f1;
          color: white;
          border-color: #6366f1;
        }
        
        .month-btn {
          background: #f1f5f9;
        }
        
        .custom-btn {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 0.3rem;
        }
        
        .custom-range-wrapper {
          position: relative;
        }
        
        /* Mobile-First Calendar Picker */
        .mobile-calendar-picker {
          position: fixed;
          top: 50%;
          left: 50%;
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
          background: white;
          border-radius: 20px;
          box-shadow: 0 20px 35px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
          width: calc(100% - 2rem);
          max-width: 380px;
          z-index: 1000;
          overflow: hidden;
          animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease;
        }
        
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
          .mobile-calendar-picker {
            position: absolute;
            top: calc(100% + 8px);
            left: auto;

          outline: none;
          border-color: #6366f1;

        }

          flex: 1;
          padding: 0.5rem;
          border-radius: 30px;
          font-size: 0.75rem;
          font-weight: 500;
          cursor: pointer;
          background: #f1f5f9;
          border: none;
          color: #475569;
        }
